name: Ron Wyden
subject: A promise that’s 90 years strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
But Republicans want to break it
|
---
| | Today marks the 90th anniversary of the Social Security Act. For 90 years, our country has kept an important promise to its citizens: when you retire after a life of work, support and stability will be there for you. **I'm determined to make sure we maintain that promise for the next 90 years (and well beyond). But Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans are working overtime to weaken Social Security, even sneaking what they call a "backdoor for privatizing" the program into their budget bill.** [**Please read my email from last week below, and join my effort to protect Social Security by adding your name to our petition.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113339739/563443235/-1155685579?ms=2025-08-14-social-security&refcode=2025-08-14-social-security&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Q2NmZjOC02YTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gJWBKm8V9uEcicuxgQus2B8tC8511NDsP4ytXBugs0=&emci=7f1d6a76-4d79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=83d66fc8-6a79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364) Onward, _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113339742/563443243/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Q2NmZjOC02YTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gJWBKm8V9uEcicuxgQus2B8tC8511NDsP4ytXBugs0=&emci=7f1d6a76-4d79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=83d66fc8-6a79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

I've sounded the alarm for months about how giddy Republicans are to cut Social Security. It turns out Trump's Treasury Secretary was _so_ excited that last week, he publicly bragged that the newly-passed GOP budget bill contained – his words, not mine – **"****a backdoor for privatizing Social Security."**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113339744/563443250/-1155685579?ms=2025-08-14-social-security&refcode=2025-08-14-social-security&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Q2NmZjOC02YTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gJWBKm8V9uEcicuxgQus2B8tC8511NDsP4ytXBugs0=&emci=7f1d6a76-4d79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=83d66fc8-6a79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
We need to send a message to Trump, his cronies, and the GOP: **if you come for Social Security, you're going to have to get through us.**
Let's show them that any effort to cut or privatize Social Security – _especially_ something snuck into a budget bill under the guise of "investment accounts" – is going to be met with powerful opposition.
[**Will you sign my petition to denounce the GOP's schemes targeting Social Security?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113339745/563443252/-1155685579?ms=2025-08-14-social-security&refcode=2025-08-14-social-security&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Q2NmZjOC02YTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gJWBKm8V9uEcicuxgQus2B8tC8511NDsP4ytXBugs0=&emci=7f1d6a76-4d79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=83d66fc8-6a79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
[Sign Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113339746/563443254/-1155685579?ms=2025-08-14-social-security&refcode=2025-08-14-social-security&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Q2NmZjOC02YTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gJWBKm8V9uEcicuxgQus2B8tC8511NDsP4ytXBugs0=&emci=7f1d6a76-4d79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=83d66fc8-6a79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
The last time Republicans made a real push to privatize Social Security was in 2005.
**Democrats found our voice and regained our political footing by standing up for the right of Americans to retire with dignity.**
It was the start of a comeback that led to us retaking Congress and the White House. **We need to adopt the same approach in 2025, and amplifying our voices is the first step.**
[**So please, sign your name to stand with me against Republican efforts to put Social Security on the chopping block.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113339747/563443255/-1155685579?ms=2025-08-14-social-security&refcode=2025-08-14-social-security&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Q2NmZjOC02YTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gJWBKm8V9uEcicuxgQus2B8tC8511NDsP4ytXBugs0=&emci=7f1d6a76-4d79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=83d66fc8-6a79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
More soon,
_Ron_

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Erecting obstacles between you and your fundamental right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut:
(Image of Richard Blumenthal speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_RB.jpg]
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081425_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
(Image of Michael Bennet speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081425_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081425_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081425_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081425_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081425_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081425_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081425_2&amount=35]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081425_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081425_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081425_2&amount=20]

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. clean_body: We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list. Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut: (Image of Richard Blumenthal speaking on the Senate floor) [] RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [] Voter Action Project [] The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks. Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet: (Image of Michael Bennet speaking on the Senate floor) [] Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come. Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law. If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point. The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including: Registration by mail 3rd party voter registration drives Online voter registration in states that allow it Automatic voter registration Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. “ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ” The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. subject: Thank you, Governor Newsom!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Governor Newsom has become one of the strongest voices pushing back against Trump’s dangerous, authoritarian agenda.

And now Trump is targeting him for it.

That’s why we’re sending a thank-you letter to Governor Newsom tomorrow at 9 a.m. sharp to say: Democrats across the country have his back.

But Peter: We only have [48] open signature spots left for grassroots Democrats before the midnight deadline. Will you add your name now to show you stand with Newsom and against Trump’s threats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=7]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=10]SIGN THE “THANK YOU GAVIN NEWSOM” LETTER NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=7]

TO: Gov. Gavin Newsom
FROM: A loyal Democrat
RE: I stand with you, Governor Newsom
Dear Governor Newsom,
Thank you for refusing to be intimidated.
When Donald Trump called for your arrest after you stood up to his attacks on California and its people, it was a blatant act of political retaliation and a chilling sign of how far he’s willing to go to silence those who resist his authoritarian ambitions.
That kind of courage matters now more than ever.
As Trump and his MAGA allies double down on their dangerous agenda, we need more leaders like you, willing to meet this moment with boldness, integrity, and action.
So I’m signing this letter to say: I stand with you and I stand with democracy.
And I’m chipping in $7 to Democracy on the Line to help elect more Democrats like you and defeat the rising tide of extremism before it’s too late. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=7]
SIGN THE “THANK YOU GAVIN NEWSOM” LETTER NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=7]
Keep going, Governor. Millions of us are with you, and we’re ready to fight back.
Sincerely,
Peter

– Democracy on the Line

name: Wes Moore
subject: I don’t listen to chicken hawks
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=460%2E1086043%2EeKunKU ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=460%2E1086043%2EeKunKU ]Wes Moore for Governor

I heard Donald Trump is going after me for telling the truth, so here it
is again:

Deploying the National Guard in D.C. lacks seriousness and is deeply
dangerous.

Peter, I don’t
listen to criticism from chicken hawks.

People who talk tough but have never worn a uniform besides Brooks
Brothers suits should not use our service members for political games.

As the commander-in-chief of the Maryland National Guard, I know what they
are trained on. I know what it means to ask someone to put their life at
risk, and what that means you are asking of their families. This political
ploy isn’t it.

If the White House wants to get serious about public safety, they should
talk to us. We’ve achieved some of the most impressive drops in violent
crime in the country and Baltimore is the safest it's been in 50 years.

This stunt by the Trump administration is BS, and it has to stop.

Elevate,

Wes Moore

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250814-2?refcode=em-20250814-2&refcode2=460_1086043_eKunKU&akid=460%2E1086043%2EeKunKU ]Wes Moore

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Looking for something to do this weekend?
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B44466345777536584973617A43452B6D75575A564550592B493559386465584F5637353668682F4A7953546F6F422F4C444842335674703769487356784C4D/editor_images/72225%202025%20Photo%20Contest%20-%20email%20header.png]
Photo from OLCV's 2023 Photo Contest, by Victoria Hawkins
Dear Peter,
What are your weekend plans? This weekend I’ll be out in nature, exploring our public lands, and taking some photos along the way. OLCV’s Environmental Photo Contest is still on, so I hope you’ll take the chance this weekend to get outside and take some photos of yourself or your loved ones on our precious public lands, for the chance to be featured on the cover of our upcoming Environmental Scorecard.
Part of what makes our Environmental Scorecard so special is all of the photos we get to include of and from our members, that remind us why we do this important work. We want to see your photos that relate to any or all of these three categories:
1. You, your family, friends and pets on our public lands (we love photos with people in them!)
2. Wildlife
3. Climate
Be a part of this tradition by submitting your photos by September 1st. How to enter:
* Send up to 3 photos in an email to respond@olcv.org with ‘Photo Contest’ in the subject line
* Include your name, where the photo was taken, and a short description of why it’s meaningful to you
Here's a photo I’ve recently taken with my dog, Freida, out in nature!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Freida%20at%20Lacamas%20Regional%20Park%20.jpg]
Don’t miss this special opportunity to be included in the Environmental Scorecard — that we make for you!
Happy photographing!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director

And Republicans in other states are beginning to follow suit. **[If you agree Democrats need to fight fire with fire when it comes to defending our democracy, pitch in now to support the DNC:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250814_4329_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4329_22930333_UJ2WxL&akid=4329%2E22930333%2EUJ2WxL)**

name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: The Hill: 5 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Some good news, some bad news
#
We’ve got some good news and some bad news, Peter.
**_The Hill_ just released its list of the top FIVE U.S. Senate seats that are most likely to flip in 2026.** We’ll start with the good news:
_North Carolina, Maine, and Texas all made the list._
**If we’re going to restore our Democratic majority in 2026, we absolutely NEED to flip these GOP-held Senate seats.**
**[FLIP THESE SEATS: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93808?refcode=em20250814-9284&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9284%2E614464%2EPWL40j)**
Now, here’s the bad news, Peter:
_Georgia and Michigan also made the list._
**These Dem-held Senate seats are two that we MUST defend in 2026.**
Georgia will be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races happening next year. And Michigan’s open seat could provide the perfect opportunity for the GOP to gain even more control than they already have.

Now, here’s the bad news, Peter: Georgia and Michigan also made the list. These Dem-held Senate seats are two that we MUST defend in 2026. Georgia will be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races happening next year. And Michigan’s open seat could provide the perfect opportunity for the GOP to gain even more control than they already have. Republican groups are already spending MILLIONS of dollars to attack the Democrats running in these critical elections. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Why redistricting is a fight we must take on in California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Donald Trump is terrified of losing his House majority in the midterm
elections, Derek.

That’s why he and his Republican allies are making an unprecedented power
grab to seize new congressional seats in Texas and ensure their majority
in the 2026 election before voting even begins.

To put it simply: This isn’t politics as usual. It’s an emergency for our
democracy.

Next year’s election is our chance to put a real check on the Trump
administration and put an end to his lawless and reckless agenda. But the
GOP knows that his agenda is deeply unpopular, so they’re making moves to
try to gerrymander congressional districts. They don’t care about
silencing voters or diluting the voting strength of people in blue states.
They care only about keeping power in their own hands.

That’s why California MUST respond. And today, we are:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1004&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]Will you split a donation between my campaign and the Election Rigging
Response Act so we can take action and ensure we can fight back against
the GOP’s plan to gerrymander Texas?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Adam Schiff and Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.sJSYOj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.wZBFsa&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.lmP1LY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.b-_4iw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.lS09p5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m in Los Angeles today with Governor Gavin Newsom to announce the
initiative to fight back — and to win.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]Adam Schiff alongside Gavin Newsom, Alex Padilla, and other leaders in
California

Trump and Republicans REFUSE to fight fair, and it’s put us in a spot
where we must take action — or risk people’s voice in the 2026 election
being taken away from them.

California will take action to adjust our own maps, but we need your help
to make it happen and fight back.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1012&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]Derek,
will you rush a split contribution and help us protect our democracy from
the Republicans' plan to gerrymander?

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.vyxn5Y&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=8904%2E5257348%2EiR6NMI ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Beto =?iso-8859-13?q?O=FFRourke?=
subject: They’re trying to jail me to silence anyone who has the courage to fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
| | | |
---

name: Rep. Vikki Breese-Iverson
subject: They tried to take your kicker refund...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Vikki PAC ID #20022
body:
Session wrap-up, rural wins, wildfire policy, and how to help build a majority.
| [ ](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQ5dmyfwEg-if_tnmx5g5KcjtngkbqaUk9SiETS52ukv878osjO7ZHyxsPaCfauYcY01mIJ2Q82KggBjn-KPqrDkDEFqnVHEN_BD49Fe1onk16sT4ezmp53vepeAAUas_IXHZmHJ1g2gtk0JbRNZQD2S84BN8vvCZQ72Mm7-ksTm8X0)
---

Hi Friends and Neighbors! The 2025 legislative session is over, and I'm grateful for the chance to represent House District 59 and rural Oregon. My job is to protect our way of life, defend our values, and pour my everything into stopping the bad ideas continuously rolling out of Salem. This year, we saw major wins -- including stopping the largest Democrat tax increases in Oregon history -- and **we held the line on some of the worst bills**. It hasn't been easy, and the fight isn't over. **Stopping Massive Tax Increases** Portland Democrats pushed huge new tax hikes this year, spending more of your money on ineffective homelessness and drug programs that will not fix the problems their own policies have caused. Rural Oregonians don't want bigger government and higher taxes -- we want to be left alone to live our lives. | [Take the Survey About Kotek's Transportation Tax Increase](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQFkvcTm59htpXcDMpktjL-xHfE5DmvYkLnsT3rxV5pbSlmzt7b68xIfjH384vJujuAC81dlfjw6m_EZ7zvB0Hy0R_uyorPPlScROelOFMZXjzFuQU00XsEzTD4MG4nAs7RuIXkyWIlycEQktBOyjXUKsT-hEL2E2zhBU3BXpSq83ya-mVJ33vw2KmTG7pPLGmKA2)
---

**We stopped those tax grabs and protected your kicker refund** when they tried to take it for wildfire costs. Unfortunately, the one tax to get through was on oral nicotine products like Zyn. The money is supposed to go to fight wildfires. _(This tax makes no sense to me, as there is no indication Zyn users are the cause of wildfires.)_ Obviously, we do need better wildfire funding, but the answer isn't more taxes or taking your kicker. The answer is to fix how our forests are managed so we have fewer mega-fires and can use timber revenue to cover the costs when they do happen.
## **Key Victories for Rural Oregon**
**SB 83 - Repealing the Wildfire Maps**
**We repealed the flawed wildfire maps and mandates.** This was a win for all property owners. It required working with both sides and strong support from the Oregon Property Owners Association.
**HB 3329 - Supporting Volunteer Firefighters**
The Alder Springs and Cram fires hit close to home. Thanks to the Lower Bridge RFPA, homes and rangeland were saved. HB 3329 strengthens RFPAs statewide -- the backbone of wildfire protection in rural Oregon.
**Protecting Water Rights**
**We stopped extreme water fee hike** s at the Oregon Water Resources Department and added oversight to keep them accountable. I strongly opposed SB 1154 because it didn't protect agriculture or senior water rights. Rural advocacy forced major changes -- so much so the environmental and social justice groups backing it walked away. I call that a major win!
** Looking Ahead -- 2026 and Beyond **
You know me pretty well -- when it comes to working hard for Oregon, I'm pretty much unstoppable. And right now, I've got the data to show if we have the resources to run strong campaigns across the state, **Republicans could gain 3 -5 seats **next cycle.
**In the super-minority, we start out having our hands tied in almost every battle.** Picking up a handful of seats would stop so much bad policy before it starts and ensure fewer good bills die.
The Democrat machine is already raising money and gearing up to protect its majority. So the reality is, if we want to win, we need to get ready right now.
Early money is bigger money._**[Every dollar we raise now is worth $10 next fall.](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQb5mtER4OITwy1YgVuqBtEt_SsBjm9uPED9AsMmrZrcsGNEtU4wIoe7YbHTG9vTKf5m8yQQ4FYNNv4pkqJgoFIqQ66Hz520fH0Hy7T4IzJF_8HXDCsBU_G0l9l1LRFnmbGXUZG6tJRpiml9sIv_4QeqO3XTkmxTubaJHC44iEObid0)**_ This helps us reach voters, tell the truth about what's happening in Salem, and build the team we need to take those seats.
If you want rural Oregon to have a real voice and a fighting chance at stopping the next wave of bad ideas, I need you to join my team.
[Chip in Today!](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQb5mtER4OITwy1YgVuqBtEt_SsBjm9uPED9AsMmrZrcsGNEtU4wIoe7YbHTG9vTKf5m8yQQ4FYNNv4pkqJgoFIhg_SE0Akjv4zDS0jdUE2TAIQuKFWNh2x-1NDy1nPxknE7YFVTSVATg2gsOyoYZqDKEJvfa-ErQ9VNYroyy8F3ED0eNcSvJoTzYeHo73YbVOtA2)
---

Please **[chip in today](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQb5mtER4OITwy1YgVuqBtEt_SsBjm9uPED9AsMmrZrcsGNEtU4wIoe7YbHTG9vTKf5m8yQQ4FYNNv4pkqJgoFIoMdtbfXBpIpTCNMca3P8bD-Fvoax0O75dUNK6F9mWqxy9asvnUYJEATd1Ks42oIVqGX4AoMF9nmIQfFkCh1Ln261Kfhh4c5VGY9dSd358m9-g2)** so we can protect our values, our economy, and our way of life -- and build a Republican majority to finally start turning this state around.
Warmly,
**Representative Vikki Breese-Iverson**
Oregon House District 59
[ ](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQlnu1RaRjnOqRotrqeiPKRrDiJtz8Z0QjzFiXhBakAT_HyuRsFmYe8ALnCOjduwEsn3j37WPa3IsSW1MgeU4lH7AJqyTJKINg-Lw2WfIndHx4NZ8PzPvv7BhszD70u9SzcGTkj244caigS0OJ7UTaHlce8mz530A4XrhnN6eWngH00)

Friends of Vikki
PO Box 249, Prineville, OR 97754
[https://friendsofvikki.com](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQ5dmyfwEg-if_tnmx5g5KcjtngkbqaUk9SiETS52ukv878osjO7ZHyxsPaCfauYcY01mIJ2Q82KggBjn-KPqrDmnQEFqp7ExzoKsj1NUhc-iyVjqBopAfE5hg-1wwJ2a-dpY8YCIK7zXRQChaDtZoPUziYe5pm2Szw-DHm1KBatWApD_sowlL66FFfjUQQMtdsA2) [Click here to unsubscribe](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/unsubscribe?d=vZR-9RfscjKa8J5E1LUauyeEniQSznLEEP5gTw87Qk5aeK94g5QZZgnS8Yjac1Js_CfiDh8HLnYas0W_Nuiy96zeU6F7GSPPzoBU5ST_rcbT0) from Vikki's infrequent emails. name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: I just went on Joe Rogan’s Podcast
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
In 60 seconds, I revealed everything that’s wrong with Congress

| | | | [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zat8n9t7rbrqlbnnbpeeuf0te4usge5m1ib80260_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4o31cph2bs)
---

Hey Patriot,

It’s Rep. Anna Paulina Luna.

I just got done recording with Joe Rogan on his podcast, and had a blast!
I don’t care what people say – the American people deserve the truth, always.
**_[I could write it all out here, but I think this 60 second clip explains it best.>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh5msfvlp1ueb8shv62mjnjo5t1s41l3ef7nm8ro_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4o31cph2bs)_**

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z82f8fpapvcjto2ij0hrbcddic31usklg2hhvpd8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4o31cph2bs)
There are people out there who want to keep me quiet – that don’t want me to speak the truth to you.
As an American voter, you **DESERVE** the truth. I’ll always stand by that.
And for this belief in the American people, those same people are coming to keep me out of office – to silence me for good.
I’ve never folded under pressure, and **I NEVER WILL.**
**I say FIGHT, FIGHT, FIGHT!**
**FIGHT** for our rights as citizens. **FIGHT** against corruption in our system.
**FIGHT** for the truth.
What say you?
Patriot, I’ll level with you:

There are some very powerful people emerging from the shadows after this episode went public.
They’re pouring **MILLIONS** of dollars into my race to steal my seat and seal my silence.
I’ll **NEVER** give up on the fight – but I can’t do it alone.
[STAND WITH ME](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs8p7mm9me2q7unejfkb5lsas2e8lvluhqofsoko_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4o31cph2bs)
_I see who reads these messages I send._

I know you’ve always stood by me, even in the tough times, and I’ll never forget it.
I hate to ask from you, but they’ve left me no other choice.
Please, only if you can afford it right now, can you chip in whatever you can to help me keep fighting for you in Congress.
As long as I have you by my side, I know I’ll be unstoppable in picking apart the deep state – brick by brick.
God bless,

**Rep. Anna Paulina Luna**

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4of4rl2t5f8mhsf3fhkfnvfgtns5hsupe9qi68o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4o31cph2bs)
_American First. Always.
_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd59lc96f3np2jpp4i2maj7k2c1r74g3uljdsntg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4o31cph2bs)
|

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Hundreds of millions is coming to flip Texas blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I am personally asking you to act.

Friend, I wish I was reaching out with better news.

Colin Allred, the Democrat who ran against me last year, is back. He's running for the Senate in Texas again.

**[This means that hundreds of millions will be coming to Texas to flip our state blue, end our Senate majority, and cripple President Trump's America First agenda.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb8rbjg0vbjvcb7ahh8vuefqgbo2dqjms3ks7g00_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4p75c9h2bs)**

We stopped Colin Allred in 2024, thanks to the support of grassroots conservatives just like you.

**[Will you help us stop him again?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziphunu5do8o0q6ac6rd64vtiir2g5h2ks9glic8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4p75c9h2bs)**
[KEEP TEXAS RED](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zglodl8d6r0gniv9rm93vngph61vjaiiist23ifg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4p75c9h2bs)
**[I don't have to tell you what a disaster Colin Allred would be in the Senate.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z23kld90645k6m4qerjtnsl5fu55lnvsvh8tv4eg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4p75c9h2bs)** He'd vote in lockstep with Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie, and the rest of them.

The key to stopping him, though, is for conservatives to step up to make this guy a two-time loser now.

The more we raise now, the more we can focus on winning when the campaign picks up.

**[So, what do you say? Will you step up to help us keep Texas, Texas one more time?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zguevhhb7jglsa15of4pk8mis5vr2q4fbqpdt1vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im4p75c9h2bs)**

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Bombshell Video Dropping Soon – We Need Your Help to Keep Exposing the Truth!
body:
We have a bombshell video releasing very soon that you absolutely won't want to miss. In it, we'll be exposing a State Department official knowingly jeopardizing U.S. national security.

| [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zaah5h3hd1m740rtneoolhiscs9buivmfdt4us3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imaor6chh2bs)
[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvj9mg06macu6ei24vb2dk3h192sm0l7hnbhms5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imaor6chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

We're on the verge of something huge at O'Keefe Media Group (OMG).

**We have a bombshell video releasing very soon** that you absolutely won't want to miss.

In it, we'll be exposing a State Department official knowingly jeopardizing U.S. national security by blatantly ignoring State Department policy designed to keep America safe.

We've reached out to the State Department for comment and are waiting to hear back - **stay tuned, because this one is going to send shockwaves.**

But [**I need your donation today to finish this investigation**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkifou4hhdmqt79j4bh447r4vh2uirh7v6hm93qg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imaor6chh2bs) and another massive one we have in the works.

We're deep into another massive story that's set to break soon, one that will **shake up Washington** like never before.

To finish these investigations and bring you the unfiltered truth, [**I need your support now more than ever.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrn2juracr2lt0bbr0g8ucoab5luqbtkq4ues60o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imaor6chh2bs)

Here's the reality: Running OMG isn't easy or cheap.

**I have bills to pay, airfare to cover for our undercover operations, and film editors and researchers who need to be compensated for their incredible work.**

Our small staff is the heart and soul of what we do - a dedicated team of truth-seekers who work tirelessly, **seven days a week, at a breakneck pace** to uncover corruption and hold the powerful accountable.

These are everyday heroes: journalists, editors, and investigators who sacrifice family time, sleep, and personal lives to fight for transparency.

They've been with me through thick and thin, facing threats, legal battles, and endless obstacles. Without them, stories like this wouldn't see the light of day.

But right now, we're stretched thin, and [**your generosity is what keeps us going**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi0k3ge6sun2kv403q73u9fnudc371hmf9qq5n58_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imaor6chh2bs).

**By[**supporting OMG**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvj0ccvsua91f5uqiiaoaj8i4283potq4sjcvgq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imaor6chh2bs), you're not just donating - you're empowering a great staff to continue their vital mission and protect our nation's integrity.**

[**Will you stand with us today?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdlg9sn3q8mrkfok5spmtm056p1ij0eqild4ujug_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imaor6chh2bs)

Your contribution, no matter the size, will help us finalize these explosive stories and keep the pressure on. Please have our back by [**donating securely and make a real difference**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjop5oi278bai5bs3rbfutqmq46rtaqma1mhtlo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imaor6chh2bs).

Thank you so much for all that you do. I can't do this work without you.

Together, me you and the amazing men and women working hard at OMG, we're exposing the truth and changing the world. [**Help us keep going today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk8n5mrim7nss9b164d7vmhp6mbrq9l4lllf802o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imaor6chh2bs)

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: I just went on Joe Rogan’s Podcast
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
In 60 seconds, I revealed everything that’s wrong with Congress

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7c7pmoh6m344v85vejro2sl6bkvvb5dug3ie0qo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im6pb4c9h2bs)
---

Hey Patriot,

It’s Rep. Anna Paulina Luna.

I just got done recording with Joe Rogan on his podcast, and had a blast!
I don’t care what people say – the American people deserve the truth, always.
**_[I could write it all out here, but I think this 60 second clip explains it best.>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zisnplto6gbm2jtiif5o6ubdu5cj0duihgpjbncg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im6pb4c9h2bs)_**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7dgm7a131ldudn2n3kk34q1g60ks1674gg7u2ho_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im6pb4c9h2bs)
There are people out there who want to keep me quiet – that don’t want me to speak the truth to you.
As an American voter, you **DESERVE** the truth. I’ll always stand by that.
And for this belief in the American people, those same people are coming to keep me out of office – to silence me for good.
I’ve never folded under pressure, and **I NEVER WILL.**
**I say FIGHT, FIGHT, FIGHT!**
**FIGHT** for our rights as citizens. **FIGHT** against corruption in our system.
**FIGHT** for the truth.
What say you?
Patriot, I’ll level with you:

There are some very powerful people emerging from the shadows after this episode went public.
They’re pouring **MILLIONS** of dollars into my race to steal my seat and seal my silence.
I’ll **NEVER** give up on the fight – but I can’t do it alone.
[STAND WITH ME](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj52s5c8ffc4td8spfjpdskp3abobsffjea9l0i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im6pb4c9h2bs)
_I see who reads these messages I send._

I know you’ve always stood by me, even in the tough times, and I’ll never forget it.
I hate to ask from you, but they’ve left me no other choice.
Please, only if you can afford it right now, can you chip in whatever you can to help me keep fighting for you in Congress.
As long as I have you by my side, I know I’ll be unstoppable in picking apart the deep state – brick by brick.
God bless,

**Rep. Anna Paulina Luna**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgkoemsiie3duoo5us77793l85turuq8ob3rn0mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im6pb4c9h2bs)
_American First. Always.
_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znl6thhgk8ikbcfimjdl0903b7bei05775855l2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9im6pb4c9h2bs)
|

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zadit89qc4b45jsqmv8jt9677v99gtj256ughq3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imeob4cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zag7g700hmom3tqqg36ema3rmuhuupamgech3hto_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imeob4cdh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg1ql0r6vp1d93a1s7mtnsau8de6adiuubll14m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imeob4cdh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaad17v3cppve0u9l2ssftnu2jgdi3n3m0oj5ui0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imeob4cdh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm2vg3n14am662os7ao9j2n7h308rr2apeio6pt0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c9imeob4cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below: Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
Washington, D.C., Police Chief Pamela Smith has ordered [officers to share information with federal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGP4yAQhX8N7ohgwDgpKK6hy7VXWgTG9pzGxjIkUf79ylttv_WT3nvf9-8-3iMxbfPfuKJvUxk3fFfG1vAYc0ql7HjERmWLzI1WjMxxHUFBL9VV6n7Mkfgz2i77CRHQdOj10PfQg3GuW_wUEa1JOSlIrlcPbbNzVhu4pcENQ-7In23qqnutlFP2oh_KmskqY9wN06SFVZiplePyv9DWFpz4U154XFJZO_ZLa3sV5o-AICBwrC-cY63P7cwFhBNIQDhHBIT4nAUEbQWEnORemBLKtBBOMs4HYpWtyIy44yZ_0Ms3tUUKCN3h8_4mZqpuEFbNayT-ftJ-pe_l4SsAAP__l8eDTg) immigration authorities and provide transport for agents and detainees, a shift from the city's long-standing non-cooperation policy.

## DC Police to Increase Cooperation with ICE
Washington, D.C., Police Chief Pamela Smith has ordered [officers to share information with federal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGP4yAQhX8N7ohgwDgpKK6hy7VXWgTG9pzGxjIkUf79ylttv_WT3nvf9-8-3iMxbfPfuKJvUxk3fFfG1vAYc0ql7HjERmWLzI1WjMxxHUFBL9VV6n7Mkfgz2i77CRHQdOj10PfQg3GuW_wUEa1JOSlIrlcPbbNzVhu4pcENQ-7In23qqnutlFP2oh_KmskqY9wN06SFVZiplePyv9DWFpz4U154XFJZO_ZLa3sV5o-AICBwrC-cY63P7cwFhBNIQDhHBIT4nAUEbQWEnORemBLKtBBOMs4HYpWtyIy44yZ_0Ms3tUUKCN3h8_4mZqpuEFbNayT-ftJ-pe_l4SsAAP__l8eDTg) immigration authorities and provide transport for agents and detainees, a shift from the city’s long-standing non-cooperation policy. The move comes as President Trump’s 30-day [federal law enforcement takeover](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OozAUhZ8GOkf-BwoX26TLtluii30NXl1sZJxEefsRo3mDKY-OdHS-799jfkCilNe_sKNrscwZ3ydha1jn4H0pB1ZoqWQgamlHIIJ9llwaxkcmzBwg0WfWfXARUaLq0YnBGGmksrbfnJq0gGnSQS3LZDF6kGOI0ZthGUbQqk_uWuOjMIJzy_VNLFyrqLlSdkIfRac5htRKvf0vKbcNI33KC-vNl70nt7V2nJ3608l7J-9wXABXdYXakifs5P0N55by2kpmrT73g21lR8LzZPmHjq1PqIEdhZJHBjwoaaMPalDCG6u99MbacVJqNHbQfXXheCeidNqh03zdIdH3ofYriy8nvwIAAP__LzWF8Q) of the capital rolls out, with National Guard troops stationed at landmarks and checkpoints. Federal and local officers made 45 arrests Wednesday night, including 29 for immigration violations. Homeless encampments are being cleared, with officials saying removals will intensify in the coming days.
## Newsom Calls Vote on New Congressional Map
Gov. Gavin Newsom announced Thursday that [California will hold a Nov. 4 special election](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnDAQhp_GdF4ZG7i9wsVGEc3p0qRIiQYz3p1osJE9LLdvH5FXuG40v_RJ3_fnc_oEYkr3X7Cil5inhEdlFMEyLSHkvGEBoZyAWWhFYIZ1ssb22lx1208LEL-mrll8RLToGvTtW9_b3rphaB4eDAAadDMO12Cgi-07whzharo5uNk25E-aubZ9a8xguks7m87Fzjg3vGOIreoMLiS5XP5mSvLAyK_8xHIJeW3YP0S2qtxN2VHZ8TiOy1rTuSk7YtJ7VXY8pZQdt8wkFM7zDk9K-vznVTO8qs676ABMMZdEoAsuVKVQEEp3vTEkLVmHvCfBogW_oOqC2z4zBUgnEoq-3dqPr_ohyo050KLczx9nWzzqbyxbU_yyHcRMdXhTnbmvQPzfQr6V_untvwAAAP__bGOckw) seeking voter approval of a new congressional map designed to give Democrats five additional U.S. House seats in 2026. A recent poll found [64% of Californians oppose](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO2yAURp8Gb0QYjO1_YEjVukOVLh06WgQuyW2vAQENyttX7it0-6QjfdI5P2_7zSJhfHy3B5gW0h6hV4LWoOzeuZQyFNswRUvU8ABLZI9dCqm5WPmod2-R3vs0eBMAJKgBzLhoLbVU8zw8zX3V4kPY1XrlpbdaLMo7LZYA90WCgAHN-SbWUY9CzGK6jHcxqTAJpeYPcGFkkwCPLZXLr4SxPSHQO72gXFw6BjLP1nJl6srkxuTWe78cNZ6MyQ0i_1OZ3E4pJrecCBu6czpLGFKJaPkrNSiVd_RAb54LBCj8N0DG-OAYPWSIHmLjBTzWVtC1k2QbgXhORExutvDrdfzWv0xfmdqSQ8_U509nV-j1B5Q8FONzRyKs88Im8Tgs0j-D9l_ZX0b-DQAA___e7Jn7) Newsom's plan and want to keep the state’s independent redistricting commission, while 36% support returning map-drawing power to lawmakers.

The plan is aimed at countering a Texas GOP proposal to add five Republican seats, which prompted Texas Democrats to flee the state. They have said [they will return Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnwZ2jZQE7Lij-xl3-9kqL4CVwWkxkr5LL25-SV7h6Rp8083VZLqFw2W7_QyUvqS0bPQ8mEdqXNcbW7rQHKW0LzFIqBeZQFwR0PZx77ZY1FH4ttlt9IkIyHXk9OocOzTB02Y9R6zVqMzow04Aa9Qhxmq6AY3BptF3xbw3O2mmAAexJX8GaZMGYYaKYtLJAa5G2n75b2SRT4ld70H6KrXbss8j9UOafwlnhLJlyYX5nCufcKr0HKZwPCUL9M0jMCmdnHU5geqGfcPQr1Rb3IEefmKj_VBXO3e7X-7Mwl2MYlYVbDeUjd_Knqx4efwMAAP__Bax78A) if certain conditions are met.
## List: Most Dominant Industries by State
New data shows [real estate is the largest industry](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOrCAUQL8GOwygMFpQvMZuXruluYNXvRsUA3c0_v1m9he2PzknOV_P8QkUaV_-w4ae5zTueJWIzJjHKYSUDszAlHaIkWlDiBG20ShjpeqktuMEFO-xrSY_IxpsKvT6Ya2xpnGuWn2jOvuYQw-vvlc6OIMdqE4bQOe07UJF_mNTnbZaKafaWr9U28ytahrXY5i1aBVOxCnX34l2XnGOdzox1yFtVfQr81FE80-YQZjhuq76pPKGGOAghkiFP6AwQzmEGRiz0pJXlC9aFiwsaZ_ehfMtaZd4Yr5lYWAUZqiyn46LYqTiHqJVywYUf6v8p1WnNz8BAAD__4JdfjQ) in 26 states, including California, Florida, and most of the East Coast. Manufacturing ranks second, topping GDP in 13 states. Finance and insurance lead in just four states, including New York and South Dakota, while mining is dominant in three—Wyoming, West Virginia, and North Dakota. Government tops the economy in D.C. and Oklahoma, and just one state each is led by professional services (Massachusetts), information (Washington), or transportation (Alaska). name: Craig Riedel for State Senate
subject: Riedel Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel
body:
| | | | |
---
Riedel Campaign Update | August 15, 2025
---
Riedel Campaign Takes Part in Two County GOP Chicken Dinner Fundraisers
---
|
---
The Riedel Campaign was excited to be present at chicken BBQ fundraisers in Hancock and Putnam Counties. Between the two counties, the Riedel campaign was happy to help distribute over 600 chicken dinners to voters in the 1st District. Craig took the opportunity to talk with voters and share his vision for the 1st District.
---
|
---
Craig Spends Time at the Henry County Fair As fair season continues throughout the 1st Senate District, Craig is making it a priority to be at every county fair. Craig spent time at the Henry County Fair talking with voters in the Republican booth, enjoying the new Ag building, and walking in the Tomato Festival Parade.

---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Craig & Danette Visit Paulding County
Craig and Danette attended a Paulding County Women's Club meeting where Craig was invited to speak. Craig talked about property tax relief, restoring accountability to our state government, and how Ohio's best days are still to come.
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Parade Season in Fulton County
With parades and festivals going on all over the 1st Senate District, Craig and Danette appreciated the opportunity to visit several communities in Fulton County. They both walked in the Delta Chicken Festival Parade, Wauseon Homecoming Parade, and Swanton Corn Festival Parade.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
# Craig Attends Parades Across Hancock County

In July and early August, Craig and Danette enjoyed spending time in communities all across Hancock County. They walked in the Arlington Homecoming Parade, McComb Cookie Parade, and the Vanlue Festival Parade. They also took the opportunity to meet and talk with voters at the festivals that followed.
---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
| |
---
| Craig and Danette at Sherwood Wing Festival
Back in Defiance County, Craig was honored to be a judge at the "Sher'Wing Thing" wing tasting contest. The festival took place in downtown Sherwood where Craig and Danette were able to join in the festivities with friends and voters from the 1st District.

| |
---
| |

name: Governor Kathy Hochul
subject: Texas redistricting is a 'legal insurrection.'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This isn’t just a Texas issue. When Republicans rig congressional maps in one state, it weakens representation in every state.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7602d267-5c78-4ff7-8911-3e7007a6f911/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, this is Governor Kathy Hochul. Texas Republicans are trying to steal five seats and rig the next election for Trump. Fairness, representation, and freedom are on the line. I’m fighting back, Peter. [Split a contribution between me and Blue Amp Action to help defend our democracy and stand up to the Republicans rigging the system. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T840a6f7f-6e6a-4b37-bebb-d86cc7cee54f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | I wrote an op-ed for the Houston Chronicle about the latest stunt from Texas Republicans: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc88f4872-de63-4fc6-b4f9-f8c2ebdef885/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) What Texas is doing isn't a clever strategy, it’s political arson — torching our democracy to cling to power. The only viable recourse is to fight fire with fire. This isn’t just a Texas issue. When Republicans rig congressional maps in one state, it weakens representation in every state. Every unfair seat they create tilts Congress further out of balance. If they get away with it now, 2026 will be the first of many stolen elections. I may be Governor of New York, but I will not sit on the sidelines with timid souls and merely watch while Republicans dismantle democracy. That’s not who we are. And that is certainly not the leadership that this moment calls for. [I need you on my side to help protect our democracy. This is about our values: fairness, freedom, and representation. Make a contribution to my campaign and Blue Amp Action to stand up for these values. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45ee1a49-d052-4818-9443-260c74cbdcc7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. Texas is home to six of the 10 ZIP codes with the [most new residents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2SqzAQBODTQCaXRmYEBApe4swv3ZASaDBTKxArTfnv9Fv4Cpt28HVXf12Hq-fI2-2_X8nJc07DRo8SSYTysCQRKvLmfUqByui_Kb_SY6PBaINKdwpwCJ7ja2jq4EYdeqjJQYtoEG3b1YujvpnPYEacoLXBjADBg-00TqPXtsWa3YHpDhBAA9gTNXPABidrgfp-pKrRFFhSPslCQk9f5vhKd8qnKa11dIvIXqrzv8pcKnP5eR9xZS6SdvXmXX2mK79S5slvRflMak133m5Kkjq66-zC_uAYudi2avRt9Rw_uPztkrszvwEAAP__8hV2Nw) this year, according to a recent analysis from MovingPlace. ## House Democrats Issue Demands
An Illinois judge ruled Wednesday that local law enforcement [does not have the authority](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAURL_GdDeyHQykcJGGZvVeuyUy-Bq8MTZrX0KyX78iv_C6kUaaOTO_v4Yv44OP87dZUdPLpSHiUQISYR6WRISF_vltShbLaB6Y3-mIOEguFfAOhBqs8eE91JXVI7c3UaEWrVJSqabtqkU3Dq3jteE30TVYS8XNeJ3E1XWTtW3bVl6fYbwTSgguRHPB2llVq6lpBN5uI7Kao_WU8oUWJHyZ4sI7PTFfprRWQS9EW2HXO5M9k_1xHJe1xNNjsscIe2GyP0cx2X-0D8HH5Av82e2MkPeABcxsfCwED4ywmRelCD7C4gugcykTUILFPBE-ALCkvSBYXAuYnLEQWiZ7k-F-F7_o7_5dZW2346wqTctqPq_Ghw8w_ezmp5b_AwAA__-UaZV2) to arrest Texas House Democrats staying in the state, thwarting Attorney General Ken Paxton’s effort to enforce civil arrest warrants for the absent lawmakers. The Texas House Democratic Caucus [announced Thursday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-SsyAUxZ9GOxwuCkpB8TXp8rVbOiiXyAQlA3dDsk-_Y15h29-cP3PO13W-2hDDcftvdzT08mk-sJaIRJjnLRFhoZ_wWJPDstg75neqB86CC8n4xEDOzob4nofWmYU7DS0aGKUUUqpxajfjda8XLVWvtfIWHYIftXfe96sVYKc2mDOMTyABOIDqcPBODnJVClDrBZuBowuUckcbEr5s8fGdnpi7Ne1tNBvRozT9v0ZcGnGptXbnhIp4PwWNuHw8zOGe1mypsIxPtJHFUOik9nAno-98hOPGCllCJgD6EaY2G_eoIcZQ1NgM_LbbED-99Le3nkb8BgAA__95ZIHB) that its members would return to Texas after the special session adjourns and new congressional maps for California are introduced, saying they had "fought back ferociously and took the fight to Trump across America." Speaker Dustin Burrows and Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick [previously announced](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHyoyAYxJ8GOxwgAlpQXGOXa690UD4DExRGvgS9p79JmnuAf7s7u7P7-3Of7jbEsD9-2w0MnmuadqglAiIck0-IUPBvyEtyUGb7hONKdYdJMCEp6ymXk7MhXlPXODMzN_AGDNdSCimV7htv5pXdFNcgVs6UWwc79EwtelbQa62HpQnmU8Z6LjlnnKsWutXJTi5KcRiGGUjHwAVMR4seEE5b1nilNxztkrYmGo-YC7n9ImIkYqy1ts_T7h-TiPHzhojxG6M5xYBh-S_49CpAHWxpOSwWWuxFq7dIvc0Z9kJ3OJGGQl-ZYqJ2nhMiEWNzGJdriDEUpUnHHpsN8TsHfwbxbcS_AAAA__-h8YmL) they would adjourn the special session today if the Texas House still lacks a quorum. Yesterday, California Gov. Gavin Newsom [announced a special election](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2uniAYhK8GdxhAQF2waNK4O013XRqEVyUfgoH3-7FX39hbONt5kicz8-dr_rIhhrT9sgcY_Kx5TvCuERChzHtGhIp_w-myh7rYB5QrvxPMgglF2UC5mr0N8Zpl483C_MgbMLxXSiil-6HZDfSdd0ovwkquwDI2LM4tnYbBr3y0vgnmlrGBK84Z57oFuXolldOawzguQCQDHzCXFndA-Ni6xiu_oLQuH000O-JZSfeDiImIyS7uXtBu-cZETL9zDBhcJWK6QT7oYR9AbUr5mRwckJAW8KFiCQ5D2qhdEQrFvYBFSHcCyVMsz-O8LRVzuUg3BU-6n1xIrbiUfVOMP98hxlB1TyTbDhvi_4b4vV9fRvwLAAD__9FtkDM) for this November on new congressional maps. Meanwhile, Sen. John Cornyn has asked the Department of Justice to [investigate groups](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAUhZ8Gd0RwA_4pKLZxN9tuafFzGTMhxgs38WSffuW8wnRHOtJ39J0_H8uHTTltn7_tHQ19x7JseLSMRFiXtRBho39p9yVgc_aG9VWODRcQoLkYudRLsCm_FtUF40SYZIdGDlqD1v0wdquRcI0W8DqFqHQcpcSrV0KIwU2gXHBdMidMjFJLKaTsL6hi0Er7vpc4TQ6ZEhgSlXqhFQm_bYv5VZ5YL77cu2xWor2x6y8GM4P5OI7L7fnAs2Qw20rJZ2Qwn14M5r3kRMmfse3ok828YWupbAzmr7Ju3Je6vTYeyhev-PeBjfh7lQe8F18tNe6QCi-8lke9nWzoJz6As3G0glvvLVdqCNzZiLwfAJQdhYjad9WE_Ug5p9YPTInPu035rUE_O_9p4H8AAAD__2mdmmA) affiliated with Beto O’Rourke and George Soros to determine if they are "acting in violation of federal public corruption and election laws" by supporting the quorum-breaking Democrats.
## Arlington Pays off AT&T Stadium
The city of Arlington will pay off its $325 million bond for AT&T Stadium today, a decade ahead of schedule, [saving taxpayers $150 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHS2yAQRk-DuvUAFlgqVKRR96dNqVnBYjHBWg2sf1s5fca5Qi7wfe-9X1_LF-aS9_tPfNAk78TLTq9WSITqsrEINfmTj8CR2oq_qZ782mmx2jrQAxi3RMzlXPouTquOo-loMjfnrHP-NnTblAbv1tGk6I2-Xs3aez0ONBoTkXwIty5PnzE9GGeMNsZfqE_R9S54b2gcV1K9ppiF60U2EnpjS-Xkb6qXwI-uTJvI0dT1h7KzsnPiKi-uslU6uMqF613Z-XOh7KwHZWdjlZ2xfqyFd2gkIAwHnsApAYpAE4z5-YDAe5P6DJJ5h0irQKo54gm48lMAIVLASIAbYQRO0MJG8VlI2bmrUzxeuZTc_E31-v7AXP4Ry_91_p7s3wAAAP__9iWUfQ) in interest. The Dallas Cowboys have played their home games in the $1.2 billion stadium since 2009. Voters [approved the 30-year bond](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2uozAUxfHVmC7I11_gwsVII7pMOyUy-DpY42CEr-Iwq3_K28JrTnOkX_H_e5_vPuW0P_74Jzp6xzLv2GpGIjznrRBhpf_pWEvAuvh_eF6l7TgLLvSNjzfQc_ApX7Pqglt4sNChg0FrobUZxm5zPoaglLQc4iJRWxjkuvpRojFrjGi65D4YH0EDcADTo4pBK70aA2jtgkxxDInK2dOGhG9fY77KC89-Lc8uu43oqEz-YmJiYmqt9ViP_XMyMe0xfxZbZWKqVM6LySkFJn-DBWVH6E4XjpZyTtUMTPHH06f8LdPPeryc-AoAAP__otN0SA) in 2004, and the city has paid over $490 million in principal, interest, and fees since it was issued the following year. It was intended to pay for half of the cost to build the stadium, with the Cowboys picking up the balance. Voters approved a half-cent sales tax increase, a 2% hotel occupancy tax, and a 5% rental car tax to pay the debt. Those taxes will remain in effect and be redirected to payments for Globe Life Field, home of the Texas Rangers, as voters [authorized in 2017](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL8GMyxggNGA4CVm89INratcRmpRLLg7jvv1W-4vbNZBV3ed8_EYHxBT3J7_YUVH75DHDY-akAjLuGQirPQd9zl7rBN8YjnzseGohDJcdFya0UNM56gb7ybhe9mgk3djlDH23jWLU9AbUHMwAbSX2KlJgw9hEvYGwcqpie4aE500UgopbYs6eKPNbK3Evp-QaYE-Ui4tLUj4hhrSmV9Y2jmvTXIL0V7Z7R9TA1PDcRxtyG99YVwFpoYrMjVAuUApb3yHs_IcAgciXgl8_Fo5Qkknr_DCyqURK48bYcFKTXF-P2JKsdo70-K5Qky_3_Q3Yy-nfgIAAP__rSmDoQ). AT&T Stadium [hosted Super Bowl XLV](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OhCAUBeCnwQ4DCP4UFNvYzbZbmqtcBrIoRm7GcZ9-477C1ic5J9_5ekwPiCluz09Y0dLb52nDsyQkwmMKmQgL_cR9yQ7LDN94XPnccFJCGS56Ls3kIKZr0pWzs3CDrNDKzhhlTNv1VbA9YufF3MwDaA2D97KRptPG98swCwFVtHeZ6KWRUkjZ1qi9M9osbStxGGZkWqCLlI-aAhK-ofh05Rce9ZLXKtlAtBfWfDA1MjWe51lfEHK-U6bGm8PUGGDfcUPHExTiFFfkcNxwyhsPuRA6LjsttGobXQdaU3VYt58xpVjajmnxXCGmv0n631Evq34DAAD__9wQfkc) in 2011, when the Green Bay Packers defeated the Pittsburgh Steelers. Next year, it will host [nine World Cup matches](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLESnCAURb8GOxxAECko0tht2pTOEx4rExRHX9Y1X5_Z_YW0987cuef8ekwPyCVvz5-woqd3qtOG11mQCI9pqUR40t-8hxrxnOE3Hne9NpyUUIaLgUszRcjlnnQT_Syikw16aY1RxvR2aBaPNjlws-gwIQZjZoO20zZgcNIpoZrsP2NikEZKIWXfok7RaBP6XqJzMzItMGaqR0sLEr7hTOWuLzzaUNem-IVoP1n3g6mRqfG6rvZKAJ-SqREOyqEgU-NaN7y_yYeX6sZ3uHlNiQMRPwli_rPyiDMxNarBcmnMAJ22XCbZc22k5CCE5RBnpUJCEYVrDh_3K5eSz94yLZ4r5PL9Rf9n8-XVvwAAAP__kiKH1w).
## Texas Dominates Nation's Hottest ZIP Codes
Texas is home to six of the 10 ZIP codes with the [most new residents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2SqzAQBODTQCaXRmYEBApe4swv3ZASaDBTKxArTfnv9Fv4Cpt28HVXf12Hq-fI2-2_X8nJc07DRo8SSYTysCQRKvLmfUqByui_Kb_SY6PBaINKdwpwCJ7ja2jq4EYdeqjJQYtoEG3b1YujvpnPYEacoLXBjADBg-00TqPXtsWa3YHpDhBAA9gTNXPABidrgfp-pKrRFFhSPslCQk9f5vhKd8qnKa11dIvIXqrzv8pcKnP5eR9xZS6SdvXmXX2mK79S5slvRflMak133m5Kkjq66-zC_uAYudi2avRt9Rw_uPztkrszvwEAAP__8hV2Nw) this year, according to a recent analysis from MovingPlace. The Lone Star State dominated the company's compilation of the nation's 100 hottest ZIP codes, with 29 on the list. body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Bondi: If you fire the guy who threw a sandwich at a cop, you damn well better fire the guy who tried to get cops killed.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8396cfb6-3371-4380-8b3d-7b3b27b957b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1099126-a7cd-4608-8081-aeb7ccb86900/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After finding out that a guy who threw a sandwich at a cop worked for the Department of Justice, Attorney General Pam Bondi fired him, [exclaiming](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21389b6e-e957-485a-b312-488cd92b7745/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), _" If you touch any law enforcement officer, we will come after you... "I just learned that this defendant worked at the Department of Justice — NO LONGER. Not only is he FIRED, he has been charged with a felony."_ **Well, if the sandwich thrower has to go,[this guy](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3cdc1c6-2aa4-40bf-aeee-30fe9d8d9071/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) sure as hell needs to go too:** _" Less than five years after urging rioters to "kill" police at the Capitol, a former Jan. 6 defendant is working as a senior adviser for the Department of Justice .... [in the transcript] he acknowledged that he repeatedly yelled "kill 'em" as officers were being attacked" _ Worse yet, they actually [praised](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40fc929e-39e6-41a3-b592-2194d6bd82da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) the guy: _" A Department of Justice spokesperson said in a statement, "Jared Wise is a valued member of the Justice Department and we appreciate his contributions to our team."_ [**This is nuts. Add your name: Tell Bondi if the sandwich thrower is being fired, this guy needs to too.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc90708f5-6abf-4a43-adcd-87b5a14a7220/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

Well, if the sandwich thrower has to go, sure as hell needs to go too: " Less than five years after urging rioters to "kill" police at the Capitol, a former Jan. 6 defendant is working as a senior adviser for the Department of Justice .... [in the transcript] he acknowledged that he repeatedly yelled "kill 'em" as officers were being attacked" Worse yet, they actually the guy: " A Department of Justice spokesperson said in a statement, "Jared Wise is a valued member of the Justice Department and we appreciate his contributions to our team." | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

subject: Trump is going AFTER PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We wouldn’t reach out if it wasn’t urgent:
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS:**

We’re reaching to Democrats who have not added their signature to our exclusive petition to stand with PBS in the face of MAGA attacks, sent on _August 5th, 2025._

**Trump will do ANYTHING to stop Americans from knowing the truth about his ILLEGAL overhaul of our government — _so we’re fighting back:_**

[**Please confirm your signature is submitted before tonight’s midnight deadline:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH PBS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu)
---
**\- - - - - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - - - -**

Trump is threatening _any_ news organization that is willing to speak truth to his MAGA lies — [**_so now we need emergency assistance to save PBS »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu)
**Folks, we know Trump will do ANYTHING to stop Americans from knowing the truth about his ILLEGAL overhaul of our government.**

_That’s why he’s wasting HIS time and OUR taxpayer dollars to go after PBS!_

[**Team, we still need 100 signatures from your state to reach conclusive data: Will you add your name to STAND WITH PBS? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu)
[25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH PBS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu)
---
Folks, it’s absolutely CRITICAL that Democrats are willing to stand with PBS in the face of ESCALATING MAGA attacks. **This fight is only going to get worse.**

_That’s why we’re calling on you to sign our urgent petition standing with PBS:_

[**Without 100 signatures, we can’t keep up in this fight: Please, friend, will you add your name to our time-sensitive petition to stand with PBS? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu)
[ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH PBS IN THE FACE OF ESCALATING MAGA ATTACKS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu)
---
***** 100 TOP DEMOCRATS URGENTLY NEEDED *****

Thank you for doing your part!
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20943%2E878179%2E2Bswiu) to request fewer emails. Peter,
**Step one:** Trump demands a new congressional map to help “pick up five seats.”
**Step two:** Texas lawmakers redraw district lines behind closed doors.
**Now, they’re trying to force through step three:** Rushing through this extreme gerrymander to secure unearned power in the 2026 midterms.
It’s absolutely essential that we fight this with everything we’ve got. The effort we make today will send a message to the rest of the country that the American people won’t stand for an authoritarian power grab.

subject: Good News & Bad News
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Thanks to this team, Mark hasn’t missed a single fundraising goal in 2025.
#

Team, good news and bad news.
**The good news:** Thanks to this team, Mark hasn’t missed a single fundraising goal in 2025.
**The bad news:** We’re behind in August, and not by a little bit. Far enough behind that even the last several strong months of fundraising won’t be enough to make up the gap.
We’re not 100% sure why, but we have a few ideas. We know times are tough. We know it's summer. And we know some people just can’t stay engaged with so much happening every single day.
We get that, really. And we don’t expect any of our supporters to chip in to every email we send. That would be crazy.
But to stay on track, we do need the people who support Mark and really understand how important he is to chip in — when the time is right, and when they can afford it.
Today is one of those days. And we’re asking you, humbly:
[**Please, if you’re able, make a donation of $3 or whatever you can afford to continue powering Mark Kelly’s work to combat the worst of Trump and his Administration.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug25/.JGniHS&refcode=em250815-1-700&t=1&akid=6151%2E6688874%2EP3Q3Wa)

Thank you so much,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

# **DHS debuts high-profile ICE vehicle fleet with Trump 's name on them**
The Department of Homeland Security **[launched a fleet of newly branded Immigration and Customs Enforcement vehicles](https://substack.com/redirect/ef38bbfb-9643-4d51-8d7d-83116f04cf4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** featuring dark navy SUVs and pickups with red and gold striping, large "ICE" lettering, "Defend the Homeland" slogans, and prominent "President Donald J. Trump" emblems on the rear.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ef38bbfb-9643-4d51-8d7d-83116f04cf4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **[Professional rollout video goes viral](https://substack.com/redirect/ef38bbfb-9643-4d51-8d7d-83116f04cf4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with recruitment message** \- A professionally produced video featuring the fleet driving past D.C. landmarks like the Lincoln Memorial and Capitol, set to DaBaby's rap track "TOES," garnered nearly 200,000 views within hours and included recruitment links to JOIN.ICE.GOV.
* **Fleet launch coincides with federal D.C. crime crackdown** \- The rollout occurs as Trump temporarily assumed control of D.C.'s Metropolitan Police Department for 30 days, with ICE agents joining DEA, FBI, and National Guard forces to reinforce patrols and man city checkpoints in the nation's capital.
* **DHS reports significant enforcement gains under Trump administration** \- Secretary Kristi Noem's office cited a 93% decline in border encounters, near halt to illegal migration through Panama's Darien Gap, over 100,000 ICE job applications since the "Defend the Homeland" campaign began, and more than 352,000 arrests since January.

* * *
# Trump to meet with Putin today in Alaska - Here's what you need to know
President Donald Trump is set to meet with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Alaska, Friday, for Ukraine peace talks. The high-stakes summit will take place at Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson in Anchorage starting at 3:30 PM EST, featuring a one-on-one meeting with interpreters, followed by a working lunch with delegations and a joint press conference.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8872b1a9-b27b-438b-90ab-5402583be240?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Meeting aims to assess Putin's seriousness about ending 3-year war** \- Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Trump wants to "look at this guy across the table" and make a face-to-face assessment after months of unproductive phone calls, with Trump believing he'll "know very quickly" if Putin will make a deal.
* **Ukrainian President Zelenskyy excluded but potential follow-up meeting planned** \- Trump faces criticism for not including Zelenskyy or European leaders, but says if talks go well he'll "call President Zelenskyy and the European leaders" for a second meeting, while Zelenskyy met with British PM Starmer Thursday to discuss possible outcomes.
* **Economic incentives and sanctions on the table if talks fail** \- While discussions may include economic cooperation to help Russia shed its pariah status, Trump warns of "very severe consequences" and additional sanctions if negotiations fail, assessing only a 25% chance of talks failing while calling the process "like chess."

* * *

He gets exposed on live T.V. and it's hard to watch... | | | Aug 15 | | | | | | | | | | | | CNBC's Andrew Ross Sorkin during a tense live interview for claiming to support "free markets" while just minutes earlier expressing support for socialist Zohran Mamdani. He wasn't expecting to actually be held accountable for his words and didn't know what to do... Interest rates are up... Inflation is still hurting millions... The national debt is over $36 TRILLION... And global trade tensions are boiling over. You don't have to be an economist to know this could all end badly for retirement savers. That's why I just released a brand-new report: | | ---|---|--- In this , I'll show you: The early warning signs we're seeing (and what happened the last time) What my father taught me about true diversification And how assets like gold and silver have helped me weather the storm during past downturns This is not about panic. It's about preparation. And if you want to help protect your family's future, you should read this now. 👉 DHS debuts high-profile ICE vehicle fleet with Trump 's name on them The Department of Homeland Security featuring dark navy SUVs and pickups with red and gold striping, large "ICE" lettering, "Defend the Homeland" slogans, and prominent "President Donald J. Trump" emblems on the rear. | | ---|---|--- with recruitment message \- A professionally produced video featuring the fleet driving past D.C. landmarks like the Lincoln Memorial and Capitol, set to DaBaby's rap track "TOES," garnered nearly 200,000 views within hours and included recruitment links to JOIN.ICE.GOV. Fleet launch coincides with federal D.C. crime crackdown \- The rollout occurs as Trump temporarily assumed control of D.C.'s Metropolitan Police Department for 30 days, with ICE agents joining DEA, FBI, and National Guard forces to reinforce patrols and man city checkpoints in the nation's capital. DHS reports significant enforcement gains under Trump administration \- Secretary Kristi Noem's office cited a 93% decline in border encounters, near halt to illegal migration through Panama's Darien Gap, over 100,000 ICE job applications since the "Defend the Homeland" campaign began, and more than 352,000 arrests since January. Trump to meet with Putin today in Alaska - Here's what you need to know President Donald Trump is set to meet with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Alaska, Friday, for Ukraine peace talks. The high-stakes summit will take place at Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson in Anchorage starting at 3:30 PM EST, featuring a one-on-one meeting with interpreters, followed by a working lunch with delegations and a joint press conference. | | ---|---|--- Meeting aims to assess Putin's seriousness about ending 3-year war \- Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Trump wants to "look at this guy across the table" and make a face-to-face assessment after months of unproductive phone calls, with Trump believing he'll "know very quickly" if Putin will make a deal. Ukrainian President Zelenskyy excluded but potential follow-up meeting planned \- Trump faces criticism for not including Zelenskyy or European leaders, but says if talks go well he'll "call President Zelenskyy and the European leaders" for a second meeting, while Zelenskyy met with British PM Starmer Thursday to discuss possible outcomes. Economic incentives and sanctions on the table if talks fail \- While discussions may include economic cooperation to help Russia shed its pariah status, Trump warns of "very severe consequences" and additional sanctions if negotiations fail, assessing only a 25% chance of talks failing while calling the process "like chess."
