| Dear Peter, Last summer over 1,500 “Good Trouble” inspired rallies took place nationwide—dozens right here in Tennessee—honoring John Lewis’ legacy and standing against attacks on civil rights. Tennesseans haven’t slowed down, and today, 54% of Nashville residents say our local leaders should challenge the state whenever it overreaches into local affairs.
Your House Democratic Caucus leads this fight against state overreach by:
* Filing bills to restore local control.
* Fighting Republican legislation to interfere in our local governments.
* Suing to block unconstitutional bills like partisan gerrymandering.

We can't do this without your help. Your support is crucial.
Join the fight. Your $20 donation right now helps ensure every Tennessean’s voice is heard at the ballot box.
Together, let’s keep causing Good Trouble.

name: Chris Murdock
subject: Join us to fight back - you’re invited!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee [contact us](mailto:info@ourtenn
body:
On August 21 DCCC Chairwoman is talking Tennessee

| | | | | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fourtenn.org%2F/1/010f0198ade381ad-9316a952-2c04-4fe8-bd0f-93f43e60af0d-000000/dDrVxwg00hdEO7Gt4PE_oo12RHA=224)
---
Hello Peter,
---
| | You’re invited to an upcoming virtual Tennessee Political Update with the DCCC on Thursday, August 21, from 12:00 PM - 12:45 PM ET on zoom.
This is a great opportunity to hear directly from DCCC Chairwoman Suzan DelBene about how House Democrats plan to fight against the Trump agenda here in Tennessee and across the country.
[_[RSVP Here →]_](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fact.dccc.org%2Fa%2F2025tnpol/1/010f0198ade381ad-9316a952-2c04-4fe8-bd0f-93f43e60af0d-000000/DgzSIocCzZVOAhRSaGTKrIoNsLI=224)
You can reach out to me at [_cmurdock@gmail.com_](mailto:cmurdock@gmail.com) if you have any questions about the event.
Let’s keep Tennessee moving forward.
---
In solidarity,
Chris Murdock
Our Tennessee Future PAC Team
---
| [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fx.com%2FOurTennPac/1/010f0198ade381ad-9316a952-2c04-4fe8-bd0f-93f43e60af0d-000000/af7ylRnw3H6PFBNY5YN1NdicMe0=224) | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FOurTennesseeFuture/1/010f0198ade381ad-9316a952-2c04-4fe8-bd0f-93f43e60af0d-000000/45SI5DMzxrtrMAdvnDVgYtbRJ0Y=224) | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fourtennpac%2F/1/010f0198ade381ad-9316a952-2c04-4fe8-bd0f-93f43e60af0d-000000/kt5mDZzMD1qhzONvK-tqM5GT9q0=224) | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.ourtenn.org%2F/1/010f0198ade381ad-9316a952-2c04-4fe8-bd0f-93f43e60af0d-000000/o0iGT6WjerEfbeWyr_vx923cK9k=224)
---|---|---|---
_Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight._
---

This is a great opportunity to hear directly from DCCC Chairwoman Suzan DelBene about how House Democrats plan to fight against the Trump agenda here in Tennessee and across the country. [[RSVP Here →]]() You can reach out to me at mailto:cmurdock@gmail.com if you have any questions about the event. Let’s keep Tennessee moving forward. In solidarity, Chris Murdock Our Tennessee Future PAC Team | | | | ---|---|---|--- Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight. | "Donate" | | | Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee mailto:info@ourtenn.org | | 901B Coral Road Nashville, Tennessee 37204 USA

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “So help me God”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1698895/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvcGVVVkdKYTZDVQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTU/LbmNsWWxxU21lQQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNMRVlJWHBOVWw2cHlscw/gaJ81Fw/s0q6b11a1bd)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
**_“So help me God.”_**
---
On May 20, 1981, I raised my right hand and took an oath to defend the Constitution against all enemies, _foreign and domestic._
---
**So when President Trump asked me to serve as his lawyer and fight for his freedom and justice,_I did not hesitate even for a second!_ **
---
I took an oath: Justice _had_ to be done – _no matter the price_.
---
_And now, I’ve learned the price._
---
**I’m staring down a 20-year prison sentence in a case where the President _legally_ cannot issue a pardon to save me.**
---
**And after 52 YEARS of faithfully serving the law,_ALL_ of my law licenses have been taken away from me as a way to stop me from defending myself in court.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, _my ONLY chance was to hire a top-notch defense team_.**
---
_But through legal warfare, the Left pushed me to the brink of**BANKRUPTCY** – at one point, my Social Security and bank accounts were even FROZEN._
---
_President Trump once said that I had “guts” for defending him against the vengeful and bloodthirsty Deep State._
---
Truth be told, that wasn’t about courage – that was me simply honoring my oath.
---
**_But what I’m about to do right now will truly take guts..._**
---
_God knows I hate this, but I’m about to ask for your help._
---
Patriot, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea – _a Hail Mary_ – to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
**_No matter what happens, I’m holding on to the final words of my oath: “ _So help me God_ ”._**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my own freedom and justice**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: can I count on you Derek?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113364362/563533875/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmViNGVlZC1kYjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYPt7-zfZPlxXVy2UlPpJ-6M3T_SNxGKfx9S-1Q5vOk=&emci=e28856d5-2379-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=86eb4eed-db79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894) Hey Derek, my team and I are already gearing up for another competitive race in 2026, and we need your help to ensure we have what it takes to defend this battleground seat. [**Can I count on you to chip in before our midnight deadline to help reach our mid-month fundraising goal and defend PA-17?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113364365/563533877/-898016266?refcode=email_081525_mmfr2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmViNGVlZC1kYjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYPt7-zfZPlxXVy2UlPpJ-6M3T_SNxGKfx9S-1Q5vOk=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113364370/563533886/-898016266?refcode=email_081525_mmfr2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmViNGVlZC1kYjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYPt7-zfZPlxXVy2UlPpJ-6M3T_SNxGKfx9S-1Q5vOk=)
---
I know 2026 feels far off, but we need to start preparing now if we’re going to protect this seat and help Democrats take back the House.
In the last election, I was one of the most targeted incumbents in one of the toughest battleground districts in the country. Now, I’m the ONLY Democrat defending a battleground seat in Pennsylvania— _so Republicans think they can flip this seat._
We need to prove them wrong, and that starts with showing that we have a grassroots team on our side and the resources to fight back against anything they throw at us.
We’re just hours away from our midnight deadline, and just $883 short of our fundraising goal.

Hi Peter,

We wanted to draw your attention to a disturbing incident that recently happened in the Colorado state legislature.

It has come to our attention that earlier this year, as Colorado state Representative, Yara Zokaie was waiting to address the chamber before a final vote on one of her bills, her Republican colleague, Rep. Ryan Armagost snapped a photo of her without her knowledge or permission.

According to _Colorado Public Radio_ , **he immediately posted the image in a group chat with the rest of the Republican House caucus, where several lawmakers made comments about her outfit,** “comparing her to a prostitute and stripper.”

At the time, Ryan Armagost was serving as **chair of the House Workplace Harassment Committee.**

**Keep reading. It gets worse.**

Within an hour, the photo ended up on an “anonymous social media account with conservative followers.” It was posted a second time with the caption “Smash or Pass,” and the photo has continued to circulate online.

“The messages very quickly escalated from name-calling and vulgar remarks about my appearance and what people wanted to do to me, to threats against my family, my children, death threats, rape threats,” Zokaie told _CPR News_. “Things got to a point where my staff needed to rotate who would check our messages because it was traumatizing to hear some of the things that people were saying.”

Zokaie said the level of harassment she’s experienced from the photograph isn’t something anyone should have to put up with just because they want to serve their community. It led her to take safety precautions and request security for her home and at her son’s elementary school after someone sent a threat about the school.

**We want to make something very clear.**

Women who run for office have to deal with significantly more abuse than their male counterparts. This is the very reason we named our organization HER BOLD MOVE. Because we saw the bravery and boldness required of a woman who steps up to lead.

People respond to our emails on a regular basis, asking why we only offer support for women candidates. The answer is simple: **_it can often be dangerous for a woman to run for office_** – and the women who do it anyway are heroes. But if women candidates are not properly supported, fewer of them will run for office and, consequently, fewer women will be in the rooms where decisions are made.

**Our work is CRITICAL. Women need and deserve support – because women constituents need and deserve adequate representation. THAT is what we are fighting for each and every day at HER BOLD MOVE. We hope you’ll join us.**

[**If you are as angry as we are about this story, you can join our effort to support women in government by chipping in $20.25 or more today.

We offer tailored support to pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates, and that work is as important as it’s ever been. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113364510/563534140/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250814ColoradoC_N_CD_NO_14_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4ZWI0ZWVkLWRiNzktZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tr7_C1E1k-k7eNBJq459NJOo1Hz1Z9tTFF4ojBcP5M8=)

Together,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

According to Colorado Public Radio , he immediately posted the image in a group chat with the rest of the Republican House caucus, where several lawmakers made comments about her outfit, “comparing her to a prostitute and stripper.” At the time, Ryan Armagost was serving as chair of the House Workplace Harassment Committee. Keep reading. It gets worse. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Within an hour, the photo ended up on an “anonymous social media account with conservative followers.” It was posted a second time with the caption “Smash or Pass,” and the photo has continued to circulate online. “The messages very quickly escalated from name-calling and vulgar remarks about my appearance and what people wanted to do to me, to threats against my family, my children, death threats, rape threats,” Zokaie told CPR News. “Things got to a point where my staff needed to rotate who would check our messages because it was traumatizing to hear some of the things that people were saying.” Zokaie said the level of harassment she’s experienced from the photograph isn’t something anyone should have to put up with just because they want to serve their community. It led her to take safety precautions and request security for her home and at her son’s elementary school after someone sent a threat about the school. We want to make something very clear. Women who run for office have to deal with significantly more abuse than their male counterparts. This is the very reason we named our organization HER BOLD MOVE. Because we saw the bravery and boldness required of a woman who steps up to lead. People respond to our emails on a regular basis, asking why we only offer support for women candidates. The answer is simple: it can often be dangerous for a woman to run for office – and the women who do it anyway are heroes. But if women candidates are not properly supported, fewer of them will run for office and, consequently, fewer women will be in the rooms where decisions are made. Our work is CRITICAL. Women need and deserve support – because women constituents need and deserve adequate representation. THAT is what we are fighting for each and every day at HER BOLD MOVE. We hope you’ll join us. = Together, Colleen Davis Endorsements Manager Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. Her Bold Move One Park Row 5th Floor Providence, RI 02903 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe this email was sent in error, please contact us at info@herboldmove.org. We'd hate to see you go, but if you must, you can . To learn more about Her Bold Move Action, please visit us at herboldmove.org.

EMERGENCY REDISTRICTING TOWNHALL
Join me , candidate for Texas’ 18th Congressional District, for a powerful TikTok Town Hall on the urgent fight over redistricting.
While the weak and failing “Governor” tries to dismantle our community, we show up, speak out, and organize. Texas Democrats fled to block a rigged special session. California is fighting fire with fire. We will, too.
📅 August 15 ⏰ 6 PM – 8 PM CST
📱 TikTok: @isaiahrmartin
Come ready to ask questions, share your concerns, and get the information you need to stand up for our community and our country's future. We will take the fight to anyone who stands in the way of justice and fair representation.
When Trump or the GOP try to rig the rules, we rally, we organize, and we win in the open.

name: Adam Schwarze - Navy SEAL
subject: What would it take for you to do this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ab712cfa5c844a7f82e2da3df7f11c44&_e=iqGWGXkUp4KnSMlVR-hv7QniOpGn16ypdXiAXz7NTGGVhTmRt9G_axWvT6vfExGzZxLAPVvJ4thWQVzFSlgJE8SGVFqcvVDQsjcSdv64Un5TTRlhlaGc9mi_uOoJqz4fle8h7QmbNrIGaMqN5_zTxws67OfyG_923RjuXND1yPKSvWuEr1MnIGMGKv5j4HAWtCL4DI1JX0_1XLbhpBEwnNMDukg4jsppWPFv0atzsq1T7b7e97Cs4lY6x4tAx1oCosqQ-P44mAlVxvU5-A933Hw1aqk9aG_vVhnbBcOlIgXx3xZ-WNLtxMKv85scuXgW2LcgU6m63mXGjEMT1qWU6AR2Sh_vL1ni6X-uSXYSVU9loF3DUy78R1H1i7vOATgj1sqMJwR9r9oGAhbdSgOhzdhPeHnfUAHs8Ssmr1W4PSCPSRijcjCEzNMbCEVXt6im_jZhUf3T9X-bQY6j-f7PhE9m_1rOJAAgSCfB6aGiEp4qMXc9Y5WE0-AuasN0ke7rwqu7Hz2vNEMGug0H58j9_UBdOnV9TCWq2cU9BbFqv3n-h20Whs282fQyj1vv9ovl6UVziWazO-Gv08e_VbTjRhznljSkQqDqeJbMori1SOV6vOWjEUXH9lXMh598OUl9ogpuzCsQc6Wth7wbx5QBTjuWSm4zV8lWIR2C9kUMwm9YzqADkIjBsl3Y-BgIxXFCR5CNgr8doLQeppK0f84wIQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away?**

I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this _**critical email**_ right now.

I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, **I decided: I would fight for my country.**

_[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ab712cfa5c844a7f82e2da3df7f11c44&_e=iqGWGXkUp4KnSMlVR-hv7QniOpGn16ypdXiAXz7NTGGVhTmRt9G_axWvT6vfExGz0OaumGvKEtcErMZEQw2q8LvbI1ze-b_BI_fPvWmg5bMc38h91Q5YZPeefNKAPWsvSJli-lBQt7BHlHu7zEEfvBYJ9z8oJpyE9f7LGCuPgp2l6nxST34FrOD11Mjduh7QlaDg4aNNmfXZ2WixwR_xuxLe9CaLtJP9mGC_HlscdQnAud8WxT-snEGONZyd6_be1FLbDYdZ4HumdV-QcmgYWGlP2N9x0ZjwCnryUFDwB8HQXLd2kEfRTz3vevT_3JGptzzY8DRVp0GWGRac-GqdZff6jCzKxMupKl2slbysGya6rRv1ORTb6A7JW8Iw6VoMKIdI6DOFmJBf0xsgKUC9SRdjfBJN8-7WfgB04DBsATpd2Aa9iTQXnAaN3dUngDC4p8vThZ-wZEXOO8szrX-MALNnTMfMqLE0vWq1wr8Ufb6zJR0Sho2CFhlcJ5uXWAm0MrnJDB5RpAmtotl3humhRx4s5TojsQW7E1wq-oc9QizSuiD2MDnPFmYE9qeKHewgsD-74Bwe-3Ul5QcXZEg5GixEi6tMM9XjcnCbhY8FT75sSqNEVk1gKIwRZDMyoEcQA_Bb_ebfZ_Rt9GHq4DEoHLH-f_q9-u4NOITc94QPaaT0LPIutDu7XIVdnXWzQX21rxaH7GKCQoobpEVebOtUds0LyzG7nbnC-M4rUqbdgfM%3D)_
My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs.

Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ab712cfa5c844a7f82e2da3df7f11c44&_e=iqGWGXkUp4KnSMlVR-hv7QniOpGn16ypdXiAXz7NTGGVhTmRt9G_axWvT6vfExGzZxLAPVvJ4thWQVzFSlgJE8SGVFqcvVDQsjcSdv64Un5TTRlhlaGc9mi_uOoJqz4fle8h7QmbNrIGaMqN5_zTxws67OfyG_923RjuXND1yPKSvWuEr1MnIGMGKv5j4HAWtCL4DI1JX0_1XLbhpBEwnNMDukg4jsppWPFv0atzsq1T7b7e97Cs4lY6x4tAx1oCKeydOoF5EFceNHLY-rgS5Sc3w6LA_SPNGUvImDPkbx4QH26L6ecIUTCcWvnLI3dAqtaE9PBEn666Mq5ljuE0boTW0GCnB1tN0UK-fjBHbuwF-yB8hnG7y6HGI6WJQ7rGlr7REKLA_crLb5KUzRHr_7R5q2dAzUK4xgQqpuHCwq73bjFeHCDditiDeJDk2a1rXPiTAm-m6SIXK-y5O9kxtID9ZxkX5uoTK4mYmVW8ww5AJuOJP6SYOuBcyqk2oP2R9-NE2zSUUpqDZpIICUWvx5xHJQxhGVazmlgfIuZ3YBSiYhGteBkmSQ-1PMh-oU-wgWBMU4mbTw8qXEOp-rPOS9Oo0YnqQzQo33EKrIi8eS41-xKJU-d6rjGudHEHLwlBRRtjkElATC2W7_wv0CwasKjE0g4T45t-MumIfaH0REoVEE32yb11z8r_JlOCCvgpH2q3559YT4t-NOLxInFAhg%3D%3D)
For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight.

But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield.

While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs.

While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with.

This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away.

**[Do you have $1 you can spare today to help me and my team get this U.S. Senate campaign off the ground? We could really use the help.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ab712cfa5c844a7f82e2da3df7f11c44&_e=iqGWGXkUp4KnSMlVR-hv7QniOpGn16ypdXiAXz7NTGGVhTmRt9G_axWvT6vfExGzZxLAPVvJ4thWQVzFSlgJE8SGVFqcvVDQsjcSdv64Un5TTRlhlaGc9mi_uOoJqz4fle8h7QmbNrIGaMqN5_zTxws67OfyG_923RjuXND1yPKSvWuEr1MnIGMGKv5j4HAWtCL4DI1JX0_1XLbhpBEwnNMDukg4jsppWPFv0atzsq1T7b7e97Cs4lY6x4tAx1oCf2WYW3x8pcuWxC-ICDJnEiLw-d1R7nhl-_ywNs9q63nKzjKyOFt11GwaAuGrdfPu2mllx03JOtrt02evtlbfzEvYh-VxM8VP1DxURMe_IgHEe2-aQoRIc0qUJAmHvLiDqbMHbcNrqXtZLukF_h5UI-Rm7FMU55CKcHRlM1gtEpGS_Jp96hXDwGr3kYWELy9yxou6f2-UvjI8-K9wrGIhkr6ZS6CDnhBSgQpWstDTUzcvEzSz2Vi4Tks9DK6opkfXASLBhi3-Wcf1a3wHWAWmw3AnWD3Avxekc6SMuGSbfDDeS1uDHVGwABhwIDhZNxvfT87aF2shRlUKzVxgPGgSg8rPlqecDdAlh-0vHnLLLqj-U2hZntwUXk1CE3us1AAmUzSln83rEO7hyLNbY8n8GqSn8sPo2ny-gMmzAke4FYOYrNsUMBj7wfPkp2ediwcTzzrnbVxB1AWEzgASSeaZAA%3D%3D)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ab712cfa5c844a7f82e2da3df7f11c44&_e=iqGWGXkUp4KnSMlVR-hv7QniOpGn16ypdXiAXz7NTGGVhTmRt9G_axWvT6vfExGzZxLAPVvJ4thWQVzFSlgJE8SGVFqcvVDQsjcSdv64Un5TTRlhlaGc9mi_uOoJqz4fle8h7QmbNrIGaMqN5_zTxws67OfyG_923RjuXND1yPKSvWuEr1MnIGMGKv5j4HAWtCL4DI1JX0_1XLbhpBEwnNMDukg4jsppWPFv0atzsq1T7b7e97Cs4lY6x4tAx1oCySUSEbRn-oQHIPx9MHyHpeLOeu5DP9Yog8X533QCTGlVkJvu559OOwZjqnKYunSC6Kqt4gpBV7OBec5qpQdZNWYfuSsvjZpFCB4CCNGRABHopVgEqbGcCX5r2k9NPBTcOoiCy677-xC1nJ3rxLJPbtT8ug6H3d9NK5AfGhllAowowCEQ1fq6Pq0FOGxTnnCRa0gf7Aul0YrPrZoiRw1iAXfrWqaxtTjYTBAp8IEqJUe9gSfFciye2bx0-rXZfqH4XYve-Xa2NMVrJCaHQYDDqr9lNMySLyYcQyhFitLw_loREy-daUNw9CACOTXFRsrvW2MAFKoX2AsRKkSmPAasC-FBMKVY-AaewN8mhxIXAnZrzXM1e9vNuya6LsLin2GMZLquXcnRW7Ss_xlAZa5GP2o8swNBC0-V7e-uGvnTbNe7UOhXSViwwU8_JEABuPH9rnfaK78ZajK1Wa9JE2ROsA%3D%3D)

**I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform.**

I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies.

We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever.

The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. _**My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund.**_
**
[I’m not asking for much, but even $1 will do the trick now.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ab712cfa5c844a7f82e2da3df7f11c44&_e=iqGWGXkUp4KnSMlVR-hv7QniOpGn16ypdXiAXz7NTGGVhTmRt9G_axWvT6vfExGzZxLAPVvJ4thWQVzFSlgJE8SGVFqcvVDQsjcSdv64Un5TTRlhlaGc9mi_uOoJqz4fle8h7QmbNrIGaMqN5_zTxws67OfyG_923RjuXND1yPKSvWuEr1MnIGMGKv5j4HAWtCL4DI1JX0_1XLbhpBEwnNMDukg4jsppWPFv0atzsq1T7b7e97Cs4lY6x4tAx1oC7jiPYAJ3r2L8IXpKyWzl3R4BgYi2ifyb0UiyGZz1JPvbEjyYbUYBhp3asTKlkYNSR1wHYN5A7Vmp2hYVza3A4hK1fi9Um_FgaKeWrbyDB_UqWO8D2Vjl3PhtJ6xhhFi4xBGML-RLGb8Ima2a3shktIn4947hl5slNjlddpeytOXbh1l03EsD9XlSM51XP68rQ6vKFRf58aN__LVdAVijxHNsm-Pmv38kcKrjHNfq9VSx-7t-iT64D_SEoIYxkhJofzN-OE5nLeNYk26eXwdPfS2hj_zhZfwJIgL23jC8mMuy522SqgrVUAQey-CBBVTNho8Vqxb6KUG2GyTbUntTH99YS1_i63fbbZ__k_i_Pps1O4_sgYu6ri_bP41pFg1EzrOviup16-y8BSDwrz2Qr505J7AtJt4qp_2DNieWrRs6hEoSwTTYr93eAPArScyK1sRdArbtjKclOgeRMjqkGg%3D%3D) **

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ab712cfa5c844a7f82e2da3df7f11c44&_e=iqGWGXkUp4KnSMlVR-hv7QniOpGn16ypdXiAXz7NTGGVhTmRt9G_axWvT6vfExGzZxLAPVvJ4thWQVzFSlgJE8SGVFqcvVDQsjcSdv64Un5TTRlhlaGc9mi_uOoJqz4fle8h7QmbNrIGaMqN5_zTxws67OfyG_923RjuXND1yPKSvWuEr1MnIGMGKv5j4HAWtCL4DI1JX0_1XLbhpBEwnNMDukg4jsppWPFv0atzsq1T7b7e97Cs4lY6x4tAx1oCESkvtXyYn35dd4voUYKN7LRF962MbIVDdGg8zFWnOeeDajsa2fPjKoXyfZne3xCv9WcURQkE4a55BMlsoA9W_s37I5IbKh4mc0_hQwtCZHPtfbIx6qu31jlHnho5jqO9tKekAhKQoBkeDa3cXiZ_lPxT0ej4whA4JawMSUvq2iD9dHZgkdAX-_nq6GKJK1_c7hBtWLSNlXfsm6chPLua368JPYAf547ExEppjwUkHaKH9jkRyrJleYmGTx3Qeho6gIgWItlE0xuy1LUPY4oBM7g77lslijeH6-NnLVPbWvJscBRMHkmysjPpbPsyqVUonvYYFY1hIFovx2fg4DBtt_OhGgx82gZ9XkbZqv99U0Aqprg2XxHcztFEAX2jP4O0eyhk2n9POfkJclFrhNYmOHkHExm-bAglYX1fs0J4jFULU1qGhvJyrJlPh5sgpNlFnIPdLv1sUE7RkTNnGdpFcQ%3D%3D)
I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago.
**

clean_body: I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies. | Fellow Conservative, Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away? I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this critical email right now. I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, I decided: I would fight for my country. My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs. Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived. For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight. But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield. While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs. While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with. This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away. I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform. I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies. We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever. The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund. I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago. We will secure our border so we can welcome those who love America — and send criminals packing. We will rebuild our economy so working people can live with dignity and opportunity. We will put parents back in charge of their children’s education. We will defend the Constitution — every single word of it. But I can’t do it alone. I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything. I know what our flag stands for. And I will never stop fighting for it. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: The Democrat machine will pour tens of millions into Minnesota to try to crush this campaign before most voters even hear my name. They want a senator who will rubber-stamp their agenda. I’m not that man — and that’s why they’ll do whatever it takes to stop me. As a fellow American who loves this country, , will fuel this fight and send a message that America is worth defending. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: Can I count on you to contribute to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor of Virginia? Peter, I've seen a lot of tough races in my time, so let me tell you: This one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor's race is a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election of Trump's second term, and it will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don't win big here, we'll be facing a rough road ahead. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Here's what's got me terrified, and I won't mince my words: Republicans are going to flood the state with MILLIONS of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor's seat red. This election is for all the marbles – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, we only have one opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025 and it's in Virginia. And right now, we're seeing that Democratic Governors are our first line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump Administration. Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment. That's why I'm asking you to step up today. The money that's coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, James Carville | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). subject: Trump's Strange Warning (Don't Mess With This Stock!)
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

Dear Reader,

DONALD TRUMP ISSUED A SHOCKING WARNING...
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/a222266d5b39403ebb81e57cf150add9-3d66ea821f284cb7a42fc876e1a78e42/63]

It had nothing to do with Iran... or China...

Not even Canada or Mexico.

It's something much more intriguing.

It was late in the day... and Trump took stage.

He tore into one of the strongest countries in the world...

And said they are _"MAKING A BIG MISTAKE."_

He demanded that they immediately reverse course.

What got him so mad?

In short... this country decided to mess with ONE MASSIVELY PROFITABLE
AMERICAN COMPANY. [https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/a222266d5b39403ebb81e57cf150add9-3d66ea821f284cb7a42fc876e1a78e42/63]

Most people have never heard of it... at least not yet.

But Trump _actively went to bat for it_.

He considers it to be crucial to the U.S. economy.

But most importantly... this company could make shareholders extremely
wealthy.

Out of 23,281 publicly traded stocks... THIS ONE STOCK COULD BE THE
MOST UNDERVALUED STOCK IN THE ENTIRE STOCK EXCHANGE.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/a222266d5b39403ebb81e57cf150add9-3d66ea821f284cb7a42fc876e1a78e42/63]

The last time I saw this kind of opportunity was with an extremely
valuable stock trading at just $2 a share.

It was what I call a "unicorn."

It had massive revenue... insane profits...

But still trading super cheap.

Look what happened next:

[Click to play video]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/a222266d5b39403ebb81e57cf150add9-3d66ea821f284cb7a42fc876e1a78e42/63]

A non-stop rocket ride to the moon.

Now... there's A WHOLE NEW "UNICORN" STOCK I'M TRACKING.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/a222266d5b39403ebb81e57cf150add9-3d66ea821f284cb7a42fc876e1a78e42/63]

But the major difference...

This BRAND-NEW UNICORN STOCK
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/a222266d5b39403ebb81e57cf150add9-3d66ea821f284cb7a42fc876e1a78e42/63] has TRUMP in their
corner.

I think this could be the biggest unicorn I've ever uncovered.

DISCOVER THE DETAILS OF KARIM'S NEW UNICORN STOCK NOW
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/a222266d5b39403ebb81e57cf150add9-3d66ea821f284cb7a42fc876e1a78e42/63]

Yours in smart speculation,

Karim Rahemtulla, Head Fundamental Tactician

_Monument Traders Alliance_

P.S. You probably haven't read about this stock in The Wall Street
Journal... or seen it on CNBC.

But... expect you will hear it in the news in a very short time.

If you want the chance to get in before the crowd... while it's still

You better act fast.

subject: Good morning!
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
With smaller staffs, budgets, and constituencies, your donation goes the furthest at the state legislative ballot level – your donation could mean the difference between a Democratic victory or loss. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Good morning! We know it’s early, but we wanted to catch you while you sip your morning coffee... **We have less than two weeks until polls close in critical special elections in Georgia and Iowa.** **And just like you may need a morning caffeine boost, state Democrats need critical resources to compete and win against MAGA extremists in elections across the country this fall, in 2026, and beyond.** [For the price of just _one_ morning coffee – $5 – you can make a genuine difference in state legislative elections and help our party compete against right-wing attacks. name: Team Benson
subject: Why we’re supporting her
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=611%2E181023%2EgdsZ5W)
We want to take a minute to tell you about _John James_ — one of Jocelyn’s GOP opponents in the race for governor.
John James is a right-wing, DeVos family-backed candidate who voted to give tax cuts to billionaires on the backs of hard-working Michiganders. He won’t own up to his vote to rip away health care for 700,000 Michiganders. Instead, he’s been running away from questions from the people he represents.
Michiganders have a better choice: Jocelyn is a fearless advocate for everyday Michiganders, a devoted mom, and a dedicated public servant. She started her career fighting to protect civil rights in the South and investigating domestic terrorism and white supremacy.
As Secretary of State, she oversaw two of the highest turnout and most transparent elections in the state’s history and saved Michiganders time and money at the DMV. She’s working to make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home for everyone, no matter their zipcode or income level.
[**There’s a clear difference in the race for governor — and we need to do everything we can to support Jocelyn. Will you pitch in right now to help us win this race?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q32025.plcv4o&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250815_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=611%2E181023%2EgdsZ5W)

name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: I Didn't Think You Were Very Bright
body:
I was very busy during the 12-Day-War...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | **💥I Didn’t Think You Were Very Bright💥**
---
I was very busy during the 12-Day-War between Iran and Israel. I ended up doing 39 live TV interviews during those two weeks, primarily for NewsNation and Fox News. I responded to real time news on the first day of the conflict, the B-2 strike, the President’s White House announcement, the attacks on Al Udeid, and the announcement of the ceasefire. I sat on set for two hours straight as a panel member and stood in front of big screens to speak about battle damage and regional maps. It was a tiring blast! But I certainly wasn’t perfect, and there is nothing like frank feedback while on live television with millions of viewers to bring that out in spades. On my website (johnteichert.com), there is a way to contact me directly. It is intended to provide a way for people who want to schedule me for keynote speaking engagements to reach out. Some have discovered, however, that this mechanism allows them to reach me with any message on any topic with no filter. One of those messages came through during the conflict with the following feedback from a lady named Jeana:
“I am seeing you a lot on Fox so I decided to visit your website. You are quite accomplished. I was surprised because honestly I didn’t think you were very bright. I see now that my impression was wrong. In my experience, only ignorant people mispronounce “nuclear”. I’m not trying to demean you, I just think that if you’re serious about getting speaking engagements and furthering your consulting career, you absolutely need to fix this. Saying “new-cue-lar” immediately discounts everything else you say. People made jokes about GW Bush saying it that way and it was fodder for late night shows. There’s no reason why you can’t learn to pronounce it
My favorite line from Jeana’s email – **I didn’t think you were very bright**! It still makes me laugh as I type it.
There are a few points for all of us to take away from this feedback.
First, **she was right!** As much as I don’t like to be corrected, and as harsh it was to read her critique, it doesn’t change the fact that she was spot on.
Now I know there is an argument that the way I said the word **nuclear** was just fine. But if a few people were discounting my thoughts because I wasn’t crisp and traditional in my pronunciation, then it’s something I should change. And I did! I even sang my own little **nuclear** song as I walked around the house to make sure that I would nail it during the next interviews! Second, **how you respond to feedback matters**! I could have ignored her email. I could have responded back in a salty way. I did neither! Instead, I expressed humble appreciation for her feedback and told her that I would work on it.
The next interview after Jeana’s feedback was on Jesse Watters, the most watched show on Fox News. How did I do? This was her follow-on email:
“I saw you on Jesse tonight and when you said nuclear, I actually stood up and gave you a fist pump! You reverted back on the second one, but that’s ok; I know you’ve got this...”
Alright, so I didn’t nail it, but I was improving. And I even earned **a fist pump** from my detractor! But it gets better than that. After a few more short emails, this is what Jeana said:
* “I can’t believe that you took the time to respond to me in such a kind and respectful way. You now have fans for life (my spouse and I, and a couple of my friends whom I told about our interaction).”
* “If you ever run for office, and I believe you will if you aspire to, please call on me to volunteer on your campaign. I’ll do whatever you need, as I believe you are an exemplary human being.”

Wow – **from stupid to exemplary** in a few short emails!
I write and speak a lot on the **Listen-Consider-Act** cycle. It is the primary leadership construct that I describe in my first book **BOOM! Leadership That Breaks Barriers, Challenges Convention, and Ignites Innovation**.
Why is it so important to create an organizational culture that listens, considers, and acts?
* You will get feedback that you need to hear, because I hate to tell you, but **you aren’t doing everything right**!
* You will have the chance to respond to the feedback, and when you do so in the right way, **you can turn detractors into collaborators and fans**!
* When you respond in the right way, people will hear about it, and **you will grow your opportunity for impact and influence**. **You will also get more feedback that you need to hear**!

That all seems simple, but it played out real time because of Jeana’s willingness to reach out with needed feedback, and my response via the Listen-Consider-Act cycle.
When you embrace this simple concept, you will be able to LEAD WELL even if you aren’t very bright!

* John

NOTE: Please forward this on to anyone you think would be interested, entertained, or informed by it. When you do, please encourage them to sign up for my FREE newsletter at the link below for regular, value-added content:

clean_body: I was very busy during the 12-Day-War... | | | | | | | | 💥I Didn’t Think You Were Very Bright💥 I was very busy during the 12-Day-War between Iran and Israel. I ended up doing 39 live TV interviews during those two weeks, primarily for NewsNation and Fox News. I responded to real time news on the first day of the conflict, the B-2 strike, the President’s White House announcement, the attacks on Al Udeid, and the announcement of the ceasefire. I sat on set for two hours straight as a panel member and stood in front of big screens to speak about battle damage and regional maps. It was a tiring blast! But I certainly wasn’t perfect, and there is nothing like frank feedback while on live television with millions of viewers to bring that out in spades. On my website (johnteichert.com), there is a way to contact me directly. It is intended to provide a way for people who want to schedule me for keynote speaking engagements to reach out. Some have discovered, however, that this mechanism allows them to reach me with any message on any topic with no filter. One of those messages came through during the conflict with the following feedback from a lady named Jeana: “I am seeing you a lot on Fox so I decided to visit your website. You are quite accomplished. I was surprised because honestly I didn’t think you were very bright. I see now that my impression was wrong. In my experience, only ignorant people mispronounce “nuclear”. I’m not trying to demean you, I just think that if you’re serious about getting speaking engagements and furthering your consulting career, you absolutely need to fix this. Saying “new-cue-lar” immediately discounts everything else you say. People made jokes about GW Bush saying it that way and it was fodder for late night shows. There’s no reason why you can’t learn to pronounce it My favorite line from Jeana’s email – I didn’t think you were very bright! It still makes me laugh as I type it. There are a few points for all of us to take away from this feedback. First, she was right! As much as I don’t like to be corrected, and as harsh it was to read her critique, it doesn’t change the fact that she was spot on. Now I know there is an argument that the way I said the word nuclear was just fine. But if a few people were discounting my thoughts because I wasn’t crisp and traditional in my pronunciation, then it’s something I should change. And I did! I even sang my own little nuclear song as I walked around the house to make sure that I would nail it during the next interviews! Second, how you respond to feedback matters! I could have ignored her email. I could have responded back in a salty way. I did neither! Instead, I expressed humble appreciation for her feedback and told her that I would work on it. The next interview after Jeana’s feedback was on Jesse Watters, the most watched show on Fox News. How did I do? This was her follow-on email: “I saw you on Jesse tonight and when you said nuclear, I actually stood up and gave you a fist pump! You reverted back on the second one, but that’s ok; I know you’ve got this...” Alright, so I didn’t nail it, but I was improving. And I even earned a fist pump from my detractor! But it gets better than that. After a few more short emails, this is what Jeana said: “I can’t believe that you took the time to respond to me in such a kind and respectful way. You now have fans for life (my spouse and I, and a couple of my friends whom I told about our interaction).” “If you ever run for office, and I believe you will if you aspire to, please call on me to volunteer on your campaign. I’ll do whatever you need, as I believe you are an exemplary human being.” Wow – from stupid to exemplary in a few short emails! I write and speak a lot on the Listen-Consider-Act cycle. It is the primary leadership construct that I describe in my first book BOOM! Leadership That Breaks Barriers, Challenges Convention, and Ignites Innovation. Why is it so important to create an organizational culture that listens, considers, and acts? You will get feedback that you need to hear, because I hate to tell you, but you aren’t doing everything right! You will have the chance to respond to the feedback, and when you do so in the right way, you can turn detractors into collaborators and fans! When you respond in the right way, people will hear about it, and you will grow your opportunity for impact and influence. You will also get more feedback that you need to hear! That all seems simple, but it played out real time because of Jeana’s willingness to reach out with needed feedback, and my response via the Listen-Consider-Act cycle. When you embrace this simple concept, you will be able to LEAD WELL even if you aren’t very bright! John NOTE: Please forward this on to anyone you think would be interested, entertained, or informed by it. When you do, please encourage them to sign up for my FREE newsletter at the link below for regular, value-added content: | _ | | | | Teichert in the Trenches | Washington, DC | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | You've received this email because you've subscribed to our newsletter. |

| | | | Hey Peter, Former President Barack Obama just spoke directly to the Texas Democrats who left the state to block a Republican redistricting plan. He called it a “systematic assault on democracy” — and praised their courage for standing up to a mid-decade gerrymander that could hand the GOP as many as five extra U.S. House seats. Obama warned this fight is about more than one map. It’s about voter suppression, questioning election results, and changing the rules to keep power. body:

| | Fellow Conservative, As expected, the media's been in full-on attack mode. _So I 'm going to cut through the media's noise and give you the cold hard facts about President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill (BBB)._ _First off, the BBB introduces a NEW deduction for seniors: $6,000 EXTRA for single filers and $12,000 for married couples._ That means **_88% of seniors_** who receive Social Security benefits will now see _NO TAX_ on Social Security. The BBB also creates a new, tax-advantaged investment account prefunded with $1,000 for each child born from the beginning of 2025 through the end of 2028._ _ _I was proud to lead the original bill in the Senate._ **And speaking of the next generation of Americans** , the BBB also introduces the first-ever federal school choice program to empower parents over left-wing bureaucratic teachers. _But, Fellow Conservative - President Trump and our Senate Majority are only getting started. We're just six months into our new unified Republican government._ **_That 's why I want to hear YOUR top priorities for the second half of 2025 to ensure your elected officials keep working for YOU._**** ** [**Please take my quick priorities survey to ensure your top concerns are heard loud and clear as we set the agenda for the remainder of 2025 >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.) ** ** **[[TAKE THE SURVEY]](http://trk.tedcruz._4g)** Thank you, Ted Cruz

$10.
That's the contribution Ilhan Omar is counting on you to make to stand with our campaign before tonight's August mid-month fundraising deadline. We'll explain more in just a moment, but if that's all you need to hear, please add yours at this link:
**[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/August-Mid-Month**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250815-1-90&t=2&akid=1763%2E791427%2EOqdH1N)
Here's the situation:
At least one well-connected challenger is publicly considering running against Ilhan in her upcoming primary.
AIPAC has already run a poll in her district, testing the waters for a pro-Israel opponent who they can support with their huge warchest.
Other right-wing super PACs and Republican megadonors could be gearing up to spend millions of dollars against Ilhan in this campaign too.
We need to be ready for them to throw everything but the kitchen sink our way.

If we're going to have the resources to fight back and avoid getting pummeled by the attacks, the lies, and the special interest dark money that pays for them, it's going to take all of us.

name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: 20,000 votes. That’s it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
We’re halfway through the quarter — and the fight to keep Michigan blue starts right now. |
#
---
20,000. That’s how many votes decided the outcome of the Senate race in Michigan last year. That’s less than a sold-out baseball stadium. Less than the population of some small towns. And if we lose by a margin that small next year, Washington Republicans will keep their grip on the Senate majority and push their extreme agenda forward. National Republicans and their billionaire backers know this. They’re eyeing Michigan again as one of their top pickup opportunities. And we know from experience just how close they can get. That’s why Fight Like Hell PAC is already moving — recruiting candidates in key districts, running trainings to equip candidates and organizers, and making sure voters know Republicans are driving up costs to fund tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. We’ve seen the stakes up close. We know how hard it is to win by a margin this small — _and how devastating it is to lose._ But with just hours left until our mid-quarter fundraising deadline, we’re not where we need to be to keep building the program that can flip control of the House and the Senate and put a stop to Republicans in Washington and their extreme agenda. **[Will you chip in any amount that fits your budget to help us recruit more candidates, train more organizers, and hold Republicans accountable? Dr. Oz, a quack doctor and administrator for the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, says the Trump regime will no longer “tolerate” being sick in America. The MAGA regime has embraced a dangerous authoritarian vision of public health: blaming individuals for their own illnesses and threatening consequences for those who remain “sick.” Oz, who recently declared that those on Medicaid should “prove you matter,” lamented a national obesity epidemic that prevents young men _from entering the military._ **This warped ideology suggests a societal intolerance for sickness, ignoring systemic issues while endangering lives.** _At Able Dems, we are committed to electing Democrats with disabilities and allies who fight for our rights and well-being. But we can't do it alone._ [**We need your support to counteract these regressive policies and elect leaders who prioritize health and equality for all. name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: a longer email. –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I need your support.
| | | It's Senator Schumer. This is a long email -- but because of how much is at stake, _you need to know it all._

**If you can't read the whole thing, I'll cut to the chase:**

**[The GOP wants to use their majority to implement ALL of Trump's most extreme policy goals. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. So please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before tonight's mid-month deadline to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21963?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250815-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250815-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=20995%2E9716520%2EBll05E)**

_Here are the three most important things you need to know:_

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE WORKING HAND-IN-HAND WITH TRUMP TO PASS HIS PLANS INTO LAW.**

Now that they have the majority, they're doing whatever it takes to cater to Trump's desires -- even if it means cutting key programs like Medicaid and Social Security!

_It gets worse:_

**EXPERTS ARE SAYING TAKING THE SENATE BACK WILL BE TOUGH.**

If we want to stop Trump's agenda, we'll NEED to take back the Senate -- but the analysts are saying it'll be an uphill battle. Factor in the Republican megadonors willing to spend hundreds of millions to keep the Senate red, and it's clear we won't have much margin for error.

_As a result:_

**WE'LL NEED ALL HANDS ON DECK TO DEFY THE ODDS AND TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!**

name: Ken Martin
subject: What’s happening in Texas:
body:
---
Derek, it’s Ken Martin. I recently got back from Illinois, where I stood shoulder-to-shoulder with the Texas Democrats facing arrest and removal from office for their refusal to let Donald Trump and Texas Republicans cheat their way to victory in next year’s midterm elections. Believe me, what’s going on in Texas is a test case for other red states to rig their maps to prevent their voters from holding them accountable. But if Texas Republicans follow through with this scheme to steal Democratic seats, **we will not shy away from responding and beating them at their own game.** Democrats are going to need a war chest to overcome these rigged maps, fight GOP attacks on our elections, and take back control of Congress in 2026. **So please, add your name to the list of folks who stepped up when it mattered most.** [**Chip in $3 today to help Democrats across the country stand up to GOP cheating and win back control of Congress. Your gift will enable us to contest every seat and make Republicans regret ever trying to rig their maps.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250815_4321_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4321_22930333_xyqLaf&akid=4321%2E22930333%2ExyqLaf) I’m glad you’re on our team, Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic Party [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250815_4321_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4321_22930333_xyqLaf&akid=4321%2E22930333%2ExyqLaf)

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

clean_body: The primary is approaching, and I need your help! | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The primary is quickly approaching, and I need your help to make sure we are on the ballot! Will you take just a few moments of your time to sign my online petition so we can continue to provide Arizona’s 5th Congressional District with conservative, “America-First” representation? | | It takes about 90 seconds, saves us time and money, and it is a great way to play an immediate and meaningful role in this campaign. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Why we need to fight for ourselves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081525_1&amount=25]
This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian :
" Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. "
This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month.
It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months.
Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years -- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081525_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081525_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081525_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081525_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081525_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081525_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081525_1&amount=35]
The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote.
But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities.
You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever.
Please, folks, fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more with $25 or more right now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081525_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081525_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081525_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=%2FST3ovn5UQQyzKvAgyHb8BaQ8HhSFqBGVIZ0Svo5NRVmTEdxyeht3GRzvlC45lbhPrroP3Y8zBi4NyKlwqeQrpB8jr%2FKqsanvLbiB4VxvNDpcAAO4XDInFLqrJO8YjtqEW38EXmQy%2BmxXjypS%2BUmWbaaLzfyz11t9FxhOJvQuMmmn%2BB57pMf88qLjAts4Wi4lDWdrtDM6Vxc%2B%2FKFtwlElRXFxvx9MYmVVExN9OjXj7%2B8wZ1O1scTJm27SCRPs6MW4R%2BMwurb4wANkPwNNRn01MfJYqoXTsZdI2rRGytSo9U21cNqZqyMeoEFTUXKTqfZorJ1gZJoYXiWgW4wPxHhVdi6WG1udPnAh1mQfx%2B%2BXRPKjTFgdvgjiIOTZ2hEKUteXLBRJDSR%2B2O9FPuNA2tvlS401Qa4u8eiuSYUWw9zbwQ%3D .

name: Andy Roth
subject: Expanding Into School Boards?
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pLwoda_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerX7edxIXPHojrZvN-2FeqomaKq0kGb5UlpftvT5hY6z8vIjLSDoNCCV8-2B-2FD7w2uoNN2yfM2tso-2FaRQIdpzvK7wK7p4b5sQCrw0EOXnA2NI0ilIvQ0JGs3WGf84WmImkOUsuUgC6s-2Bgt5vHMnWAxSuFyWr3sBfO-2BcD13xTrzF2-2BZp7Sj7RdmK1gy7Fc-2FyXmDeIATThw8l6ORzgJ2r6O-2FQhnr-2FMAOLnBYRBtw2EQfFwZXPIw-3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, As we enter the final stretch of summer, our eyes are turning toward legislatures heading back into session and the important battles that lie ahead. But that doesn’t mean things slowed down this week—in fact, our state freedom caucuses have been fighting around the clock for you and keeping the pressure on all across the country.Some even made national headlines! Here are the top stories.
---
|
---
**ARIZONA** Suanne Edmiston, our Arizona state director, does amazing work to help the **Arizona Freedom Caucus** organize and strategize. But now she has an additional role and we couldn’t be more excited: she was recently appointed to the Phoenix Elementary School Board. Predictably, the Left is now fuming. A liberal media outlet ran [this headline](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjoHLjZ-2FiU5AyCbRm5jIlCZ4fuUj-2FO5xFxj7vvCFj3rnpFZmO1IO2p3b-2BsQ3LSGAc3UXTqmbJzZ6gvaPiTVt8YFAylIcrVwg3thRopJC544BCkaAkkX5j0WL75YH9LDBpfLauc-2BKPggYFwEC2l3Zahos-3DUubD_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerX7edxIXPHojrZvN-2FeqomaKq0kGb5UlpftvT5hY6z8vIjLSDoNCCV8-2B-2FD7w2uoNN2yfM2tso-2FaRQIdpzvK7wK7vQHZPwbgaWWfF8AI7XAXkl1-2FuF2JWxwmlg9doQTFrFhujfpc-2FLZaAPYduqgfFzoqQXZBclRvqUagP63Ieje3n62V7CnlO9NaNQw-2FNKZ8aLz-2FaVpEuT74rndyEs-2Fxuf-2F77P59zD1UWlGDwg5xehNNIc-3D):**"Far-right schools chief put MAGA ally on downtown Phoenix school board"** You couldn’t ask for a better endorsement! We know Suanne is going to do a great job and we're thrilled for her and the many families who will benefit from her relentless leadership to protect parental rights and children in schools.
---
---
|
---
**WYOMING** Liberal Republican State Senator Eric Barlow recently announced that he's going to run for governor in Wyoming. In the past, such announcements would generally be viewed as just another "Republican running for governor in a Republican state.” Business as usual, not a big deal.But with our state freedom caucuses, these RINOs get exposed right out of the gate before they can trick the voters into thinking they are conservative. And that's just what the **Wyoming Freedom Caucus** did. Not only that, they got national attention for it with a headline exposing Barlow’s record for what it is. See below for the [Fox News headline](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjpB6s8SVyitonD50ZO-2FFP7ur6s1R8Y9gLI8qhbvUdl-2B85kUQqQFOnxKz0RRs3QRkdV-2FEDNZGuqV9arrOK-2BDDEphBtxYhWnbaNh8waRhp9s52Jnce1ySnxZb-2BrLdX-2Bn-2BotZnArYxKO0rbK4PkzCTCCnzYzLwo-2B-2BtSxgvNh9UDSOjbAbbeI3fZc2tdAhT7jK6QSQ-3D-3DoYrC_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerX7edxIXPHojrZvN-2FeqomaKq0kGb5UlpftvT5hY6z8vIjLSDoNCCV8-2B-2FD7w2uoNN2yfM2tso-2FaRQIdpzvK7wK7uVFDXwQ6NCtDL64PAruPOC-2BGeAQ67BcEDvn-2FGouqydYC6LULflPscJ-2FyJiHTRm2V85gPxkSN6jPNRi3UEuW50kQzRoIwRr0ryekWbTzdWFt3x03a51JZvmdHoQsmjdjPIjDS9i-2FbOkdgJKSDdfP-2Bss-3D). Gone are the days where RINOs can gaslight voters while quietly amassing power in politics.
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjpB6s8SVyitonD50ZO-2FFP7ur6s1R8Y9gLI8qhbvUdl-2B85kUQqQFOnxKz0RRs3QRkdV-2FEDNZGuqV9arrOK-2BDDEphBtxYhWnbaNh8waRhp9s52Jnce1ySnxZb-2BrLdX-2Bn-2BotZnArYxKO0rbK4PkzCTCCnzYzLwo-2B-2BtSxgvNh9UDSOjbAbbeI3fZc2tdAhT7jK6QSQ-3D-3D9V8y_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerX7edxIXPHojrZvN-2FeqomaKq0kGb5UlpftvT5hY6z8vIjLSDoNCCV8-2B-2FD7w2uoNN2yfM2tso-2FaRQIdpzvK7wK7v2Xt8KUVxBFm2iKpApxFx91eXiDDFC-2F6nR9P5QYiKpsYtqMhCz2OVg-2F1EmRwbFhsgNARiRVJZ3c9mdVOHad1hscRI-2FRHF5FV3AYPwzdZcCNXPjWspPLGi3XB15Tt2kxtax-2B-2F7BX79ljW7QBwHYGdQs-3D)
---
|
---
**PENNSYLVANIA** Earlier this month, a shocking report broke revealing that a sex offender in Pennsylvania was able to adopt a child because of a strange loophole in the law related to surrogacy. According to a local news report: _"Though traditional surrogacy is treated like an adoption in Pennsylvania and includes criminal background checks and clearances, that’s not the case for gestational surrogacy — where the surrogate mother carries a lab-created embryo using donor egg and sperm, often through in vitro fertilization."_ **Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus** member, State Rep. Aaron Bernstine, immediately sprang into action and announced he was writing legislation to close the loophole. From the article, _"[Bernstine] said he already received bipartisan support and will contact the Democratic majority leadership in the House toward fast-tracking the bill, which he expects to introduce within days."_ It's horrendous that this adoption happened in the first place, but we have alerted all 13 of our state freedom caucuses to see if such a loophole exists in their states so we can file similar legislation. Our hope is that we can quickly pass this into law—regardless of which party is in control of these respective state capitols—so that innocent children are protected.
---
|
---
**HELP US GROW** With summer winding down, now is the time to double down on growing our movement. Now is the time to help us expand into new states, while keeping our current states strong.

Every dollar counts and helps us ramp up pressure and ensure freedom flourishes across the country—especially now. Can we count on your support today?

Together, we’ll turn up the heat—and the momentum.
---

We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to [support](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqZvunjMwr5zCo-2BtB7-2FL9OgeaiSIE8G2eKTQGQD-2FQjO19vwXe1zEfU-2FcgC4yHcW3BrU-3DuMb-_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerX7edxIXPHojrZvN-2FeqomaKq0kGb5UlpftvT5hY6z8vIjLSDoNCCV8-2B-2FD7w2uoNN2yfM2tso-2FaRQIdpzvK7wK7ohqmot3briWdDAADuthSVGCHPFwWVLlIv4-2FqSNl7mnbrcMah9tHV1Du28VbF-2FMGwlk-2Btpm24ACVWKjaBq-2B7QvuJkMnVGBRyYvnxfsLXKU-2BMTw-2BVnmuqToe8ywkHvjuVuaxCz9POpGKguzqdrEzBg8U-3D) our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty,

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, As we enter the final stretch of summer, our eyes are turning toward legislatures heading back into session and the important battles that lie ahead. But that doesn’t mean things slowed down this week—in fact, our state freedom caucuses have been fighting around the clock for you and keeping the pressure on all across the country.Some even made national headlines! Here are the top stories. | ARIZONA Suanne Edmiston, our Arizona state director, does amazing work to help the Arizona Freedom Caucus organize and strategize. But now she has an additional role and we couldn’t be more excited: she was recently appointed to the Phoenix Elementary School Board. Predictably, the Left is now fuming. A liberal media outlet ran :"Far-right schools chief put MAGA ally on downtown Phoenix school board" You couldn’t ask for a better endorsement! We know Suanne is going to do a great job and we're thrilled for her and the many families who will benefit from her relentless leadership to protect parental rights and children in schools. | WYOMING Liberal Republican State Senator Eric Barlow recently announced that he's going to run for governor in Wyoming. In the past, such announcements would generally be viewed as just another "Republican running for governor in a Republican state.” Business as usual, not a big deal.But with our state freedom caucuses, these RINOs get exposed right out of the gate before they can trick the voters into thinking they are conservative. And that's just what the Wyoming Freedom Caucus did. Not only that, they got national attention for it with a headline exposing Barlow’s record for what it is. See below for the . Gone are the days where RINOs can gaslight voters while quietly amassing power in politics. | PENNSYLVANIA Earlier this month, a shocking report broke revealing that a sex offender in Pennsylvania was able to adopt a child because of a strange loophole in the law related to surrogacy. According to a local news report: "Though traditional surrogacy is treated like an adoption in Pennsylvania and includes criminal background checks and clearances, that’s not the case for gestational surrogacy — where the surrogate mother carries a lab-created embryo using donor egg and sperm, often through in vitro fertilization." Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus member, State Rep. Aaron Bernstine, immediately sprang into action and announced he was writing legislation to close the loophole. From the article, "[Bernstine] said he already received bipartisan support and will contact the Democratic majority leadership in the House toward fast-tracking the bill, which he expects to introduce within days." It's horrendous that this adoption happened in the first place, but we have alerted all 13 of our state freedom caucuses to see if such a loophole exists in their states so we can file similar legislation. Our hope is that we can quickly pass this into law—regardless of which party is in control of these respective state capitols—so that innocent children are protected. | HELP US GROW With summer winding down, now is the time to double down on growing our movement. Now is the time to help us expand into new states, while keeping our current states strong. Every dollar counts and helps us ramp up pressure and ensure freedom flourishes across the country—especially now. Can we count on your support today? Together, we’ll turn up the heat—and the momentum. We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty, Andy RothPresident State Freedom Caucus Network |

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: We don’t need to cut benefits—here’s the real solution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=%2BqA8NQmTJzL9shqjWCyeBA1phVpulVWYh7wWf7azcJeno9fShyqsjqQflx%2B5KCCfZ0S8SvIQbKomP7wjShkkhf%2FjvNU4IukEo%2BvsRr7%2BP5PNvAdVMCkZtWIPwBbxVCwAXtoxIYFwZAdDaaLyfnhDaO8ZKSVc1DtOO6pT74pJOXESDO2fPgq0OxQd5noJTHGn6KdOrd57fyN%2Fp1UXLKsfiaT021k45gubhGX0vaFvgM8VqtKEKq8VqDzi14QolBdkyuQ16%2FsD6tI9fKU8x5%2FYy2EBkgLmD6NBcfibHyENysLEi3bxijZKqLmqnMwI6fKviEyBJV%2F3YtOlM8sly63BNKQlY7dCeRQa9XtCmUACMpPMH%2FQ%2Bz1y8%2BPxot1c%2BnciqiUdSxS1gJUM2oA2pDYY43MHa0jRtocrcYWF1o1%2FCTqbM811Dr%2FwLTi7puKrtmxM5)

| |
---
Peter,

There’s a lot of noise out there when it comes to Social Security.

Some say the only fix is to cut benefits. Others want to raise the retirement age. But here’s the truth: That’s not the only way, and it’s not the right way either.

If we do nothing, the Social Security trust fund will run out. But there is one, simple, and fair solution: ✅ Lift the income cap on the Social Security payroll tax so the ultra-wealthy pay their fair share. That’s it. That’s the fix.

**Right now, billionaires stop paying into Social Security after their first $176,100 in income, while middle-class workers pay all year long. If we fix that loophole, we can fully fund Social Security without cutting a single benefit or raising the retirement age.**

I’m not afraid to say it: We need to protect the promises made to working people, not make cuts to fund tax breaks for billionaires.

If you agree, here’s what you can do: [chip in $10 or anything you can today to power our campaign and protect Social Security for generations to come!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113379756/563577478/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250815_FR_socialsecurity_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQyNTYxZi1lZDc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Sax7ZSCjfIrMd3tt0QSytpCXXPTk7gqLVVJAFzeOIU=) | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113379757/563577481/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250815_FR_socialsecurity_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQyNTYxZi1lZDc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Sax7ZSCjfIrMd3tt0QSytpCXXPTk7gqLVVJAFzeOIU=)
---
We’re building a grassroots campaign that puts people first, not billionaires. Every donation sends a message that you’re with us in this fight.

[If you’re with me, now’s the time to step up!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113379759/563577482/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250815_FR_socialsecurity_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQyNTYxZi1lZDc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Sax7ZSCjfIrMd3tt0QSytpCXXPTk7gqLVVJAFzeOIU=)

Thanks for being part of this fight.

— Seth

body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4925%2E35263%2E6bm7zv)
Peter — I just heard from my team, and I wanted to give you an update on our fundraising progress so far. We’re about halfway through the fundraising quarter, and truthfully, I’m a bit worried about our numbers. This next public FEC report (that’s the Federal Election Commission) is going to be really important to our work. We're spreading the word about Trump and Republicans' devastating budget and making sure voters across the country know which members of Congress work for them, and which work for Donald Trump. To stay on track with our fundraising benchmarks for this quarter, we need to raise $5,000 tonight. Is this ambitious? Yes. Do I believe that this team can make it happen? **Definitely**. **[Will you be one of the 10 people we need to step up from 18326 to help us reach this goal? If you have room in your budget this week, please pitch in today.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-aug25.EOUccb&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20250815_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4925%2E35263%2E6bm7zv)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-aug25.L5mwgg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20250815_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4925%2E35263%2E6bm7zv)
