name: Adam Schiff
subject: Our democracy won’t prevail unless we fight for it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8907%2E5257348%2EdvMtvw)
**As I write this email, Derek, Donald Trump and Texas Republicans are aggressively pushing gerrymandering efforts in Texas, undermining the very foundation of our democracy.**
This blatant manipulation of district boundaries to preserve Trump’s power is a direct attack on our democracy, and we cannot stand by and let it happen.
But we're not powerless. Far from it.
California has a proud history of leading the fight for democratic principles, and now, more than ever, we must respond with determination and unity.
**[Our democracy won’t prevail unless we fight for it. If you’re with me, will you rush a contribution split between my campaign and the Election Rigging Response Act so California can take action?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250815_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=8907%2E5257348%2EdvMtvw)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.sJSYOj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250815_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8907%2E5257348%2EdvMtvw)

---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.lS09p5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250815_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=8907%2E5257348%2EdvMtvw)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250815_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=8907%2E5257348%2EdvMtvw)
---
Republicans know they have to change the rules to stay in power. Voters are sick of their unpopular Big Ugly Bill that rips away health care from millions or super unpopular tariffs raising costs. And if they try to use Texas to perpetuate their terrible majority, California must fight fire with fire.
I’m committed to national redistricting reform, but preventing this GOP power grab right now is of the utmost importance.
**[Split a donation between my campaign and the Election Rigging Response Act immediately and be part of the movement to stop the GOP from locking in a regressive majority against the will of the voters.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250815_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=11&akid=8907%2E5257348%2EdvMtvw)**
Thank you,
Adam

body:
Artist Shepard Fairey created something incredible to honor our movement

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113380077/563578430/1328794144?refcode=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiZTg3OWMwLWVkNzktZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AhH4WqKKmUdxvsmI7GHFUO3_eIDqPqh5aM_0oAlLKFo=&emci=c21ae164-3f79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

I've been called a lot of things throughout my years of activism. A troublemaker. A rebel. An agitator. And I've worn those labels as badges of honor. But the truth is, I never acted alone. Every fight I've waged for peace and justice, I've fought alongside people like you. People who aren't afraid to fight for what they believe in. **So when Shepard Fairey, the visionary artist behind so many iconic images of resistance, reached out to honor my lifetime of activism through his art, I knew this limited-edition poster belonged with the people who made that legacy possible.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113380078/563578431/139559794?refcode=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiZTg3OWMwLWVkNzktZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AhH4WqKKmUdxvsmI7GHFUO3_eIDqPqh5aM_0oAlLKFo=) **[JanePAC is giving 5 lucky supporters a chance to win one of these exclusive posters, each signed by both Shepard and me and valued at over $300! We'll cover the cost of shipping, so all you have to do is chip in any amount to automatically be entered to win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113380080/563578433/139559794?refcode=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiZTg3OWMwLWVkNzktZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AhH4WqKKmUdxvsmI7GHFUO3_eIDqPqh5aM_0oAlLKFo=)** | [**ENTER TO WIN →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113380082/563578435/139559794?refcode=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiZTg3OWMwLWVkNzktZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AhH4WqKKmUdxvsmI7GHFUO3_eIDqPqh5aM_0oAlLKFo=)

This artwork captures everything we've been fighting for together. The bold colors, the defiant spirit, the refusal to back down in the face of Trump's authoritarian agenda. When I look at it, I see our movement: fearless and unstoppable.
It’s the same movement your support makes possible. Every donation helps us elect climate leaders who share that bold, defiant spirit — champions who will stand up to Big Oil and build the firewall we need to protect our communities from the chaos at the federal level.
**So what do you say?[Will you chip in a few dollars before our mid-August fundraising deadline tonight to help us hit our goal and automatically be entered for a chance to win this iconic piece of art?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113380084/563578437/139559794?refcode=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8be879c0-ed79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiZTg3OWMwLWVkNzktZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AhH4WqKKmUdxvsmI7GHFUO3_eIDqPqh5aM_0oAlLKFo=)**

clean_body: Artist Shepard Fairey created something incredible to honor our movement | I've been called a lot of things throughout my years of activism. A troublemaker. A rebel. An agitator. And I've worn those labels as badges of honor. But the truth is, I never acted alone. Every fight I've waged for peace and justice, I've fought alongside people like you. People who aren't afraid to fight for what they believe in. So when Shepard Fairey, the visionary artist behind so many iconic images of resistance, reached out to honor my lifetime of activism through his art, I knew this limited-edition poster belonged with the people who made that legacy possible. = = | = This artwork captures everything we've been fighting for together. The bold colors, the defiant spirit, the refusal to back down in the face of Trump's authoritarian agenda. When I look at it, I see our movement: fearless and unstoppable. It’s the same movement your support makes possible. Every donation helps us elect climate leaders who share that bold, defiant spirit — champions who will stand up to Big Oil and build the firewall we need to protect our communities from the chaos at the federal level. So what do you say?= = ✊ In solidarity, xx Jane = | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Ym1RvPICpd0-Oo8I07ILXuluWwv6dpc7bCXYVRlxjV2Nn-Zv4eeiFUFC2OYHyV8RXgfqDowFqbULJ2hh6l05ZMlWjAoQwkVRIakmNb4LTv-uNoQDEVdQXzwF_LTrsQldnhFnruqmqt9ESIbPXag_eti2BXFIjyETayH5hP2ufRHxNF2qjmC8i39rbTCi6mbHdr8-MdfrZY4cgPE5nQzAXXH5QnY6H9k_--OO03eueMhGJaaD6p8JEgjkrGkY9KnYgRPKmw8AhE6tGYG0Qv4pffUBcHHT4tRxpSThxo44gRgQh9V9b-TMO4Y9n0eXp2Y11KuvX5la-Es_xCMvSXNOXGeUhabwSDKA0VXtj6E4Ci5rAeJiZiN_iw8wpAEIlzJaAEO_6hcqixI5NYdKwP9nYWNlNkCIIn5lXr5ULXd4mCmc4zq-iZcU-tY96Sp8vaQfg1xlC1Il_xoHXc3TJjUUcf1JvaoEmHzkIpTmuB3PZuWACHIn8pBhkFeVkhaUf8ITcRvowTmmjddKUGa7xFzEY2DKFXfbMWEbHSs-INTuAOeSy3O6Xu1aj1Di0jnTUJ4sSJ8jozFZvLeiIfJ01QXnjtSO3TctyEFb8EVpePUmxYuhOYhZFy7t9euSRP-7ot9zCll_7DfkLsZ1Fq9dx3ZDdHfLBAMoJtERJ3C48rNsvV8fdLM92irZvnRJtE2uCtfHOWpuPg2QNqy2JqQLgUV15iUaJtXiRlGtkA/56TXZutziB7uAn765QtkRQ1ihmdzVT10/11) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/iFYvJffK4CO6i8NlL0hvIdSco1yawS8mN_JcROCFG2eXQJ3KuuA4B51689I0tEvOvEZP0bRt6Cjwoeq-fQ-H1YmSmbDCP9rAA9mqpIvg99CprbG8v4qRxhaqmASWSchYpjtTimwtrsCYMiusrH2RhY0tgrAI_gvtqfqCYmHI8Hh_aIHOSwg9ZdEmUJY7A2V0kgTiIPJEZjglkygUhOtTgmv5dFFhp5r1AVDXpnKLS-PJgINYEllAatV1c8X3C_e_pis_SJoeZ8aRZeblVswMtRl3uaveS29619R-Aw2kuTASoA5Lrj6ADkOdrGuGe4imR7xDulJhBafvk9Y1sm-asthQ87_a7jFgZCnHjfLVZiKJoe8dzdAYmN4id6iRvoK3xG-UNBhozHWpkwT3F_wTZ0Q12F9uozFg1oBIxffkmHIjDHYIhjxWHO1VxEamxkZRHmj2RwSYDrHoVdk1gGfWF-R-bFb-9vUpa4SJX-YfUWXdx2L9Gtdf0v1jApHmIl5aJazItUXROXff7Ua-KxMfO_j01Rk5idguJT1su37LEN-z_1Ogdx_yD8qC545CEiQ9ooeVMuHDGOjGlJO0o_QjYZfe49q267QsAxxxQYVmR2nuFv5aEsVWVF1tnBQ4scmLR0bBaNg75e5G6zsyFFNwhuIVK-_Dc3XejwPCNlDTTw6P2GpJr8_yC-tRjV0PQR4YvhEvfuQWah5o04iSXA7BhBpGzqBYF3krMg/HBVsfX91pqksR03DEf9i0OLKAll9JYQ3/11) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/84chfH46hu1R6KBUH9pcc7xNHEsVJgolmb2bA_mzvl2Van8tWqzwoT_ToL46MnHUGKJZuUcccjxRn_EqT-QiAEq-oAKe6Iqsm9rKxD-FHYkhV2Id4RMzjnYAvO6OuWi8bLp9dOYW5YevRvvm0JigGmcGZzaY6IIQv038iBZf4_K4Jm00CB4CIkPH1o4IFoaVyIawrZ4cAcRUNr1S7fMPoi2biVvMh9jkfvEZuHV_9OsNKvb5s9zntdyeMcV81fxryH4LDe1fPaJx9jI8hkLuicgtgxEfkQtYxQJgXgKk9bI9YQDKcYzrkYEdlskkSczdrj-08Q9LC1Pi37YTIC_uuMhCQWSPadbkHpU57AVzHonjQfQrjPkZwgt-s57rCoUyhMPsoS-5ZJzmoRjhvmYRrULPWr7ROXn37ncPWrBVJ2nRDSmLklp2XsZmL0xR4yVnB2vagqpgEGXEu5l1DXDgZ55MffOaJAH-ZzHQytEhzBwwZnDAaS3zieGP6FxJHe2AqzxG82iCUCp8hd6D_i1D3K4t6JbFMCjM2JaC7MNZtF40QQj_exlpZBK50wOz4v3p1v_r1GGWvYZNi3I13tuPhB7dpJKo1wKdB_om-c6PDb4QZMAHMEVNQ5D7Nf0DwuZNCiMiHbyYunRmy4rw3gV6Hig8V1MTCVYkKwtQ8V68fkdAWo5BU514I1Agh0T461KDVjpCBkJcg-lsyLEypqn1w3MgNZCKZWu2Aw/m28XtiHydtGi9wAi4zh_Ig3_rFEXVFhH/11)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Mohona Chowdhury (via Sharice Davids HQ)
subject: What a campaign manager really does
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s a lot less glamorous, but the fact is, our ability to run a successful campaign will depend on cold hard math

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113380726/563580210/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmRlN2U3ZS1lZjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xUu43yGU1xrbFLLO2dcT6gwQAGzDmCsurrYu0val4p8=) It’s Mohona, Sharice’s campaign manager. When people picture a campaign manager’s job, they have a tendency to picture someone power-walking down an ornate hallway, or sitting at the head of a conference table giving an impromptu speech about the meaning of democracy set to a dramatic film score. In reality, I spend most of my time looking over spreadsheets. It’s a lot less glamorous, but the fact is, our ability to run a successful campaign will depend, in large part, on cold hard math. So here’s why I’m reaching out: I’ve been going through every detail of our budget. I’ll spare you all the details, but the topline is this: We need enough resources to run a serious ad campaign for months leading up to Election Day. Right now, we only have the funds for a few weeks. Listen, we’re not National Republicans. Sharice doesn’t have the luxury of calling up a handful of right-wing billionaires on her phone, and letting them cover the rest. This is a grassroots-powered campaign through and through — and that’s why we need your help. [_**If everyone reading this email donates what they’re able — even if it’s just $5, even if it’s just $1 — that will go a VERY long way toward helping us close our fundraising gap and put Sharice in the strongest position possible. Will you pitch in before tonight's fundraising deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113380727/563580211/212706120?refcode=email_081525_mmfr3&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmRlN2U3ZS1lZjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xUu43yGU1xrbFLLO2dcT6gwQAGzDmCsurrYu0val4p8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113380728/563580212/212706120?refcode=email_081525_mmfr3&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmRlN2U3ZS1lZjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xUu43yGU1xrbFLLO2dcT6gwQAGzDmCsurrYu0val4p8=)

clean_body: It’s a lot less glamorous, but the fact is, our ability to run a successful campaign will depend on cold hard math = It’s Mohona, Sharice’s campaign manager. When people picture a campaign manager’s job, they have a tendency to picture someone power-walking down an ornate hallway, or sitting at the head of a conference table giving an impromptu speech about the meaning of democracy set to a dramatic film score. In reality, I spend most of my time looking over spreadsheets. It’s a lot less glamorous, but the fact is, our ability to run a successful campaign will depend, in large part, on cold hard math. So here’s why I’m reaching out: I’ve been going through every detail of our budget. I’ll spare you all the details, but the topline is this: We need enough resources to run a serious ad campaign for months leading up to Election Day. Right now, we only have the funds for a few weeks. Listen, we’re not National Republicans. Sharice doesn’t have the luxury of calling up a handful of right-wing billionaires on her phone, and letting them cover the rest. This is a grassroots-powered campaign through and through — and that’s why we need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Mohona Chowdhury Campaign Manager Sharice for Congress | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: A special election in California — here’s what you need to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Ok friends — big news: Gavin Newsom has just called a special election in California for this November 4th .
What does that mean? Here’s what you need to know:
Over in Texas, Republicans are attempting an unprecedented mid-decade redistricting — something that’s never been done before — because Donald Trump knows that if it’s a fair fight in the midterms, the GOP will lose.
So Trump basically told Texas Governor Greg Abbott that he has to draw new congressional maps so they can get five more Republican House seats.
Now, a quick aside: I think every state should have independent redistricting like we have here in California. In fact, House Democrats actually tried to pass legislation that says every state has to have independent redistricting. But unfortunately, that’s not the situation we’re in.
If we can’t all play by the good rules, then at least we should all be playing by the same rules.
So that’s what we’re going to do.
On November 4th, California voters will have the opportunity to stand up to Donald Trump and say that if the GOP is going to change the maps to tilt the balance of power, Democrats will fight fire with fire.
We can’t just roll over in the face of GOP schemes and power grabs. We need to stand up and fight for our democracy. We need to do everything we can to make sure EVERYONE in this country is represented, because that’s what Democrats stand for.
If you’re ready to fight back, I need you with me. Please donate whatever you can, because we need all hands on deck to not just fight, but win — especially with more seats to fight for! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Thank you so much for your support. More to come!
-Sara

California’s 51st District

name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: Who we send to Richmond this year stands between us and the madness in Washington.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
The path to a significant Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates runs straight through Southside

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5b4e917d3f14/who-we-send-to-richmond-this-year-stands-between-us-and-the-madness-in-washington?e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=b887153126&e=606d7e9aa2)
| My Friends,
The path to a significant Democratic majority in the House of Delegates runs straight through Southside, and I’m in the middle of the fight. Who we send to Richmond this year stands between us and the madness in Washington.
I’m Dr. Gary Miller. I’ve spent my life saving lives as a cardiologist, serving my neighbors on Danville City Council, and standing up for public safety, healthcare, and education.
Now, I’m running to represent the 49th District, a seat we can FLIP this year. And here’s the truth: This is an open seat, and my opponent is so disliked that independents _and_ Republicans are ready to vote for change.
That’s why I’ve been endorsed by:
Virginia Police Benevolent Association
Virginia Professional Fire Fighters
314 Action

It’s a coalition you don’t see every day, and it’s proof this race is winnable.
But endorsements don’t pay for signs, ads, mail, or digital outreach. To win, we’re launching a statewide push to raise [$10,000 before the end of the month](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=c18eb63a4c&e=606d7e9aa2) so we can:

* Get a large order of large signs
* Send targeted mailers to every corner of the district
* Keep our field team knocking doors until the polls close

If we win here, we don’t just take one seat; we move Virginia closer to a Democratic supermajority.
Can you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help flip the 49th?
---
| [DONATE](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=08a921f24c&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| Every dollar you give is an investment in a Democratic win in Southside Virginia and in adding another brick in the Democratic firewall between us and DC. Let’s do this.
**Dr. Gary Miller**
Democrat for Virginia’s 49th District

---
| | | | | [](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=d979a2eca6&e=606d7e9aa2)

name: Dexter HQ
subject: Maxine only answers to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hi Peter,
We wanted to say thank you . You’re the reason this campaign is what it is.
Because of supporters like you, we’re building a people-powered movement. We’ve slammed the door on Big Pharma and the fossil fuel industry, which think they can buy influence.
That means Maxine can fight for our communities with her values intact, her vision clear, and her conscience 100% clean. She answers to the people who put her here: you .
She’s not letting up. She’s taking on the Trump administration as it chips away at the very things that keep our communities strong: our environment, state rights, and access to medical care.
Day after day, she fights to hold Trump accountable and works to build a better future instead of just scrambling to respond to the crisis of the moment.
But we’re at a critical mid-month point, and this is where we need to keep up the pace. Can you chip in now to help us hit our fundraising goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act]
HELP US KEEP UP THE PACE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act]
Election Day may seem far away, but every single dollar we raise now helps close the gap between what Oregonians deserve and the reality we’re living in.
That's why I have to ask, Peter, can we count on you to chip in whatever you can today to keep this campaign moving forward? Rush your donation now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act]

name: Team Guzman
subject: Begun, the mail wars have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | Friend, the first attack mail pieces against Elizabeth from MAGA Republican Del. Ian Lovejoy have arrived in mailboxes across VA-HD22.
They’ve even got black-and-white photos of Elizabeth. _(Ooooooh, scary!)_
We knew this day would come, with early voting just weeks away and the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates at stake.

clean_body: Shhhh... | = | Peter, As Josh’s Finance Director, I want to let you in on a little secret: Every finance director in the country will tell you — August is usually the slowest month for fundraising. And this year is no different. We’ve already seen a huge drop-off in donations, and at this pace, we’re never going to hit our monthly goal. That’s dangerous, because this isn’t just any race. Josh represents one of the few Trump districts still held by a Democrat. His opponent is the GOP’s “dream candidate” — handpicked to flip this seat — and national Republicans are already pouring millions into attack ads to try to take him out. = = Here’s why this matters: If we don’t close this gap tonight, it will be that much harder to make up the difference later. And in one of the most competitive races in the country, we simply can’t afford to fall short. This seat will decide whether Democrats can take back the House next year and put a check on Trump’s radical agenda. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for your help, Michael Hammer Finance Director, Josh Harder for Congress *

name: Jonathan Nez
subject: Eli Crane chose billionaire tax breaks over healthcare

body:
Hi Peter,

Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors.

As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.

In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.

Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/4t1GCAIJz1TVUONeKqtBtQ~~/AAPPABA~/QVKgSfnpo_J-L78wM4G14D2SP6mZ0mX7_pu4R7TvphHFT5QRrcY7SGLUA6BxS4380zIA8_u35rrS1vSjBiULD-MDHc463pW68cWjPrxiTxLRHBE2pRsPYtDnNhKhGK9TEzP6m_3Z8bel5DtawdnITQ~~

Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona.

I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.

I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please chip in anything you can today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/0FQCavELqgs84nV1qaay3w~~/AAPPABA~/qEbc297q5oSNqf7zLIsaNxGWsFyNQzQ96IdqIGZMh4Ndzgs-7sTi4ztcMsjtyBOw_ZIvDaKGkqNtnF8D6nALRwr0iIqnQKHYp3XhRpom4YUBdxODxKTH0UoBMEv8Z_VjZLz-Ea5QoEDCJ97o17VepbhShDvtQNsK_iZjshB4srTsnnRYd0ZiMGa-XGVyKLW_oXQ66NTnrKuTV4wZthotKw~~

Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.

As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. Please consider supporting my campaign today: https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/dQ0B0dpl2BzyyxxT4hy_Qg~~/AAPPABA~/RlLgpJUUV-jgcxLQPH7qurZSVC86wxXz5Q_WXVSU7cMCohAf88Pf43rT5HxSoVGu1y8dwSGTXtUzDFgFYzlK0sPRUzj2a2Py0wtgdcWuM_C7l6P8tR7CarY4zV3lV7Ie0dS2KTrWBk2MWinidi8Yug~~

body:
Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf9280145ab741dda08f9210186e913e&_e=OyrGGxdw39YwKNEp84G3s2UzXNGOMYcAd0ghXS6bwpKdSkAQ0cF6ut9ow-2J7TSsI8w9yION5NctBYG85A6_j5N0nzilxrajoM8QJp6VEz6hbFzwCdpvIRookIQwFPMmNIHouBOGyapjwBD_fa9isLf94ztB7WaqM2eYBVupgnKRchCLdXjgOeO6hinmNn16svG3KyU95nhl40uu2POXolwmLLadx8_E0f1wZKS2WMylrsVVqqIqw8mY6_OhiWy6GCIqZl5LgSxWpdgimYkVzTHly4U4Tb6L-qD_McjwWbN3ZpAeXJ3LGSYIiSqWcCLlic0oiSBoFNEAziqgTnZNoYPCNVr5KyMDr_BLNTlRL9JzJNJv7uX3TzKz-an0P9UWSFeX7yI6rG7EHqIgncZMsHUKnjUraYIIiOilyfGzgnqg17P5ir_AqsHcRnnick8gej0opfAFxsKkPuCMTfi5THmLLEJ40jt8XrSgZg0uk93KPrab4BcxcCz3jnQXp5SmLvazxue5rdRuhFovV5WZgiTID70Pj3iiDLsV7LtXcbrXb12hERSnWBCkj8n57gZpRCQ8lbuCBuBn-dmSmf_VGfU0H5mw-NT19PMOqkiDMFho3laKvHtrcJipcKEJsoCkPCBUeWvC9zucZgd0aDFGwxdI1FkEO2b2teT7oJz9ruprAL5V2GSsZ2g3iyEW_LhU)

Dear Peter,

I’ve spent my life fighting for Wyoming — because this is my home. I was born and raised on a cattle ranch in Laramie County, and my roots here run deep.

I know what it means to work hard, live free, and take pride in where you come from. That’s the Wyoming way — and it’s exactly what I’ve taken with me to Washington.

From my years in the State Legislature to serving as your U.S. Senator, I’ve never stopped fighting to protect the values that make Wyoming strong and America great.

**Whether it’s securing our borders, defending the Second Amendment, or creating good-paying jobs, I’ve always put Wyoming and America first.**

As Chair of the Senate Western Caucus and a member of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, I pushed back against the Biden administration’s extreme agenda — especially when it came to reckless spending, anti-energy mandates, and efforts to lock up our lands.

I’ve fought to protect our coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries, because I know how vital they are — not just to Wyoming’s economy, but to America’s future.

This year, I’ve also been fighting to cut red tape, secure our border, and lead on crypto policy that protects innovation and freedom. **I’m in the Senate to make Washington work for Wyoming — _not the other way around._**

_But now, our work is under serious threat._

**Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026.** They know that without the Senate, they can’t ram through their radical agenda.

That’s why they’re pouring money into races across the country — including right here in the West — trying to tip the balance of power in their favor.

**_We can’t let that happen._**

If we lose our Senate majority, we lose the ability to block dangerous policies and stand up for the freedoms we hold dear. [**That’s why I’m asking for your help today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf9280145ab741dda08f9210186e913e&_e=OyrGGxdw39YwKNEp84G3s2UzXNGOMYcAd0ghXS6bwpKdSkAQ0cF6ut9ow-2J7TSsI8w9yION5NctBYG85A6_j5N0nzilxrajoM8QJp6VEz6hbFzwCdpvIRookIQwFPMmNIHouBOGyapjwBD_fa9isLf94ztB7WaqM2eYBVupgnKRchCLdXjgOeO6hinmNn16svG3KyU95nhl40uu2POXolwmLLadx8_E0f1wZKS2WMwIefCQvAglg_CelUNDr2dDMpINFPQK8XMWgFWabhoC1tSueIry4QdF2wBIIHyCM1w2lQ_zijU8gfG6RpnhNCtz3VVDjRc3hGaSVYmANq55vUjyMxZ6qxbeylo0QFSbUEpB5TgpBeKesu4Kb5v-rtaMQ3M2GZOm0PTIFv3BYxR2JNgObs5yJ3Yw-c6PYuSBjAGGsRILVfiNp8l4UDZNUp6rdPnvhKo_jIJLlidE27dGBw8EhAaWxczp1TdwdnxyxTcCy_qndGw7o3OyDzQ_1Xqrctu-XKh2hHC-bXbHKjC8oYW-IeFUmRRzBi_aw5u-J8-TVunsJtKMeFFjEIRM2TDXzwOc84HQuvqta979-x9lB36PktV5-cZ6erUGX510KNAj3kDLXHv24FLlE8MOy6E3CjJe4AaygLh5azfR48E_kXeELi-nZtGbBEhOy2qn7MtgNmEIM5zRQKQzSAHkuKR4)

clean_body: Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026. | Dear Peter, I’ve spent my life fighting for Wyoming — because this is my home. I was born and raised on a cattle ranch in Laramie County, and my roots here run deep. I know what it means to work hard, live free, and take pride in where you come from. That’s the Wyoming way — and it’s exactly what I’ve taken with me to Washington. From my years in the State Legislature to serving as your U.S. Senator, I’ve never stopped fighting to protect the values that make Wyoming strong and America great. Whether it’s securing our borders, defending the Second Amendment, or creating good-paying jobs, I’ve always put Wyoming and America first. As Chair of the Senate Western Caucus and a member of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, I pushed back against the Biden administration’s extreme agenda — especially when it came to reckless spending, anti-energy mandates, and efforts to lock up our lands. I’ve fought to protect our coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries, because I know how vital they are — not just to Wyoming’s economy, but to America’s future. This year, I’ve also been fighting to cut red tape, secure our border, and lead on crypto policy that protects innovation and freedom. I’m in the Senate to make Washington work for Wyoming — not the other way around. But now, our work is under serious threat. Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026. They know that without the Senate, they can’t ram through their radical agenda. That’s why they’re pouring money into races across the country — including right here in the West — trying to tip the balance of power in their favor. We can’t let that happen. If we lose our Senate majority, we lose the ability to block dangerous policies and stand up for the freedoms we hold dear. Will you chip in to help us hold the line and defend our Senate majority? | I’m not in this fight for headlines or personal gain. I’m in it because I love Wyoming and America — and because I believe that with the right leadership, our best days are still ahead. Thank you for standing with me. With gratitude, Cynthia Lummis U.S. Senator – Wyoming - Follow Cynthia Lummis | Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/15/2025
body:
Colorado’s Legal Tyranny, How It Happened and How We Take It Back
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Our friends at ACC Action are going to be at the State Fair! Join Congressman Jeff Hurd and Congressman Jeff Crank on August 23rd for _[Conserving the Tradition: Making America Beautiful Again](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_ —an afternoon of inspiring remarks on defending our values and preserving the beauty of our nation. Seats are limited—[RSVP today](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to secure your spot!
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Denver faces a [cultural identity crisis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as rapid growth and corporate influence erode the city’s character. The Air Force Academy will [end race-based admissions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after a legal settlement, while families call [Colorado’s court competency system broken](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over delays and poor treatment for mentally ill defendants. Coloradans overwhelmingly back [securing historic Shoshone water rights](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to protect Western Slope flows, and Colorado [lawmakers clash over the sweeping “Big Beautiful Bill”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, ICE may open a [1,250-bed detention center](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in Hudson next year to address surging arrests, drawing mixed local reactions.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Western Slope legislators at a Delta panel detailed a [tough session for Republicans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—only 4 of 70 GOP bills passed—while highlighting wolf depredation losses, rural broadband needs, forensic lab scandals, Medicaid funding risks, and unfunded mandates burdening counties. Cory Gaines blasts [Colorado’s “add-back” tax rules](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as a stealth tax on overtime pay; Sean Pond [warns of “legal tyranny”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from activist courts and overreaching laws; and Dr. Brian Joondeph backs [Trump-era visa bonds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as common-sense immigration enforcement that protects taxpayers and restores trust.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, August 15, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Colorado’s Legal Tyranny, How It Happened and How We Take It Back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Colorado did not fall because of one bad election or one bad governor. It fell because a handful of people figured out how to take over a state legally. They did it quietly, methodically, and permanently. By the time most Coloradans noticed, it was already too late._
_This is not theory. It is documented history and political strategy. If we do not face it head on, Colorado will become the model for how the rest of America loses its freedom without a single shot being fired._
_In the early 2000s four ultra wealthy progressives, Jared Polis, Tim Gill, Rutt Bridges, and Pat Stryker, launched a plan called The Blueprint. Their goal was to flip Colorado from red to blue and lock it down for good. They did not just focus on big elections. They targeted small local races, poured millions into “nonpartisan” nonprofits that were actually Democrat recruitment machines, and built a web of think tanks, activist groups, and friendly media outlets to control the narrative year round._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado’s add-back taxes are a backdoor tax on overtime](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado’s “add-back” tax policy forces residents to include certain income—like federally exempt overtime pay—back into their state taxable income, effectively creating a hidden tax.
* State Sen. Byron Pelton is pushing legislation to align such taxes with TABOR limits, arguing they generate new revenue without voter approval.
* Critics note the policy was championed by progressive lawmakers despite its disproportionate impact on hourly workers, contradicting their stated support for “the little guy.”

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Power House Panel of Western Slope Legislators in Delta](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHIRLEY BAUER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* At a Delta County GOP legislative update, Western Slope lawmakers reported that only 4 of 70 Republican bills passed in the 2025 session, with most dying in committee as Democrats advanced their own partisan agenda.
* Legislators discussed failures to curb harmful regulations, rising wolf depredation costs, public pushback on extreme bills like HB25-1312, bipartisan wins on forensic lab reform, and budget battles over a $1.2B deficit.
* The panel emphasized that despite being outnumbered, Republicans secured some wins, continue to fight for Coloradans, and urged citizens to stay involved, support GOP lawmakers, and help elect more Republicans to shift the balance of power.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Six cities sue Colorado over zoning and parking laws as state stays silent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | AUGUST 12** _“As of this writing we have not heard back from the State.” That’s how Greenwood Village Mayor George Lantz summed up the status of a lawsuit the six Front Range cities filed in May against the state of Colorado, Gov. Jared Polis, the Department of Local Affairs and its executive director, Maria De Cambra._

**[The Dangerous Hubris of Deputizing Non-Citizens to Police Americans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 11** _Since 2016, various jurisdictions in Colorado began allowing non-citizens – specifically lawful permanent residents and in some cases, DACA recipients – to serve as police officers. This is not a progressive step forward, but rather, it is a profound public policy misstep._
__

**[As businesses flee downtown Denver, Johnston points to falling homicide rate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SHAINA COLE | LOCAL | AUGUST 11** _Mayor Mike Johnston has been pointing to a 44% drop in homicides in the first half of 2025, calling it proof his crime plan is making a difference. The figure is a sharp improvement from last year, but it’s recent and doesn’t show where things stood before the pandemic. In the city’s core, the gains are harder to find._
__

**🐫 DID YOU KNOW?** **Only about 25% of the Sahara is actually covered in sand** —the rest is mostly gravel, with stretches of mountains and scattered oases. And here’s a surprise twist: it’s not the world’s largest desert. That title goes to Antarctica.

**[Denver Is Losing Everything That Gave It Character](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* C. J. Garbo argues that granting police authority to non-citizens—such as green card holders or DACA recipients—undermines the sovereignty and legitimacy that citizenship confers in a constitutional republic.
* He warns that law enforcement power should only be entrusted to full citizens who have sworn allegiance, possess voting rights, and share mutual accountability under the Constitution.
* Garbo contends the policy disrespects immigrants who became citizens before serving, risks expanding to other civic roles, and erodes public trust by prioritizing demographics over shared constitutional values.

**[The Rule 211 gamble: How two towns used Colorado law to effectively shut down an oil company’s core assets](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | AUGUST 8** _Buried wells, sworn affidavits and a state determined to make an example. This is the opening chapter of a three-part series on one oil and gas company’s final stand—and what the documents and data actually reveal. Start with the towns. Stay for the verdict._
__

**[Bled dry by the state: One oil company’s fight to survive ECMC’s war of attrition](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | AUGUST 8** _Jeffrey Kauffman stood at the edge of an excavation site—not to check production, but to explain why there wasn’t any. There was no rig, no flaring, no signs of oil moving to market. Just a fenced-off hole in the earth—and a state agency that wouldn’t let them fill it back in._
__

**[The man Polis vowed to destroy: Kevin Kauffman’s final fight for truth and legacy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | AUGUST 8** _On his 50th birthday, Kevin Kauffman stood waist-deep in the waters off Eilat, Israel. His son handed him a sealed envelope his accountant asked him to deliver on this day. He opened it, read what was inside and stood in silence._

Meanwhile, ICE may open a in Hudson next year to address surging arrests, drawing mixed local reactions. 🗣️ Commentary Spotlight... Western Slope legislators at a Delta panel detailed a —only 4 of 70 GOP bills passed—while highlighting wolf depredation losses, rural broadband needs, forensic lab scandals, Medicaid funding risks, and unfunded mandates burdening counties. Cory Gaines blasts as a stealth tax on overtime pay; Sean Pond from activist courts and overreaching laws; and Dr. Brian Joondeph backs as common-sense immigration enforcement that protects taxpayers and restores trust. This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, August 15, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY SEAN POND, Colorado did not fall because of one bad election or one bad governor. It fell because a handful of people figured out how to take over a state legally. They did it quietly, methodically, and permanently. By the time most Coloradans noticed, it was already too late. This is not theory. It is documented history and political strategy. If we do not face it head on, Colorado will become the model for how the rest of America loses its freedom without a single shot being fired. In the early 2000s four ultra wealthy progressives, Jared Polis, Tim Gill, Rutt Bridges, and Pat Stryker, launched a plan called The Blueprint. Their goal was to flip Colorado from red to blue and lock it down for good. They did not just focus on big elections. They targeted small local races, poured millions into “nonpartisan” nonprofits that were actually Democrat recruitment machines, and built a web of think tanks, activist groups, and friendly media outlets to control the narrative year round. | BY CORY GAINES, Colorado’s “add-back” tax policy forces residents to include certain income—like federally exempt overtime pay—back into their state taxable income, effectively creating a hidden tax. State Sen. Byron Pelton is pushing legislation to align such taxes with TABOR limits, arguing they generate new revenue without voter approval. Critics note the policy was championed by progressive lawmakers despite its disproportionate impact on hourly workers, contradicting their stated support for “the little guy.” | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | BY SHIRLEY BAUER, At a Delta County GOP legislative update, Western Slope lawmakers reported that only 4 of 70 Republican bills passed in the 2025 session, with most dying in committee as Democrats advanced their own partisan agenda. Legislators discussed failures to curb harmful regulations, rising wolf depredation costs, public pushback on extreme bills like HB25-1312, bipartisan wins on forensic lab reform, and budget battles over a $1.2B deficit. The panel emphasized that despite being outnumbered, Republicans secured some wins, continue to fight for Coloradans, and urged citizens to stay involved, support GOP lawmakers, and help elect more Republicans to shift the balance of power. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ JEN SCHUMANN| STATE | AUGUST 12 “As of this writing we have not heard back from the State.” That’s how Greenwood Village Mayor George Lantz summed up the status of a lawsuit the six Front Range cities filed in May against the state of Colorado, Gov. Jared Polis, the Department of Local Affairs and its executive director, Maria De Cambra. C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 11 Since 2016, various jurisdictions in Colorado began allowing non-citizens – specifically lawful permanent residents and in some cases, DACA recipients – to serve as police officers. This is not a progressive step forward, but rather, it is a profound public policy misstep. SHAINA COLE | LOCAL | AUGUST 11 Mayor Mike Johnston has been pointing to a 44% drop in homicides in the first half of 2025, calling it proof his crime plan is making a difference. The figure is a sharp improvement from last year, but it’s recent and doesn’t show where things stood before the pandemic. In the city’s core, the gains are harder to find. Staring off next week strong, we will break down the outcomes of the Trump Putin summit happening in Alaska. Then Tuesday I'm joined by KT MacFarland, former Deputy National Security Advisor to President Trump. Tune in Thursday for a great panel featuring, Nan Hayworth and Grace Curley. Finally Friday, join my fascinating conversation with Dr. Peter McCullough for an update on the MAHA agent. Don't miss it!

## Trump hits 200 days in office...
Last week marked the first two hundred days of the second Trump administration.
And just look out how far we've come.
Two hundred days into Trump's term, and if you ask me it's like night and day compared to the mess we had before.
We had a president who hid in the basement, threw open the border, and called skyrocketing inflation "transitory."
But Trump?
He hit the ground running, racking up wins across the board--border, taxes, tariffs, trade, military, higher education, you name it.
Most presidents dream of one big signature accomplishment in their first year; Trump has a smorgasbord of wins to pick from in just 200 days.
Let's break it down. ...

clean_body: The big takeaways from his second administration-- so far. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more The big takeaways from his second administration-- so far. | | | Aug 15| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ICYMI: Clinton corruption investigation HALTED by Obama administration... Stories I'm reading... \- via AP News \- via The Hill \- via NBC News \- via Just the News \- via The New York Post \- via The Washington Free Beacon \- via Semafor \- via The New York Times \- via AP News \- via Politico \- via Time Top tweets... : DC Mayor Bowser has reportedly left the city for Martha's Vineyard If true, this jumps to the top of the list of dumb politician moves : Of course "crime was down" D.C. Police Commander Was Cooking the Books on Crime : So the president had a big press conference yesterday to talk about crime in D.C., and a lot of folks on the left came out and said that D.C. is actually safe... So here's my challenge. If you are someone that thinks that D.C. is safe, ditch your security detail and go to a neighborhood of your choice in D.C. after dark. That will show you how safe it is. Start your day in the know Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it! This week on The Sean Spicer Show... Staring off next week strong, we will break down the outcomes of the Trump Putin summit happening in Alaska. Then Tuesday I'm joined by KT MacFarland, former Deputy National Security Advisor to President Trump. Tune in Thursday for a great panel featuring, Nan Hayworth and Grace Curley. Finally Friday, join my fascinating conversation with Dr. Peter McCullough for an update on the MAHA agent. Don't miss it! Wellness update... If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center. If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me! Call Bishop Gold! Gold is over $3000 per ounce! NOW is the time to invest in gold and precious metals, and if you call my friends at Bishop Gold, you'll get FREE silver included. | | ---|---|--- Trump hits 200 days in office... Last week marked the first two hundred days of the second Trump administration. And just look out how far we've come. Two hundred days into Trump's term, and if you ask me it's like night and day compared to the mess we had before. We had a president who hid in the basement, threw open the border, and called skyrocketing inflation "transitory." But Trump? He hit the ground running, racking up wins across the board--border, taxes, tariffs, trade, military, higher education, you name it. Most presidents dream of one big signature accomplishment in their first year; Trump has a smorgasbord of wins to pick from in just 200 days. Let's break it down. ... name: With Honor Action
subject: Four Years Since the Fall of Kabul
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/89850ea8af86/bats-brews-and-a-birthday-salute-to-the-us-army-14053742?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Friends,

Today, August 15, marks the fourth anniversary of the Fall of Kabul. We remember the lives lost in the final days of the evacuation, the allies we left behind, and the profound sacrifices made by those who served over two decades in Afghanistan. For many Americans, especially our veterans and military families, those days were filled with heartbreak, confusion, and grief.

At With Honor Action, we treat anniversaries like this not only as moments of remembrance but also as calls to action. Our mission is to bridge divides in Congress and advance principled, cross-partisan veteran leadership that puts the country first. That commitment includes honoring the promise we made to the Afghan partners who stood by us.
---
|
---
_Rye Barcott, With Honor Co-Founder & CEO, addresses the first Evacuate Our Allies rally in May 2021._
|
---
_On Capitol Hill, With Honor Action and For Country Caucus members call for support of Afghan allies._
| Last week, For Country Caucus members Reps. Mariannette Miller-Meeks (R-Iowa) and Jason Crow (D-Colo.) reintroduced the Afghan Adjustment Act, and Sens. Amy Klobuchar (D-Minn.) and Lisa Murkowski (R-Alaska) introduced its Senate companion. This step moves Afghan partners in the United States closer to stability and security.
---
|
---
_With Honor Action joins Senators Coons, Klobuchar, Moran, and Blumenthal, along with the VFW, the American Legion, and No One Left Behind, to call for support of Afghan allies._
| Four years on, this legislation reflects the voices of veterans who have long called on Congress to stand with our Afghan allies. Passing this legislation keeps America’s word and honors the promises made to those who stood by us.

You can read more about the bill [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=fefe5d4cda&e=33f53a5b1a). Thank you for standing with us.
---
|
---
| | | | Please follow With Honor Action on Twitter via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=365b534c35&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.
---
| | | | | | [](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=2e925a7ee2&e=33f53a5b1a)

clean_body: is it. We're down to the wire. My election is just 3 months away, and the future of Virginia and our nation hangs in the balance!I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I'm running for Governor of Virginia. But I'm not just running for office--I'm running to stop the liberal establishment from destroying our country.They're pouring MILLIONS into my Democrat opponent's campaign, and we're running out of time--chip in NOW to protect our country's future. need 1,000 Patriots like you to contribute to my campaign in the next hour. If we can do that, I know we can win this. But if we fall short, the consequences will be devastating: higher taxes, more regulations, and a government completely out of touch with our values.Your donation right now can make all the difference. Let's send a loud and clear message that we won't back down. you for standing with me when it matters most. Together, we can protect our values and continue leading America in the right direction. -Winsome Earle-Sears . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. | Join us August 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u0Syw_kx-cupiUoDBXFH8I1DFqXFTeuCiy-qttFB29F_V21YBQTeL-EZmazMea671g&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_call_invite&n=2) This call will focus mainly on the 2025 candidates we announced this month. This will be a great chance to hear why we're choosing to support them. We have more endorsements in the pipeline and there's still time for more to be considered. Reach out to learn more.

clean_body: Candidates to support! | | | Join us August 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. This call will focus mainly on the 2025 candidates we announced this month. This will be a great chance to hear why we're choosing to support them. We have more endorsements in the pipeline and there's still time for more to be considered. Reach out to learn more. This month we announced our first PA Forward Party endorsements of 2025. \- Independent candidate for Derry Township School Board Director \- Democratic candidate for Bucks County Sheriff \- Republican candidate for Delaware County Controller \- Republican candidate for Lower Macungie Township Commissioner You can check out the pledge they signed . * And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: Team Wes Moore
subject: 5 things to feel good about today
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=451%2E1086043%2E0Llh_P ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=451%2E1086043%2E0Llh_P ]Wes Moore for Governor

Peter,

Maryland is proving what’s possible when we lead with purpose and put
people first.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250815-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250815-1&refcode2=451_1086043_0Llh_P&akid=451%2E1086043%2E0Llh_P ]That’s why we’re asking if you’ll chip in $5 to help keep Wes Moore
leading us forward.

Under Governor Wes Moore, we’re making real progress — and there’s a lot
to be proud of.

Here’s 5 things to smile about in Maryland:

1. The Moore-Miller Administration made record investments in Maryland’s
public schools. 📚

2. We cut red tape to make it easier and faster for Marylanders to enroll
in Medicaid, SNAP, WIC, emergency assistance, and more. 🏥

3. Our team is creating good-paying jobs and building new opportunities
in every community across Maryland. 💼

4. Yes, it’s true. Wes puts Old Bay on everything. Even his ice cream. 🍦

5. Thanks to your support, our grassroots movement is powering real
progress — we couldn’t do it without you. 💪

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250815-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250815-1&refcode2=451_1086043_0Llh_P&akid=451%2E1086043%2E0Llh_P ]So, will you chip in your
first $5 to help keep Wes fighting for all of us?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250815-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250815-1&refcode2=451_1086043_0Llh_P&akid=451%2E1086043%2E0Llh_P ]Chip in $5 »

With gratitude,

Team Wes Moore

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.wesmoore.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=451%2E1086043%2E0Llh_P

### [Want more unfiltered conversations with voices like Beth Silvers? Become a paid subscriber to support ](https://substack.com/redirect/fc006de4-f2ca-46f1-a09e-be842ae848ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Endless Urgency](https://substack.com/redirect/fc006de4-f2ca-46f1-a09e-be842ae848ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ 👇](https://substack.com/redirect/fc006de4-f2ca-46f1-a09e-be842ae848ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/fc006de4-f2ca-46f1-a09e-be842ae848ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
This episode of Endless Urgency is one you _cannot_ miss. I'm joined by **Beth Silvers** from Pantsuit Politics, and we go all-in on one of the spiciest comments I've made on the show, plus Trump, crime, corruption, AI, and a heartbreaking ICE story that's got me furious. It's equal parts debate, strategy session, and raw emotion -- exactly how I like it.
Here's what you'll hear:
* **[00:01:06]** I lay out my "15% less crazy and Trump's on Mount Rushmore" theory -- and Beth comes in hot with her reaction.
* **[00:10:26]** The disconnection between Trump and reality -- from groceries to crime -- and why Democrats keep fighting on his turf.
* **[00:18:42]** Corruption perceptions, "honest liar" politics, and the branding genius Democrats still haven't figured out how to counter.
* **[00:27:03]** How AI, robotics, and false promises about manufacturing jobs could wreck another generation of workers.
* **[00:32:16]** A gut-punch ICE deportation story -- including a four-year-old American citizen with stage four cancer -- and why I'm beyond pissed.

This is one of those essential episodes where politics isn't abstract -- it's personal, urgent, and about who we are as a country. If you believe in cutting through the noise and getting to the truth, this is a must-watch.
**[Become a paid subscriber today to keep conversations like this alive-- the ones that push past talking points and demand better from everyone in power. Don't sit this one out.](https://substack.com/redirect/fc006de4-f2ca-46f1-a09e-be842ae848ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

With urgency,
--Mike

clean_body: Watch now (73 mins) | Mike Nellis LIVE -- Weekdays 5PM ET | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | Mike Nellis LIVE -- Weekdays 5PM ET | | and | Aug 15 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Hey folks, This episode of Endless Urgency is one you cannot miss. I'm joined by Beth Silvers from Pantsuit Politics, and we go all-in on one of the spiciest comments I've made on the show, plus Trump, crime, corruption, AI, and a heartbreaking ICE story that's got me furious. It's equal parts debate, strategy session, and raw emotion -- exactly how I like it. Here's what you'll hear: [00:01:06] I lay out my "15% less crazy and Trump's on Mount Rushmore" theory -- and Beth comes in hot with her reaction. [00:10:26] The disconnection between Trump and reality -- from groceries to crime -- and why Democrats keep fighting on his turf. [00:18:42] Corruption perceptions, "honest liar" politics, and the branding genius Democrats still haven't figured out how to counter. [00:27:03] How AI, robotics, and false promises about manufacturing jobs could wreck another generation of workers. [00:32:16] A gut-punch ICE deportation story -- including a four-year-old American citizen with stage four cancer -- and why I'm beyond pissed. This is one of those essential episodes where politics isn't abstract -- it's personal, urgent, and about who we are as a country. If you believe in cutting through the noise and getting to the truth, this is a must-watch. ** With urgency, --Mike | A guest post by| of Pantsuit Politics, a podcast that takes a different approach to the news. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. | | Peter, it's Lieutenant Governor Austin Davis. Republicans are getting organized for 2026, so we need to ramp things up. At the federal level, Donald Trump is spreading lies and striking fear by cracking down on Democrat lead cities. He's deployed the National Guard _twice_ this term as a show of force, and his base is fired up. Here in the Commonwealth, Republicans are coalescing around an extreme Republican who is going to run against me in 2026. They're looking for an election denier and an anti-choice extremist, and I need to be ready to fight back. **The second Republicans agree on who to officially back, you can bet that money will be dumped into this race from every right-wing donor you can think of. ** I have a record of standing up to Trump and winning, so if you want to keep an advocate for Pennsylvania in office, this is our chance to get ahead and stay ahead in what's sure to be the country's battleground state this cycle. **[Will you chip in ahead of our mid-month deadline tonight at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113385838/563596116/-1135492007?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_081525_ORGANIZING_90DO30MO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWY0ZGExNS1mNjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmpgdl1JyHMdIw_95OO6pj8cl6zvN33cmmWm2OtRnMg=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

subject: We Stand with Texas Democrats!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
This is the fight to save democracy that Democrats have been warning about for ten years.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5588%2E196590%2EHH0U8f). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4357?t=2&akid=5588%2E196590%2EHH0U8f)
---
| Hi there, team.

Last week, Texas Democrats hopped on a plane and fled their state to break quorum in order to stop Republicans from stealing the 2026 midterm elections.

After Donald Trump demanded that Texas Republicans redraw their state maps to ensure Republicans would pick up 5 more congressional seats, Texas Democrats sprang into action to ensure that Trump doesn’t get his way.

These Texas Democrats are doing this at great personal sacrifice. In addition to being away from their family (and jobs) for as long as this may take, they are also being fined $500/day and will be lambasted with negative ads in their district, funded by Governor Greg Abbott.[**_If they are going to be able to hold out long enough for this to count, they’re going to need our help._**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4358?t=3&akid=5588%2E196590%2EHH0U8f)

The Long Run wants to show these fighters that we have their back! If you make a contribution to this email, it will be split between The Long Run and the Texas Democratic Party in order to help the Texas Democrats fund this very expensive fight for all of our sake.
---
| [Rush a Donation to Support Texas Democrats! ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4358?t=4&akid=5588%2E196590%2EHH0U8f)
---
This is the fight to save democracy that Democrats have been warning about for ten years. It’s going to take all of us to ensure that this bold attempt to steal this republic does not go unchallenged.

In solidarity,

The Long Run PAC
* * *
| | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4357?t=6&akid=5588%2E196590%2EHH0U8f)
---

You can also sign up to [receive fewer emails](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=13&akid=5588%2E196590%2EHH0U8f).

name: Team NDRC
subject: A multi-layered fight that requires people from every corner of this country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need your support to hold them accountable
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113386161/563597221/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyYWFkNmJlLWY2NzktZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GAOiv_nGZqgSICSx8ibU3ji-iiZ_XW3GkJGVp6g15xs=&emci=545607e9-7d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=82aad6be-f679-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Right now, the NDRC is focusing efforts on stopping the anti-democracy scheme to steal the midterm elections by manipulating maps in Texas. But this fight isn't just about defeating one extreme, gerrymandered map. It's about exposing Republicans’ shameless efforts to cheat so their actions come back to haunt them — in Texas and across the country. It’s pretty simple: Trump’s policies are unpopular. His approval rating is in the toilet. Americans are rightly pissed off about the devastating cuts to Medicaid and food benefits. And Republicans are hoping to get away with it by stacking the deck in the midterms, so they don’t face the consequences of their actions at the ballot box. At Trump’s demand, they’re taking unprecedented, anti-democracy measures to change the maps in order to stockpile unchecked power. **A big part of our job is ensuring these anti-democracy MAGA extremists pay the price for trying to destroy our democracy.** [**Want to help?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113386162/563597223/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ThisFight_email_20250815-NDRC-Tier1-ThisFight_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250815-NDRC-Tier1-ThisFight_&utm_campaign=ThisFight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyYWFkNmJlLWY2NzktZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GAOiv_nGZqgSICSx8ibU3ji-iiZ_XW3GkJGVp6g15xs=) Here’s our two-pronged approach to make this happen:
* Identify every attempt to manipulate maps and call out anti-democracy legislators engaging in extreme gerrymandering.
* Bolster the candidacies of Democracy Defenders in key state-level races this fall and throughout the midterms. We will make sure voters know what’s at stake in elections that otherwise don’t get enough attention.

Peter, here’s where you come in: This is a multi-layered fight that requires people in every corner of the country, both in-person and online, to do their part. Whether it’s your time or donations, we need you with us in this fight to make sure that anyone who dares to dilute the power of voters, especially people of color, pays the price. **But this is a huge undertaking.** [**Will you rush a donation today to show you’re with us in this critical fight for fair maps, fair representation, and a truly representative democracy?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113386163/563597225/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ThisFight_email_20250815-NDRC-Tier1-ThisFight_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250815-NDRC-Tier1-ThisFight_&utm_campaign=ThisFight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyYWFkNmJlLWY2NzktZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GAOiv_nGZqgSICSx8ibU3ji-iiZ_XW3GkJGVp6g15xs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We need your support to hold them accountable | Peter, Right now, the NDRC is focusing efforts on stopping the anti-democracy scheme to steal the midterm elections by manipulating maps in Texas. But this fight isn't just about defeating one extreme, gerrymandered map. It's about exposing Republicans’ shameless efforts to cheat so their actions come back to haunt them — in Texas and across the country. It’s pretty simple: Trump’s policies are unpopular. His approval rating is in the toilet. Americans are rightly pissed off about the devastating cuts to Medicaid and food benefits. And Republicans are hoping to get away with it by stacking the deck in the midterms, so they don’t face the consequences of their actions at the ballot box. At Trump’s demand, they’re taking unprecedented, anti-democracy measures to change the maps in order to stockpile unchecked power. A big part of our job is ensuring these anti-democracy MAGA extremists pay the price for trying to destroy our democracy. = Here’s our two-pronged approach to make this happen: Identify every attempt to manipulate maps and call out anti-democracy legislators engaging in extreme gerrymandering. Bolster the candidacies of Democracy Defenders in key state-level races this fall and throughout the midterms. We will make sure voters know what’s at stake in elections that otherwise don’t get enough attention. Peter, here’s where you come in: This is a multi-layered fight that requires people in every corner of the country, both in-person and online, to do their part. Whether it’s your time or donations, we need you with us in this fight to make sure that anyone who dares to dilute the power of voters, especially people of color, pays the price. But this is a huge undertaking. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. body:
We need your voice now...

| Hi team,

**We wanted to follow up because the GOP's efforts to weaken Social Security are not slowing down, and we can’t afford to stay silent.**

Donald Trump promised not to touch Social Security.

But once in office, he launched one of the most aggressive rollbacks in the program’s history — **slashing staff, closing offices, and making it harder for seniors and people with disabilities to access the benefits they’ve earned.**

This is a direct attack on some of the most vulnerable members of our communities. _That’s why we need your voice now._

**[Will you stand with us and sign the petition to defend Social Security before our deadline at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113386260/563597513/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWI1MTkwYS1mNzc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eJt07V9nezHJBM3MBr3s8kOIlmfq2cMKolPvOvWuCFs=&emci=f67aa783-e679-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=11b5190a-f779-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113386261/563597516/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250815_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWI1MTkwYS1mNzc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eJt07V9nezHJBM3MBr3s8kOIlmfq2cMKolPvOvWuCFs=&emci=f67aa783-e679-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=11b5190a-f779-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)

**Since elected, Trump’s administration has:**

\- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce
\- Closed regional offices, cutting off access to rural and disabled Seniors
\- Created longer wait times for recipients to receive their benefits

**This is a de facto cut to a program millions of Americans rely on for financial security.**

_We need to fight back now_ – when it’s still possible for us to reverse course and prevent further harm to Social Security and Americans who rely on it for financial security.

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Child care is too expensive and too hard to find
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
As I hold town halls in all 36 counties across Oregon, one concern comes up again and again:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113386293/563597529/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDkwMTkyZi1mNzc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNt3y9ywDQQ5iADHQddmosBDoIo5VLyirLgm6CuXA-Y=&emci=db29d247-6e74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5d90192f-f779-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | As I hold town halls in all 36 counties across Oregon, one concern keeps coming up again and again: child care is too expensive and too hard to find. Families are being pushed to the brink — paying upwards of $19,000 a year for infant care in Oregon. That's more than in-state college tuition. It's unacceptable. **That's why I've cosponsored the Child Care for Working Families Act** — a comprehensive plan to make high-quality child care affordable and accessible for every family who needs it. This bill is a win for working families and small businesses across Oregon. It will:
* Cap child care costs at no more than 7% of a family's income, with many families paying nothing at all
* Expand access to child care in underserved communities, including during non-traditional hours
* Ensure child care workers are paid a living wage
* Dramatically expand access to high-quality pre-K and strengthen the Head Start program.

We can't keep asking working families to make impossible choices between paying for child care or paying for food and rent. This bill is a game-changer. It's our shot at building a future where every parent can go to work knowing their kids are safe, cared for, and thriving, and every provider is treated with dignity and respect. **I'll keep fighting to move this legislation forward, build an economy that works for everyone, not just the powerful and well-connected.** Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:
