clean_body: As I hold town halls in all 36 counties across Oregon, one concern comes up again and again: | | | | As I hold town halls in all 36 counties across Oregon, one concern keeps coming up again and again: child care is too expensive and too hard to find. Families are being pushed to the brink — paying upwards of $19,000 a year for infant care in Oregon. That's more than in-state college tuition. It's unacceptable. That's why I've cosponsored the Child Care for Working Families Act — a comprehensive plan to make high-quality child care affordable and accessible for every family who needs it. This bill is a win for working families and small businesses across Oregon. It will: Cap child care costs at no more than 7% of a family's income, with many families paying nothing at all Expand access to child care in underserved communities, including during non-traditional hours Ensure child care workers are paid a living wage Dramatically expand access to high-quality pre-K and strengthen the Head Start program. We can't keep asking working families to make impossible choices between paying for child care or paying for food and rent. This bill is a game-changer. It's our shot at building a future where every parent can go to work knowing their kids are safe, cared for, and thriving, and every provider is treated with dignity and respect. I'll keep fighting to move this legislation forward, build an economy that works for everyone, not just the powerful and well-connected. clean_body: Join the grassroots Task Force standing up to Trump’s cuts | = Earlier this year, Trump’s allies in Congress proposed slashing Social Security – and they’re not backing down. 📉From raising the retirement age to gutting benefits, the attacks are escalating – and millions of seniors, veterans, and working families are at risk. We’re building a grassroots army to stop Trump’s MAGA cuts to Social Security. = | = With Trump loyalists in Congress ramping up attacks and the Social Security Administration underfunded and understaffed, our safety net is under siege. Millions depend on Social Security to cover rent, groceries, and medication. We can’t afford to lose it. And now, after the GOP’s passed the largest Medicaid cut in U.S. history, we’re staring down a coordinated campaign to dismantle every vital safety net program we have. That’s why we’re launching the Social Security Task Force – a grassroots counterforce of defenders, donors, and activists who will fight tooth and nail to protect what we’ve earned. Your donation helps us: ✅ Power petition and voter outreach in key districts ✅ Hold MAGA Republicans accountable ✅ Elect Democrats who will defend Social Security, not destroy it = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= = = Together, we’ll protect what’s ours, and stop the MAGA agenda in its tracks. Thank you, Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and protect our fragile Democracy, make a=.**

Peter, we are just hours away from my mid-month fundraising deadline. I’m the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024. Several ultra-MAGA opponents have entered the race. And GOP-aligned Super PACs are already spending millions attacking me. This is the fight ahead. And I need you by my side. Before you turn in: [Can you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me win in Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113386403/563597617/-1341868506?amount=5&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081525_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDY2OWQ1My1mNzc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_hiO4xl-8zZb-408SdkCDiUV8kf5-vo7AA4gy1BmEQ=) | | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113386406/563597618/-1341868506?amount=5&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081525_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDY2OWQ1My1mNzc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_hiO4xl-8zZb-408SdkCDiUV8kf5-vo7AA4gy1BmEQ=)**
---
When I first ran for Senate five years ago, it was because I believed the election of someone so deeply unfit for the presidency posed a danger to the country.
Many people said it couldn’t be done. But you believed — not just in me, but that our Republic is worth defending, and Georgia could lead the way.
Then we won. Not just a Senate seat, but the Senate majority for Democrats.
Now Trump has launched a power grab unprecedented in our history, abusing his power and trying to poison our Republic with fear and intimidation.
Americans are now living in fear of their own government.
I’m fighting back, but I can’t do this alone.
I need you with me.
[Please, if you can make it work, split what you can between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia before our fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113386408/563597619/-1341868506?amount=5&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081525_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDY2OWQ1My1mNzc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_hiO4xl-8zZb-408SdkCDiUV8kf5-vo7AA4gy1BmEQ=)

Before you turn in: = | | = When I first ran for Senate five years ago, it was because I believed the election of someone so deeply unfit for the presidency posed a danger to the country. Not just a Senate seat, but the Senate majority for Democrats. Now Trump has launched a power grab unprecedented in our history, abusing his power and trying to poison our Republic with fear and intimidation. Americans are now living in fear of their own government. I’m fighting back, but I can’t do this alone. I need you with me. = | = As always, Jon Ossoff | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. The Democratic Party of Georgia works year-round to elect Democrats who share our values of a strong middle class, integrity in government, and equality and justice for all Georgians. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please = | = | Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change. It's never been more important for every one of us to use our voices to speak up and be heard. But we rely on grassroots support to fuel our fight. Without you, we’re nothing. If you'd like to donate, please = | = | = | | | | ---|---|--- | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We know you probably receive a lot of emails, but we wouldn’t reach out if it weren’t important. Your support is crucial to helping elect Democrats in Georgia, but if you’d like to unsubscribe, . From all of us with the Georgia Democratic Party, thank you for your support! ** | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

| Peter, MAGA loyalist Lauren Boebert is up for reelection in 2026 — and it’s time we end her disastrous political career. Since 2020, she has backed Trump’s extremist attacks on our democracy, rights, and freedoms. Colorado — and all of America — can’t afford to see her elected to a fourth term. Thankfully, bold Democrats like Eileen Laubacher are rising to defeat Rep. Boebert. Eileen Laubacher is a retired Admiral in the U.S. Navy who has spent her life in service to our country and our democracy — and she and other Democrats will need our help to win this race. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e95ee04-cb15-40fe-9d3c-714004a942e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: Nancy Mace defends York County families from Silfab Solar manufacturing facility
body:
Nancy Mace left no doubt: she’s standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Fort Mill families in their fight to protect their health and safety. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/nancy-mace-defends-york-county-families-from-silfab-solar-manufacturing-facility?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| | **NANCY MACE DEFENDS YORK COUNTY FAMILIES FROM SILFAB SOLAR MANUFACTURING FACILITY** _Mace Stands with York County Against Hazardous Solar Project_ At a packed “Mother of ALL Town Halls” event in York County this week, Nancy Mace left no doubt: she’s standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Fort Mill families in their fight to protect their health and safety. Mace backs innovation, modern energy, and economic growth for South Carolina, but refuses to sacrifice the health and safety of South Carolina families. Her message comes as York County residents raise alarms over the controversial Silfab Solar manufacturing facility, and Mace is making it clear she won’t let big business steamroll the people she represents.
---
| [People's Agenda](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=304a620fe1&e=ddc57b5ede "People's Agenda")
---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=938be950ba&e=ddc57b5ede "DONATE")
---
| Speaking directly to concerned parents, teachers, and community members, Mace warned of the dangers posed by the plant’s proximity to schools and neighborhoods, especially the storage of hazardous chemicals like silane and hydrofluoric acid. “South Carolina is open for business, but never at the expense of the safety and trust of our people,” **Mace said.** “The residents of Fort Mill have made their voices heard. The people have questions about the Silfab Solar project and they deserve straight answers, not red tape.” Mace emphasized that her priority is protecting South Carolinians, not corporate interests. She praised the hundreds of residents who have attended public meetings, organized petitions, and refused to be ignored by county officials. “Our state thrives when businesses succeed and families feel safe in their own neighborhoods,” **Mace said.** “If I were Governor, this would have never happened in the first place.”
---
|
---
|
---
| [People's Agenda](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=ebb17d283a&e=ddc57b5ede "People's Agenda")
---
| These comments come amid an ongoing legal battle over the facility’s zoning status and safety concerns, as well as reports of past permit violations at the site. Mace linked the fight in Fort Mill to her newly launched **People’s Agenda** , a statewide campaign designed to collect YOUR input and turn local priorities into concrete wins starting on Day One.
---
| [DONATE](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=a2144182ab&e=ddc57b5ede "DONATE")
---
|
---
| **TEAM MACE**
campaign@nancymace.org
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Nancy Mace for Governor, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you signed up on NancyMace.org.

**Our mailing address is:**
Nancy Mace for Governor295 Seven Farms Dr Ste C-186Daniel Island, SC 29492-8001
[Add us to your address book](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/vcard?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&e=ddc57b5ede&c=cfdf945b7f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&t=b&e=ddc57b5ede&c=cfdf945b7f).

Here’s the deal: **The 2026 midterm elections will be our best chance in a long time to flip the House and directly challenge Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. **
But with National Republicans spending millions to target districts like mine, we’re going to need to put together a strong grassroots response to defend OR-06 and set Democrats up to rebuild our majority.
**That starts with meeting each and every fundraising goal between now and the election.** So please, if you’re with us, can you chip in any amount before midnight and help us take back the House in 2026? → **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/salinasq32025?#dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113388100/563603017/-480163815?refcode=email_081525_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWQyNDg4Yy1mOTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cT0d9rcmrcp2hq_-_nVN4BQ0yUZCPOYj2gmLS5Ny_Uk=)**

Andrea

Here’s the deal: The 2026 midterm elections will be our best chance in a long time to flip the House and directly challenge Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. But with National Republicans spending millions to target districts like mine, we’re going to need to put together a strong grassroots response to defend OR-06 and set Democrats up to rebuild our majority. That starts with meeting each and every fundraising goal between now and the election. So please, if you’re with us, can you chip in any amount before midnight and help us take back the House in 2026? → = Thank you, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States

Peter — This summer has been a busy one, and we’re not slowing down with only a few weeks left until we’re back in session. I’d love to chat with you about what I’ve been up to this summer, but if you’re short on time today, I’d ask that you please consider making a contribution before the day is over. **Donate here:[secure.actblue.com/donate/ya-em-aug25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113388348/563603828/2050919713?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250815_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2EzYmNiNC1mOTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTbkccxcbFJDk5z5KUFdVP-nQRi82X3ZKo4dLsKC0Dk=)** Unsurprisingly, after Republicans passed the largest wealth transfer in U.S. history, Mike Johnson rushed members into summer recess despite bipartisan calls for leaders to release the Epstein files. As a member of the House Committee on Oversight, I voted in favor of a subpoena of the Epstein files because the American people deserve to know the truth. But just because we’ve been on recess, doesn’t mean we’ve taken a break, Peter. It’s been an accountability summer, and our team was out across Arizona meeting with voters and letting them know exactly where their member of Congress stands. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113388351/563603832/2050919713?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250815_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2EzYmNiNC1mOTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTbkccxcbFJDk5z5KUFdVP-nQRi82X3ZKo4dLsKC0Dk=) Republicans in Arizona have shied away from hosting town halls and meeting with constituents, especially after voting yes on Trump’s disastrous budget; **the people in those communities and districts deserve leaders who are willing to answer the tough questions.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113388352/563603834/2050919713?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250815_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2EzYmNiNC1mOTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTbkccxcbFJDk5z5KUFdVP-nQRi82X3ZKo4dLsKC0Dk=) I can’t do this work without the support of this strong team — if you’re able to make a contribution before the day is over, I’d be grateful for your support: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/ya-em-aug25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113388355/563603836/2050919713?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250815_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2EzYmNiNC1mOTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTbkccxcbFJDk5z5KUFdVP-nQRi82X3ZKo4dLsKC0Dk=)** Thanks, Yassamin

Polling shows that faith in the Supreme Court has hit a record low—and with good reason.
**The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court have made Donald Trump a king in America.** They’ve given him the green light to break the law, deport immigrants to countries they’ve never been to before, fire as many federal employees as he likes, and completely reshape our judiciary, our society, and our Constitution.
**They’ve helped him attack our reproductive rights, our due process rights, our access to healthcare, and even our birthright citizenship.**
It’s clear to most Americans that the current Supreme Court isn’t interested in democracy or the Constitution. It’s interested in helping Trump and his MAGA cronies consolidate power, rig the system, and reshape our country.
**In fact, Gallup’s poll shows that only one group in America still has confidence in the Supreme Court—MAGA Republicans.**
Our Constitution doesn’t belong to the MAGA Supreme Court justices. It doesn’t belong to Donald Trump. It belongs to the people. So we want to know what YOU think.
**Do you have confidence in the current SCOTUS’s ability to protect the constitution from Donald Trump?**

subject: All hands on deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We’ve only got a few hours to go.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1868%2E582294%2Evl7QIx)
Before our midnight fundraising deadline, we wanted to give you a quick update from our donor database. ⬇️
**PAPPAS FOR SENATE SUPPORTER RECORD**
**Supporter:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250815_1_mm?amount=5&refcode=em20250815-1868&refcode2=1868_582294_vl7QIx&akid=1868%2E582294%2Evl7QIx)**

name: Bo Mitchell HQ
subject: We can’t slow down now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Mitchell for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113388901/563605694/1330170104?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250815_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQ1NDVkNjItZmE3OS1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UtYBfY4ifHEpDq3gvwIJcGe2kb-SUhXxxIgs8yevHQ8=)

| | Peter,

**First:** We set a goal to raise $5,000 by mid-month to keep up with the dark money Republicans are pouring into this race to hold on to this seat.

**Then:** We checked the numbers, and we’re still coming up short — and every day we fall behind is a day Republicans have the chance to get ahead.

**Now:** [_**We’re asking for your help to close the gap so we can reach voters, fight back against right-wing attack ads, and flip this seat. Will you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113388904/563605700/1208376426?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250815_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQ1NDVkNjItZmE3OS1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UtYBfY4ifHEpDq3gvwIJcGe2kb-SUhXxxIgs8yevHQ8=)

Bo is running for Congress because working families deserve a representative who will stand up for them — not billionaire donors or corporate special interests. He’s spent his career fighting for affordable health care, stronger public schools, and an economy that works for everyone. That’s the same fight he’ll take to Washington, because we deserve a leader who will put people first, every single time — whereas the House GOP just passed a bill that will kick hundreds of thousands of Tennesseans off of their health insurance for the sake of tax giveaways for the ultra-wealthy.

**But we only have a few months to make it happen.** What we raise right now will help decide whether we can compete, organize, and win right here in Tennessee — or whether Republicans and their dark-money backers drown us out.

It’s one of our first chances to tell Donald Trump and his allies that we’re not happy with the massive bill they passed to give the wealthiest a tax break at working families’ expense — and to show it at the ballot box. **So we can’t afford to lose a single minute.**

[_**Right now, if you’re ready to be part of this fight, will you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can to send Bo to fight for us in the House and strike a blow to the GOP’s dark money machine? Then: We checked the numbers, and we’re still coming up short — and every day we fall behind is a day Republicans have the chance to get ahead. Now: = Bo is running for Congress because working families deserve a representative who will stand up for them — not billionaire donors or corporate special interests. He’s spent his career fighting for affordable health care, stronger public schools, and an economy that works for everyone. That’s the same fight he’ll take to Washington, because we deserve a leader who will put people first, every single time — whereas the House GOP just passed a bill that will kick hundreds of thousands of Tennesseans off of their health insurance for the sake of tax giveaways for the ultra-wealthy. But we only have a few months to make it happen. What we raise right now will help decide whether we can compete, organize, and win right here in Tennessee — or whether Republicans and their dark-money backers drown us out. It’s one of our first chances to tell Donald Trump and his allies that we’re not happy with the massive bill they passed to give the wealthiest a tax break at working families’ expense — and to show it at the ballot box. clean_body: To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! | Fellow American, I’ll be blunt. To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! If we start missing our fundraising deadlines, we’ll have to start slashing key components of our campaign infrastructure. Right now, we’re in serious danger of falling short of tonight’s mid-month fundraising objective by just a few dollars. In a race as contested as the one we’re facing, we need every part of our campaign running at full speed now through Election Day. I know it doesn’t seem like a lot, but donations from patriots like you across the country add up fast. I don’t have the luxury of leaning on coastal elites and Leftist megadonors to keep my campaign running. Your support is the lifeblood of my campaign’s fight to keep this Senate seat and our Senate Majority in Republican hands. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Did you see my note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
humbly asking one more time

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=580%2E49239%2EOjqV-m)
null, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 203 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and**I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking one more time:[Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=580%2E49239%2EOjqV-m)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=580%2E49239%2EOjqV-m)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.

Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: What I'm hearing from folks like you
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4575?t=4&akid=580%2E49239%2EOjqV-m)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save over 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now because I'm ready to ensure my hard work in the U.S. Senate continues to support Michigan's working families.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign today? My team set an ambitious goal to get 25,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 29% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=580%2E49239%2EOjqV-m)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=580%2E49239%2EOjqV-m)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=580%2E49239%2EOjqV-m) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4575?t=8&akid=580%2E49239%2EOjqV-m)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: Look at this flag
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
The oath I took to protect and serve Old Glory has taken me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the depths of our oceans and into the shadows where danger lived. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f10b113584d4853912f7646446c484c&_e=KmLIKwhwblnqMHlCa02KhQWLV0SrRUfqIRDUKry0fjcnugbzGqSnkn4H9v5zFgL8xH98HZS36oVb74wBB26PX-qYxLsQ2aTz-KoSWWEuIzgYE1ZwvdFMkIMwMqJ2W2qqtvuNs0531R5ssaWmaHBMfV-c3dCjZ111zSSfIFvt_yBjRGEihgjZECN67O8TiXC1u5V16N9IOHq5PJqO4pIaevD0WUHBcbufIf0WV9NLxlcyEHCKd46ErUNUU9Iu7Hfqpe2OJ5VZPNcaaRLnGsUBf7F4vNwH--1DRSGjPllB3z0tcVU5ngdczpE3ubB-4yUVaniQVpc83MvAFsShKJV4RRWTlpMuBvbJSlsghmxGXt9r2Ot8pyrPddZPbYkwmtWjscA5ii2t7icfZFGRlcnpGquadchPCChiKF-Cj48G3ObhQ60rJw88KI1oQb9jAEhrqWWIc6izQB0lpHC6o3haWXVxKcJtyUsn9OpF4v9VDpwfYdAdB81mZ5av3QqwwX125rATT2jKx1yAQRt1k3O44KiBQGV6KEToTTX5LIHBSIizCGBhkvC3gF_Qv5o8IMoK6Xubf0Hu0yBI-pUrc2aaud8t9O9LaLTTUhXxd-YEjv5zMqrEmGp9nD5tbACkgRKFyY09_WpIzZ01l8GvQ5YBkTbDRnZpTUpTBaUp3O5BnHQv8p6f5RImPAU8LV8i6mRAUPt29QAYcBdvKYcLbEsiRw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away?**

I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this _**critical email**_ right now.

I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, **I decided: I would fight for my country.**

_[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f10b113584d4853912f7646446c484c&_e=KmLIKwhwblnqMHlCa02KhQWLV0SrRUfqIRDUKry0fjcnugbzGqSnkn4H9v5zFgL8t5ocLV368Dvr18tnaD3ow5ssW5V3cq0H5-8ai7QUoe72c6ymHvA5u0z1wC20iyfSEJwvY5zuPVJ1zzGHtuXzM1kLGIkvFPHZggJa8R42VddABW6DeOgI8yB4DxDs7mJaHk4vZ5AklRXWgkYWBs569EH4Z8cKAjLTyxTDiVnFrVdGulEnWy6ZiLLF8WKzFVZVP10g9TlNQTHS5uYWsvGRPrQDJTS-PbJT2jm4egJQIw4r89zbyj-nvOfmjfe09c5T220QZnM2-RhsSVHNYBgYXgnJd_4lLFYdT4diJDISDbXxep6gT44nVNS9e29flnzXZS1EMxoXqErspJiISA0qBepyqPry9XW8RD02OeQsHJRaTAn2uSwVbtDDgvv_2VcP4teWgDAdhiZ9uQOZyd3aWRfRHD9EfVqum0KIWgnp-COHew3XMEDIqbAyW4-vvrvDW8xC6HqZ6iiidD_9Flv0dfFMcbIfnf_ZRrdKg8NuIRFLo2Jrld3m-Fnk3wK6A1jAYGT7Af2t9k3rfue5OejCLHkzQVdXN-1SfLciyMlhdXzYIipk6Ql_NeFqPRgdC5g4PvRzrHCXyHQk-FA69ORzFbgErXPgTirmxlphZ5pVxtpX4fWM72bxKroYfS3_MTpQgF4LFhLdMf8vLa-26Ft28itqVWoit498JNEg85sx1JM%3D)_
My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs.

Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f10b113584d4853912f7646446c484c&_e=KmLIKwhwblnqMHlCa02KhQWLV0SrRUfqIRDUKry0fjcnugbzGqSnkn4H9v5zFgL8xH98HZS36oVb74wBB26PX-qYxLsQ2aTz-KoSWWEuIzgYE1ZwvdFMkIMwMqJ2W2qqtvuNs0531R5ssaWmaHBMfV-c3dCjZ111zSSfIFvt_yBjRGEihgjZECN67O8TiXC1u5V16N9IOHq5PJqO4pIaevD0WUHBcbufIf0WV9NLxlcyEHCKd46ErUNUU9Iu7Hfq0aDnz0GE48D3QAjxT15n9jjNTCC_G0mt4f3iVFhwkU6YfKCDi6flhQqqmRFMiSxoMJtigi5_rJAebaEQ1BQPlVfbjYuBxKfZ-8xfkH_lhVOPZDrWErWAn6KOK1v_OdUuBkQcUnE1cEQy8adgZlCdb-7jnokGDnV7B-Fpom6Kr5AJF_cvMJdVUaEmvdTM5G1yNlDKDa7of2oge7n8eJmZ7gowwGrjNHxPqv_GE4VJOJSWo0kkmAfIP_bpbX4aU1rfp-gcfYDkuzEapmM3W7Oo-mdRrSgVVa1IvZkzOrqwbngMF0CGzjsK21-IKIMDwYy6SyJ-VOfAiVejugKMwJtAQ4usHO-TyTh4lS5UOnp3Nx1CU4u_yJ3ya6XMOUbLy-DVJRRwnJC9wBzLejtQ2V5p58-Xg3rBQltDdv_iMHq5f6drhQbDop7xvGUCD6FEJElmqFWjNbF0X3UbsDToAg4_2g%3D%3D)
For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight.

But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield.

While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs.

While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with.

This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away.

**[Do you have $1 you can spare today to help me and my team get this U.S. Senate campaign off the ground? We could really use the help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f10b113584d4853912f7646446c484c&_e=KmLIKwhwblnqMHlCa02KhQWLV0SrRUfqIRDUKry0fjcnugbzGqSnkn4H9v5zFgL8xH98HZS36oVb74wBB26PX-qYxLsQ2aTz-KoSWWEuIzgYE1ZwvdFMkIMwMqJ2W2qqtvuNs0531R5ssaWmaHBMfV-c3dCjZ111zSSfIFvt_yBjRGEihgjZECN67O8TiXC1u5V16N9IOHq5PJqO4pIaevD0WUHBcbufIf0WV9NLxlcyEHCKd46ErUNUU9Iu7HfqT7c624Q6MXsimyG0K9CtMaDjk7WiyJsGkg0dqi3AD2bYc-C8SmQUm24bX8CBM_6DmhRae7kaehT2m6H-MBonW4mS8z-DxeL-FCNC7kpTp6RxhgmGSL3q5iTRld-JJ4rX0qtLImZNmv3I0YKESmZe-DHbH_ROwYWFkHzIraU88eXfjsv_DbYDcLKAGW0Bzas8q09Ulurg0syyTlPShq1BP9WgGOojMeOiwXDEnSKMT0LGJ_A_V8UEucs_VhEkcqdRMMi9n3Ri5emsP61QAESV2BYgYY8Qtb7LMea-cBfVdXs8PBosltendWzFyHsGeZz5L_hyDx3YhG-BZPDqsRFI0DNS3rZXHqsuyikYLXF-6UBbIvHqF7boQnphhQkKxEbQ-Id5S8Hbl5foVivAkwZ6RWmUNUOyyfp5zPy_oCf57h450Y7nZj762o9B8NVKbbcpWNL4ylykxrpsSUb5G-l48A%3D%3D)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f10b113584d4853912f7646446c484c&_e=KmLIKwhwblnqMHlCa02KhQWLV0SrRUfqIRDUKry0fjcnugbzGqSnkn4H9v5zFgL8xH98HZS36oVb74wBB26PX-qYxLsQ2aTz-KoSWWEuIzgYE1ZwvdFMkIMwMqJ2W2qqtvuNs0531R5ssaWmaHBMfV-c3dCjZ111zSSfIFvt_yBjRGEihgjZECN67O8TiXC1u5V16N9IOHq5PJqO4pIaevD0WUHBcbufIf0WV9NLxlcyEHCKd46ErUNUU9Iu7HfqiNBeV85bgWFfSt55sjkLmX2DKPpirRPeNMC7AOLcLNLXNsWno2MTinuYfYbEJ0zOpp6FZmDDv1gSiJwVwpTjJYxGDXdybKW1nW7TlEGuzydtV3Xzfv8ZeFT9-YYltbwm6hOQ47a8rarIHd0R7BQWzrQ9DqcDXqyyOTbWmPap1FSQpdU-5SLP5wPi9yNpzU8wLS6A3rZcTv20bPj4zUwzxhic7YwAKOzWUJd7-xs5eH0qYPCBCdlKwZc1uEhJaYY8Iosh5tFXYvnG2xRMpg5dxxmi_NWNI7qyjFJyfqJ31WwXL9EhYqJFuyMS7C7SDC6R6KKB3YGncebcanSFX7MyD-pkhWE7hXt8icRJFrk3VSdbfq4IAMYP_vf9q-RlH75heOc326wp7Xplq7DoLci0jv_efFaCvKcB4JETcju2isnP5dJCQF3ETj-UR2Z_aPibPqmtpUXf1y6KQ4e3-vketA%3D%3D)

**I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform.**

I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies.

We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever.

The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. _**My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund.**_
**
[I’m not asking for much, but even $1 will do the trick now.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f10b113584d4853912f7646446c484c&_e=KmLIKwhwblnqMHlCa02KhQWLV0SrRUfqIRDUKry0fjcnugbzGqSnkn4H9v5zFgL8xH98HZS36oVb74wBB26PX-qYxLsQ2aTz-KoSWWEuIzgYE1ZwvdFMkIMwMqJ2W2qqtvuNs0531R5ssaWmaHBMfV-c3dCjZ111zSSfIFvt_yBjRGEihgjZECN67O8TiXC1u5V16N9IOHq5PJqO4pIaevD0WUHBcbufIf0WV9NLxlcyEHCKd46ErUNUU9Iu7HfqJ87WwgggNq2YBMNVJMbg2fuAg4DVoNjmziz8y6vD7iACP4SwBDTwr1-gtBxH2IEfId6zOxRkRmVg-K3LYCsT84QJOyB6X0YiT7tzcrW1C8JgSAD1pKvSCHLVU4muNJrzmq4G-r2hwURL3gPI5rfH6L6eJpqKEqjm-ScDBRObLFpUqFH1uKJ4g-43_ciMhz7Ve_nuTccb-kU7KpIoo54j7u3l8HW7UYhIUQBr-XTnTEwpI9HrwGdi8lzwM4jBaO6TDwEbdvTNcBx28xG9HZbZwscQFFHNSH_f-k-j-cuFMxHKOGh5tl9UysDz3DItsumjKaugC58Gsr3wbtCo2XWLHQYlQSLbsaEruSsl79Uagz_A5jxfQZ-cxVWHebYDED8Pf6eqkoBl4gw4R_ke-nXIy5H_rGhCYxrEM1288lkkCtp3UeFNpjaQzMgOPsy_1QEznT7moZhT4GufC9BkFgE5gg%3D%3D) **

We will rebuild our economy so working people can live with dignity and opportunity.

We will put parents back in charge of their children’s education.

We will defend the Constitution — every single word of it.

But I can’t do it alone.

**I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything.
**
I know what our flag stands for. And I will never stop fighting for it.

For a better tomorrow,

clean_body: The oath I took to protect and serve Old Glory has taken me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the depths of our oceans and into the shadows where danger lived. | Fellow Conservative, Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away? I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this critical email right now. I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, I decided: I would fight for my country. My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs. Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived. For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight. But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield. While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs. While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with. This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away. I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform. I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies. We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever. The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund. I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago. We will secure our border so we can welcome those who love America — and send criminals packing. We will rebuild our economy so working people can live with dignity and opportunity. We will put parents back in charge of their children’s education. We will defend the Constitution — every single word of it. But I can’t do it alone. I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything. I know what our flag stands for. And I will never stop fighting for it. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: The Democrat machine will pour tens of millions into Minnesota to try to crush this campaign before most voters even hear my name. They want a senator who will rubber-stamp their agenda. I’m not that man — and that’s why they’ll do whatever it takes to stop me. As a fellow American who loves this country, , will fuel this fight and send a message that America is worth defending. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Peter, Congress might be out of Washington in August, but that doesn’t mean our race to flip the House is stopping. Here’s the latest from HQ:
* **Republicans are using delay tactics on BBB to hide the truth.** They know kicking people off healthcare is unpopular, so their spending bill -- the largest transfer of wealth from the poor to the ultra-rich in U.S. history -- won’t take effect until after the 2026 midterms. We can’t let voters forget what they’ve done.

* **Meanwhile, Republicans support of Trump’s tariffs is hurting Illinois families _right now._** I’m committed to bringing American manufacturing back to IL-17, but we’re not going to do it by jacking up prices of basic needs. Small businesses and families are paying for these stupid tariffs – and I’m working every day to stop them.

We need a Congress that works for the people, not just the richest 1%. And on the campaign trail, it’s our job to show voters there’s a better way forward. But as you know, it takes resources to break through the noise: [**Tonight at midnight is our mid-quarter fundraising deadline, and we need $10,000 before 11:59 to stay on track. clean_body: | = Peter, Congress might be out of Washington in August, but that doesn’t mean our race to flip the House is stopping. Here’s the latest from HQ: Republicans are using delay tactics on BBB to hide the truth. They know kicking people off healthcare is unpopular, so their spending bill -- the largest transfer of wealth from the poor to the ultra-rich in U.S. history -- won’t take effect until after the 2026 midterms. We can’t let voters forget what they’ve done. Meanwhile, Republicans support of Trump’s tariffs is hurting Illinois families right now. I’m committed to bringing American manufacturing back to IL-17, but we’re not going to do it by jacking up prices of basic needs. Small businesses and families are paying for these stupid tariffs – and I’m working every day to stop them. We need a Congress that works for the people, not just the richest 1%. And on the campaign trail, it’s our job to show voters there’s a better way forward. body:
From playing games with our economy, to slashing critical assistance programs, and giving massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113390691/563610720/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZlZDg0Yy1mZTc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=68SAbrvti1hqcngnbNxyqPIFCTfUuc-r5WXl4VNrUmE=)
---
| | | To all of Linda’s supporters,

We know you’ve heard from us a lot lately, but this message is important and we hope you’ll read until the end.

Linda Sánchez is working every day as a champion for working families. Tensions have never been higher, and we need your help to win in this fight.
---
| | This is the bottom line:

Republicans have taken one of the slimmest majorities in history and used it to ram through the most extreme, unjust, and cruel agenda.

From playing games with our economy, to slashing critical assistance programs, and giving massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy.
---
| | There’s a way out of this madness. We must look forward and focus on flipping the House in 2026.

As the Chair of BOLD PAC, Linda is proud to be spearheading the fight to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. While Trump and the Republicans create chaos across the country, Linda is putting in the hours to ensure our representatives reflect our communities and are standing up to GOP extremism.
---
| | Summer is a challenging time for fundraising, and we’re counting on you to help us continue fighting for Democrats across the country. Our average contribution is just $15 — this might not sound like a lot, but with all of your support, it adds up!

clean_body: From playing games with our economy, to slashing critical assistance programs, and giving massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. | = | | | To all of Linda’s supporters, We know you’ve heard from us a lot lately, but this message is important and we hope you’ll read until the end. Linda Sánchez is working every day as a champion for working families. Tensions have never been higher, and we need your help to win in this fight. | | This is the bottom line: Republicans have taken one of the slimmest majorities in history and used it to ram through the most extreme, unjust, and cruel agenda. From playing games with our economy, to slashing critical assistance programs, and giving massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. | | There’s a way out of this madness. We must look forward and focus on flipping the House in 2026. As the Chair of BOLD PAC, Linda is proud to be spearheading the fight to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. While Trump and the Republicans create chaos across the country, Linda is putting in the hours to ensure our representatives reflect our communities and are standing up to GOP extremism. | | Summer is a challenging time for fundraising, and we’re counting on you to help us continue fighting for Democrats across the country. Our average contribution is just $15 — this might not sound like a lot, but with all of your support, it adds up! | | = | = | | Thank you for your support. name: Team Lizzie
subject: Tomorrow—Join the Fight for Fair Maps on National Redistricting Day of Action!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
In case you missed it, Lizzie was on the Bulwark talking to her friend Sarah Longwell about why the fight for fair maps in Texas is important to the fight for democracy. You can watch their conversation here [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eDSnWpf9SeQ] or listen to it here [https://audioboom.com/posts/8760986-cornyn-calls-fbi-on-texas-democrats-w-rep-lizzie-fletcher] .
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eDSnWpf9SeQ [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eDSnWpf9SeQ]
As Lizzie has explained, what is happening in Texas is bigger than Texas. The fight in Texas isn’t just about one map or one state’s politics. It’s about the future of our democracy. That’s why tomorrow is a National Day of Action. Here’s how you can participate:
1. Attend the Fight The Trump Takeover Rally in Austin, Texas!
https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/824964 [https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/824964]
SIGN UP! [https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/824964]
2. Phonebank with Team Lizzie to Fight The Trump Takeover!
Staying in H-Town? Stay cool in the A/C with Team Lizzie at a phonebank at our campaign HQ in Houston to call voters and let them know what's happening! We'll encourage them to join the fight against this anti-democratic Trump takeover.
WHEN
Saturday, August 16, 2025
1 P.M. - 4 P.M.
WHERE
Team Lizzie Campaign HQ
Sign up to phonebank here: https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/827410/ [https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/827410/]
People across the country are taking a stand to protect Texans, Americans, and democracy itself. We will continue to fight the Trump Texas Takeover, and are grateful to be in the fight with you.
Thanks and we hope to see you tomorrow!
Team Lizzie

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250815?refcode=lpfe250815]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS

name: [91 SPACES REMAIN FOR LOCAL DEMOCRATS] Sign the Card >>>>> (via FFR)
subject: SIGN THE CARD: Thank you, Cory Booker!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23294%2E4449941%2E8t26av) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23294%2E4449941%2E8t26av) [**“DON'T BEND THE KNEE TO TRUMP”**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66323?t=3&akid=23294%2E4449941%2E8t26av)
[_Cory Booker to fellow members of the Democratic Party_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66323?t=4&akid=23294%2E4449941%2E8t26av) []()
Cory Booker has done something extraordinary: he’s spoken truth to power, challenging Donald Trump directly and condemning those who would surrender their integrity by bending to his will.

_Our Democracy truly depends on leaders like him._

If you share our gratitude for Cory’s unwavering voice, please add your name to our thank-you card before 11:59PM tonight. **THANK YOU, CORY BOOKER!!** | [SIGN THE CARD BEFORE 11:59PM >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66323?t=5&akid=23294%2E4449941%2E8t26av)
---
**↓↓ SEE CARD BELOW ↓↓**

Senator,

I want to sincerely thank you for your powerful words and unwavering courage in speaking out against Donald Trump.

In moments like these, leadership matters. Your voice inspires hope, strengthens resolve, and reminds us that integrity still has a place in politics. Please know that your words are heard, felt, and deeply appreciated by so many of us across the country.

Thank you for showing us what it means to lead with conviction and to fight for what’s right.

With gratitude,

x _YOUR NAME HERE_

[SIGN THE CARD BEFORE 11:59PM >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66323?t=6&akid=23294%2E4449941%2E8t26av)
---

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113391089/563611793/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2E4NGI3OS1mZjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kcx4WMMhnFw_eEAeW4JEwjCAlcBMUYTpahpvdAAcA7o=&emci=efa84b79-ff79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f3a84b79-ff79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5944223)
Peter, We launched this campaign just over five months ago with a promise to continue building something real -- a movement powered by the people of western Wisconsin. Everywhere I go, I meet new friends and neighbors who are ready to roll up their sleeves and flip this seat. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113391090/563611794/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2E4NGI3OS1mZjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kcx4WMMhnFw_eEAeW4JEwjCAlcBMUYTpahpvdAAcA7o=) Working people across western Wisconsin know we can win this race. and extremist Republicans know it too. Flipping WI-03 blue would be a major step toward ending disastrous tariffs, stopping healthcare cuts, and protecting our farmers, workers, and local economy. There’s still a long road ahead, but we have the grassroots strength to put Wisconsin back on the right path and win back the House. We just have to keep going: [**I’m hoping we can raise another $25,000 in online donations before the end of the month to stay on track. We’re picking up momentum, and your $3 donation could be the one that puts us over the top. Please chip in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113391091/563611795/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2E4NGI3OS1mZjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kcx4WMMhnFw_eEAeW4JEwjCAlcBMUYTpahpvdAAcA7o=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | ****[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113391092/563611796/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.15.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2E4NGI3OS1mZjc5LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kcx4WMMhnFw_eEAeW4JEwjCAlcBMUYTpahpvdAAcA7o=)****

clean_body: | Peter, We launched this campaign just over five months ago with a promise to continue building something real -- a movement powered by the people of western Wisconsin. Everywhere I go, I meet new friends and neighbors who are ready to roll up their sleeves and flip this seat. = Working people across western Wisconsin know we can win this race. and extremist Republicans know it too. Flipping WI-03 blue would be a major step toward ending disastrous tariffs, stopping healthcare cuts, and protecting our farmers, workers, and local economy. There’s still a long road ahead, but we have the grassroots strength to put Wisconsin back on the right path and win back the House. We just have to keep going: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= | = | | = | = | | = | = Take care, Rebecca | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. name: Carolina, United We Dream
subject: 🚨Tell Congress: Stop the unlawful abduction of DACA recipients!
body:
13 years ago, the first DACA application was accepted — our future is still on the line. | | | Peter, **On this day, thirteen years ago, the first DACA application was accepted** — opening up a world of possibilities for thousands of young people across the country. Since then, our communities have withstood a decade of attacks by anti-immigrant officials that have tried at every turn to rip apart our communities and destroy the program. **From the steps of the Supreme Court in 2020 to the 5th Circuit Court just last year, it’s been us****– immigrant youth, allies, everyday neighbors, and friends – who have kept DACA alive through our resilience and tenacity.** Today's anniversary serves as a wake-up call for Congress that DACA is being dismantled right in front of us. From California to Texas, ICE has been unlawfully abducting DACA recipients. Just last week, [Xóchitl Santiago,](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVjFCsr01WA1qZxqks3tbrGR9eChp9VeTcDsGcMg4u3uLe4HGkqEYOpO_DdddrDCOQaOpFDf2F19QWo6HMSq8EfrahZNXpkRUkWXQWtczQY0yYbAkx0I4EETXvUYwbNL34-tk5f5IX7Z1AbhgyfoROaJcdsPehgQWMdW0NOgJgJEXSb7GrksXkFdR_LaCrdQaZcPwkVrMzB32JWG5sguQZe98mtCaLWk7gZJRhpltVKNa1W-9vA6BCe1-XbmsJ6YFnqD0iV34uo_RtV0N_bCn4KUn0a68d1HGX_rgPccrQuK-UFjQcIkRnh4790_RY7mFTYfbfZs0zUs1_uTXanUxTrOvCOlb1c8PxTwcUaJ5EEM91cSjKsxcTDuJRo5i7ZWtJxUalTVJHNrzCj05soCD_Y/4j2/5c-ZPgs8Re2akxnzYzNTjw/h0/h001.73kpnBsWYrgjRw0STzncFqpt8hwWbGOxLO3hHLGoRLc) a DACA recipient and beloved community organizer, was detained in El Paso despite presenting a valid DACA work authorization card. With ICE and CBP repeatedly violating the protections afforded under DACA, Congress must take urgent action before all that is left is a shell of the program that immigrant youth and our allies won 13 years ago.**✍️Send a letter to your members of Congress today to demand permanent protections for the millions of immigrants who power our country and the immediate release of thousands more currently missing from our communities:** **[Send a Letter](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-NMu6uQ8vzg87ihLv-GIGiJYfXXzf2FyEMhKsHWpCTCuGhNZs5iOqZcL_5oV4VE62Yey_tT5GNZWlNoQRl3NUZmSWqXJEVCyQnIAUAWaYUmhQQA9GHtL8SFr1I6Oz2AgFDjTGTV3q7P-reGqAYPg2Cq45Gzj97QQ0cEqHPgoD-HFDcY773yqgDrwGmoB7WHWqFm3-pilT6ekjycUFzhzGTKuqzzidp4ir6a8LTPxIC1IJM1NvcepkXGt4j0Sw50dqkUvqlS6GhCciUsPaxHARvtSG3tUSGOYrZ4y2UFL_A7Bj64CpQ6dFeLONSxOyrVt7Mnh2EdaF1h7TnhuA7hqUtH9CTJCQARVVWYi7to8k_kG7F71Tk2NczRnn-4TgFAKo/4j2/5c-ZPgs8Re2akxnzYzNTjw/h1/h001.SY1OmqIhyxkhvNHtzYnOVjBEa3xrjk_glRinhyvv4ek)** recipients and tens of thousands of immigrant youth without DACA continue to face escalating threats to their safety, rights, and lives. **Without permanent protections in place, more and more of the people who power this country — workers, students, parents — will continue to be torn from our communities.** Congress cannot sit by while millions of lives are at risk.****[**Demand Congress bring our neighbors back and stop the abduction of more of our immigrant loved ones!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-NMu6uQ8vzg87ihLv-GIGiJYfXXzf2FyEMhKsHWpCTCuGhNZs5iOqZcL_5oV4VE62Yey_tT5GNZWlNoQRl3NUZmSWqXJEVCyQnIAUAWaYUmhQQA9GHtL8SFr1I6Oz2AgFDjTGTV3q7P-reGqAYPg2CZcRBmRo77wCe9rMLwymzPCP-szsgt08NJu2y7qmj7doS5ts-xevXjXbzLovEGUd74NxIbdRYPzy8TXQU0xrTAWqr4daNoyOxtw2X4psgkgHPmpEMWkYEzGgTV2wGQ-VhPNaTuxzIwxxBFm6WtXrA23vSajKs63e9LWqP8_UZPYCiFNS_2H0iZIyOLTQ9SJTa2ARHYsVemercc4VFvAmbAYKO_qoA_cDRhPOV1NXPhow/4j2/5c-ZPgs8Re2akxnzYzNTjw/h3/h001.g8ZoKFBq_dChgRKHHjOCDKmdi8O8u7fTZFJj6XaOW6Q) clean_body: 13 years ago, the first DACA application was accepted — our future is still on the line. | | | Peter, On this day, thirteen years ago, the first DACA application was accepted — opening up a world of possibilities for thousands of young people across the country. Since then, our communities have withstood a decade of attacks by anti-immigrant officials that have tried at every turn to rip apart our communities and destroy the program. From the steps of the Supreme Court in 2020 to the 5th Circuit Court just last year, it’s been us– immigrant youth, allies, everyday neighbors, and friends – who have kept DACA alive through our resilience and tenacity. Today's anniversary serves as a wake-up call for Congress that DACA is being dismantled right in front of us. From California to Texas, ICE has been unlawfully abducting DACA recipients. Just last week, a DACA recipient and beloved community organizer, was detained in El Paso despite presenting a valid DACA work authorization card. With ICE and CBP repeatedly violating the protections afforded under DACA, Congress must take urgent action before all that is left is a shell of the program that immigrant youth and our allies won 13 years ago.✍️Send a letter to your members of Congress today to demand permanent protections for the millions of immigrants who power our country and the immediate release of thousands more currently missing from our communities: recipients and tens of thousands of immigrant youth without DACA continue to face escalating threats to their safety, rights, and lives. Without permanent protections in place, more and more of the people who power this country — workers, students, parents — will continue to be torn from our communities. Congress cannot sit by while millions of lives are at risk.** In unity, Carolina and the rest of the UWD team P.S.: To win, we need each other. Empower your community to join us in the fight to protect our future. Share our latest post with your friends and family today: ** | Follow us on: | | | | |

subject: I will stand up to Greg Abbott

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113391685/563613084/-1155896112?refcode=WUEFH829_20250815_EdwardsSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056823&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJiYWRhNC0wMDdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eamHWf0Q5ls-eexC0DgT4sjf2CmuwSvcshmriSsj6eY=) Peter,

My name is Amanda Edwards, and I'm running for the U.S. House in Texas's 18th Congressional District. So for me, Republican gerrymandering is _personal_.

Because right now in Texas, redistricting isn’t just some political chess game;**it's about whose voices count.** And Greg Abbott is working overtime to rewrite the rules in TX-18 before voters even cast a ballot. Communities that have long been the heart of TX-18 are being carved up for political gain.

I'm not here to play defense. I'm here to fight against this Republican scheme. That's why I am so honored to have EMILYs List by my side in this fight.

clean_body: Will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List? | = Peter, My name is Amanda Edwards, and I'm running for the U.S. House in Texas's 18th Congressional District. So for me, Republican gerrymandering is personal. Because right now in Texas, redistricting isn’t just some political chess game;it's about whose voices count. And Greg Abbott is working overtime to rewrite the rules in TX-18 before voters even cast a ballot. Communities that have long been the heart of TX-18 are being carved up for political gain. I'm not here to play defense. I'm here to fight against this Republican scheme. That's why I am so honored to have EMILYs List by my side in this fight. If we're going to overcome these attacks, we need a strong grassroots surge. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = They may control the maps, but we control the movement. Our latest poll has our campaign in the lead but we know we need your help in order to keep up the momentum. Let's show them what our political power really looks like. Onwards, Amanda K. name: John Fetterman
subject: I only have a couple minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Derek – I wanted to send a note in between meetings. Three things:

1. Trump’s Medicaid cuts are about to wallop PA.

300,000 folks losing coverage. Rural hospitals? Closing. Seniors? Kicked out of nursing homes. ERs? Overwhelmed. Families? Crushed by medical bills.

2. Republicans don’t give a damn.

They’ve made it clear – they’re not here for working people. Just their rich buddies and special interests. No negotiating with that. Not anymore.

3. We fight back by kicking them out.

No more Trump lapdogs in Congress. No more excuses. We flip seats. We take back power. We stop the cuts.

But here’s the thing: We’re running out of time. I’ve got until midnight tonight to hit my $30,000 mid-month goal.

We’re close. But not there yet.

My campaign's powered by ordinary working folks. Not the super rich or special interests. So I have to ask: Will you throw in a few bucks – $5, $25, whatever you can swing – to help us close the gap?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51575?t=1001&akid=10255%2E434096%2EKvPFCN

Let’s show these clowns the door. 🥾🤡

I know you're busy. Thanks for taking the time to read this.

John ❤️

Sent from my iPhone

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=10255%2E434096%2EKvPFCN

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” just screwed us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Hey friend, Last month, House Republicans rammed through what Donald Trump is proudly calling the “One Big Beautiful Bill.” Let's be honest: it's one big toxic mess. **The truth? This bill is nothing but a greedy handout to billionaires and a slap in the face to the rest of us. While Trump and his MAGA inner circle pop champagne, working families get stuck with higher prices, fewer services, and an even more rigged system.** How This Bill Hurts America:
* **You pay at the register:** Tariffs work like a tax that gets passed straight to consumers. Need groceries, home repairs, or new clothes? You’re paying more now.
* **Inflation is surging:** Data just out shows inflation picking up steam, with the rising costs directly fueled by these new Trump tariffs.
* **American jobs at risk:** European officials warn that these tariffs could effectively shut down transatlantic trade, threatening millions of jobs on both sides. Experts say supply chains and small businesses are on the chopping block.
* **No real plan—just pain:** Instead of a strategy to help American workers, Trump is sticking families and businesses with the bill, all while destabilizing the economy.

Trump calls that “beautiful.” I call it exactly what it is: reckless, cruel, and dangerously out of touch. **I fought this bill at every single step—because someone has to stand up for families while Trump plays pretend populist. But now that it’s law, the fight shifts: we need to stay loud, expose every piece of the fallout, and protect those getting steamrolled.** **Here’s the deal: Seth Moulton and I can’t do that on my own. clean_body: | Hey friend, Last month, House Republicans rammed through what Donald Trump is proudly calling the “One Big Beautiful Bill.” Let's be honest: it's one big toxic mess. The truth? This bill is nothing but a greedy handout to billionaires and a slap in the face to the rest of us. While Trump and his MAGA inner circle pop champagne, working families get stuck with higher prices, fewer services, and an even more rigged system. How This Bill Hurts America: You pay at the register: Tariffs work like a tax that gets passed straight to consumers. Need groceries, home repairs, or new clothes? You’re paying more now. Inflation is surging: Data just out shows inflation picking up steam, with the rising costs directly fueled by these new Trump tariffs. American jobs at risk: European officials warn that these tariffs could effectively shut down transatlantic trade, threatening millions of jobs on both sides. Experts say supply chains and small businesses are on the chopping block. No real plan—just pain: Instead of a strategy to help American workers, Trump is sticking families and businesses with the bill, all while destabilizing the economy. Trump calls that “beautiful.” I call it exactly what it is: reckless, cruel, and dangerously out of touch. I fought this bill at every single step—because someone has to stand up for families while Trump plays pretend populist. But now that it’s law, the fight shifts: we need to stay loud, expose every piece of the fallout, and protect those getting steamrolled. Here’s the deal: Seth Moulton and I can’t do that on my own. = Thanks for not sitting this one out—and for staying in the fight when it counts. Onward, Eric & Seth = [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: Clarissa
subject: Excited to Join the ECU Team!
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Hello Friend! I am thrilled to introduce myself as the new Organizing Manager her at End Citizens United. It is an honor to join this incredible team in the fight to end government corruption and root out the corrosive influence of dark money in politics. I began organizing work in 2016 as an organizer on Gov. Steve Bollock's re-election campaign. It was there I saw firsthand the power of grassroots energy in shaping elections. Most recently, I served as Organizing Manager and Distributed Director for the 2024 North Carolina Coordinated Campaign, where I worked to train organizers and engage and mobilize voters across the state. I am passionate about building people-powered movements, and I am so excited to collaborate with all of you!
---

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you would like to introduce yourself, share what brings you to volunteering, or swap campaign stories. I look forward to working with each of you! Before tonight’s deadline...
#

Friends -
Tonight’s mid-quarter deadline is an important one.
How important?
Gabby’s been keeping track of the results so far. Check out the picture below.
We’ve set a $125,000 fundraising goal for GIFFORDS, and we’re confident that your $3 donation before tonight at midnight will ensure we get there. You can contribute here:
**[https://go.giffords.org/go/mid-month](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250815-1-b&t=1&akid=10788%2E3935704%2E6amJCS)**
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250815-1-b&t=2&akid=10788%2E3935704%2E6amJCS)
We’re already halfway through the quarter, and we still have lots of plans left: Holding rallies across the country. Running ads targeting persuadable voters. Fighting back against extremism from Republicans and the gun lobby.
All of that can only happen with more grassroots support.
But here’s the reality: Only about 2% of people who read this email will donate. _Today, we’re asking you to join that special group._
[**Will you pitch in $3 or anything you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC before midnight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250815-1-b&t=3&akid=10788%2E3935704%2E6amJCS)

subject: $9 is NOT Enough — Demand $15 for PA Workers

body:
| | | Peter, It might surprise you to learn that Republicans want to raise the minimum wage. But don’t get too excited, the bill they are proposing is **$9/hour** : a laughable figure that wouldn’t even cover a week’s groceries for a family. It’s insulting — and it’s happening while the state budget is already weeks late. Every single day they stall, workers keep getting paid poverty wages. [**Add your name now to tell Republicans in Harrisburg: $9 is not enough. It's time to have a livable wage of at least $15/hour.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRMdJziQYq9L7TCLxkuprwbG-rRj07vGVN0Ol6xw9a8LXpAFwmd2vUYcgKhWibvi5SHNAGM7ZaWgCjxpcis4v81vXAB_ynFAjG3IqKfKfwv2vAFf67bJ8eaw3FAOetPq3T3QSMSDGxMWyuanIS4O-r2VUsWfD8pX2q0zur5BIB_zBotMaS4WlzSmRnt6UjWVOHTR_qhMPZKMas8556VvC2SrkljD-i3gqdXWze7NFOxYsgGrHCIqas7FzzxjdKcskdwAvBsrckiRSJ0Oon3rfQrg/4j2/XW2pTMtBS3iuIwRwCiZpbQ/h0/h001.wKexnCYmH1_GSXw02svj92ZWJ8-FwSZO5HK3U_EOezQ) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRMdJziQYq9L7TCLxkuprwbG-rRj07vGVN0Ol6xw9a8LXpAFwmd2vUYcgKhWibvi5SHNAGM7ZaWgCjxpcis4v81rOi1zZo6RP-PVfXefoC8Tll5tfukfI4mfL_wottirsDhFvntNhfuUHI3Y9nhx7on60OqSe8nSSP_vXOjcBhd_6vTS7_OKaihAk68TzbSgRLyzMlSd4EO07JAjE1-DCWx7IptuXY8zV5wVuKVmzrWYmO04kmt3h_rjPLGIrgAxb1jx7Rm75Ilgcoj2CYRAqcYw/4j2/XW2pTMtBS3iuIwRwCiZpbQ/h1/h001.XFXnAzoX4vXtCfsVLVdxSlSLinUWyC6arXaQm8dfiFY) **[Add your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRMdJziQYq9L7TCLxkuprwbG-rRj07vGVN0Ol6xw9a8LXpAFwmd2vUYcgKhWibvi5SHNAGM7ZaWgCjxpcis4v81stOeAC2kGjReLOYe5LI2Z29tUv0wqYYl7DE13d2lYp4LXdYbLPgLgfzQXRurdFFlrX_RYmFfcQgdcJ5MDHdjmN36KopY9V69NkzfqbujJucxtIQn74YHLVfjj9SGJR78RIM52hxdBpQj_gfa0xFWP4h_MiVPxnJadyUyXowxc4fdMPk9wP4DDWA_fLBg-zHIg/4j2/XW2pTMtBS3iuIwRwCiZpbQ/h2/h001.mxJnkOjgj5WzNNVk7-xTZRx3yJy6cQoGPZklYmeYmv4)** **It’s been nearly _20 years_ since our legislature last gave workers a raise.** Since then, every dollar you earn is worth 51% less. Housing costs have exploded. Childcare and healthcare costs are crushing families. Grocery bills keep climbing. Yet our wages have stayed stuck at $7.25/hour. **Meanwhile, since 2014, 32 states and Washington, D.C. have raised their minimum wage — including every state that borders us.** Maryland, Delaware, New Jersey, New York, even West Virginia are on the path to $15/hour. We know $9 is not enough. That’s why today, August 15th, we’re joining together for "15 for 15" — to demand our legislature:
* Raise the minimum wage to $15/hour now.
* Tie it to annual cost-of-living increases so workers don’t fall behind again.
* Give local governments the power to set higher wages when their communities need it.

A $15 minimum wage would mean an average boost of $800/month for average workers — with the biggest gains for Black women, Black men, and Latinas. In total, 1.34 million Pennsylvanians would finally get the raise they’ve been waiting 15 years for. **We’ve waited long enough. Let’s make August 15th the day we say enough is enough.** [**Add your name now to demand $15/hour.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRMdJziQYq9L7TCLxkuprwbG-rRj07vGVN0Ol6xw9a8LXpAFwmd2vUYcgKhWibvi5SHNAGM7ZaWgCjxpcis4v81vDrW22nNO9cnQYNmTfERbNOEPFzE2wp7hu7okk7DoEaijW9HRqPk6UF5mvjPnw3jx1ma7Jdy-D9kchV6rGcBr6FYQcQN-ijPoSA64Y09YdTOEzWNssT5poP6UwnpGXJb32pS433Onr1SCU3ucFVN7xdi1EvBZgyXsAz6OkwBysAG1GAacWU8iEBrByLyjb49w/4j2/XW2pTMtBS3iuIwRwCiZpbQ/h3/h001.dvsaVx9HnyCd3uPFcoMrB9KhBMuAuhNET_f4NDTasxo) body:
|
#
**🚨 TODAY: New California redistricting map proposal unveiled 🚨**
* * *
Did you see the news, Peter?

California Governor Gavin Newsom just announced that he is moving forward with new redistricting maps that could be unveiled at any moment.

**According to reports, these new maps could turn FIVE Republican-held seats blue.**

This has major implications in our race, and we have the opportunity to rid Orange County of the last Republican representing us in Congress.

The path to the House majority runs through this district, and if CA-40 becomes even marginally more Democratic, this could be our best shot in years to send Christina’s Trump ally opponent Young Kim packing.

clean_body: | 🚨 TODAY: New California redistricting map proposal unveiled 🚨 Did you see the news, Peter? California Governor Gavin Newsom just announced that he is moving forward with new redistricting maps that could be unveiled at any moment. According to reports, these new maps could turn FIVE Republican-held seats blue. This has major implications in our race, and we have the opportunity to rid Orange County of the last Republican representing us in Congress. The path to the House majority runs through this district, and if CA-40 becomes even marginally more Democratic, this could be our best shot in years to send Christina’s Trump ally opponent Young Kim packing. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Gagnier | Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. **“Trump’s Use of Troops for Policing Hasn’t Been Seen Since America Was Ruled by a King”**
\- _The Intercept_
* * *
Since returning to office, **Donald Trump has deployed around 20,000 federal troops on American soil.** He's seized control of D.C.'s police department. He's deployed National Guard troops to Democratic cities without the governor's approval. He's created a "Domestic Civil Disturbance Quick Reaction Force" to surge troops into any American city he chooses. **Republicans in Congress are letting him get away with ALL of it. subject: re: the stakes in Georgia

body:
#

[
---
Hey folks, it’s Andy Beshear. I’m going to level with you. **The Trump administration—aided by the Republican-controlled Congress—is running our country into the ground. From stripping millions of Americans of their healthcare to enacting tariffs that are hurting our economy, this administration is creating chaos and pushing culture wars at the expense of working families.** I will explain more below, but if you’re ready to fight back, you can help keep my friend Jon Ossoff in the fight against this chaos by donating $5, $10, or even $20 to his reelection campaign right now: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-august25?refcode=Andy**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250815-1-f&t=2&akid=638%2E5691347%2EV1P9SQ) Here’s the thing, Peter, Donald Trump is not creating this chaos alone. Republicans in the Senate have allowed and even voted for Donald Trump to gut Medicaid, decimating rural health care and devastating working families. **This is not acceptable.** We need Senators who are going to help us move _forward,_ not backwards. **That is why we must do everything in our power to reelect Jon Ossoff.** Jon is working tirelessly to fight for working families in Georgia and across the country. He has proven his leadership, standing up to corruption (he introduced a bill in the Senate to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks) and standing strong against Donald Trump and his extreme agenda. **But Jon is up for reelection next year, and the GOP has made him their top target. They are already pouring millions of dollars into Georgia and are going to spend tens of millions more before this thing is over.** Peter, Jon is counting on us to help fight back. **[That’s why I need to ask, can you join me in supporting Jon Ossoff by making a donation to his reelection campaign today? Every dollar we raise will be critical to protect him from right-wing attacks and keep him in the fight.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250815-1-f&t=3&akid=638%2E5691347%2EV1P9SQ) **[CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250815-1-f&t=4&akid=638%2E5691347%2EV1P9SQ)** Thank you. \- Andy Beshear
