name: America Fitzpatrick, LCV
subject: [TAKE ACTION]: Keep public lands in public hands
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI4MDk1MTYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI4MDE3MDA5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Tell your members of Congress: Keep public lands in public hands

Public lands span approximately 640 million acres nationwide, protecting
important cultural sites, providing outdoor recreation, and sustaining clean
water resources. They generate $45 billion in economic output and provide nearly
400,000 jobs across the country.

Our public lands are overwhelmingly popular, but the Trump administration and
Republicans in Congress continue to push attempts to sell off these lands.

We need your voice: tell your members of Congress to keep public lands in public hands >> https://links.messages.lcv. TAKE ACTION NOW >> https://links.messages.lcv. Peter, Public lands are under threat nationwide as the Trump administration and
Republicans in Congress attempt to sell them off to states, extractive
industries, and developers. The 2025 budget reconciliation bill was one of the biggest sell-offs to the
fossil fuel and extractive industries in history — greatly expanding coal
mining, logging, and oil and gas drilling on public lands, including in the
Arctic. And proponents of sell-off are just getting started:they’re working to defund land management agencies and fire the public servants
who steward our public lands, attack bedrock environmental laws, repeal
protections for millions of acres of forests and protected areas nationwide, and
increase harmful fossil fuel development on these lands. If the administration and Republicans get their way, we could lose hundreds of
millions of acres of our public lands to extractive industry and developers. Make your voice heard today: tell your members of Congress to protect public lands and stand against the sell-offs. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcKNRa9T~ Our public lands provide numerous benefits to people and the planet —
safeguarding important historical and cultural sites, providing spaces for
outdoor recreation, and sustaining our clean water resources — all while
generating $45 billion in economic output and nearly 400,000 jobs in communities
across the country. Protecting public lands is overwhelmingly popular across the country. And as
backlash against sell-off proposals has shown, selling them off is not. We need
to continue showing Congress and proponents of the sell-offs that our public
lands should remain in public hands. Send a message to your members of Congress today: urge them to oppose any efforts, either Congressional or administrative, to sell off our public lands. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f0Z~keT_ Thank you for all you do. America Fitzpatrick
Conservation Program Director
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12809516&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDE3MDA5NAS2&spReportId=MjI4MDE3MDA5NAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12809516&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDE3MDA5NAS2&spReportId=MjI4MDE3MDA5NAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-

subject: Jason’s leading the fight. Can he count on you to have his back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team —

No matter where life has taken Jason, he's never been afraid to go where the fight is.

After 9/11, he went on active duty with the Army Rangers to defend our country.

When veterans were struggling to secure their benefits after serving, he offered pro bono legal support services to get them the coverage they earned.

And when Donald Trump demonized immigrants, threatened to strip health care from millions of Americans, and attacked our democracy, Jason ran for office and flipped a decades-long Republican-held seat.

It was your support that helped him do that, but the fight is far from over. As Trump and Republicans ignite a global trade war that is raising prices and ram through policies that hurt working Coloradans, it's never been more important that we usher in a new generation of leaders to Congress.

Jason's leading that fight.

Will you have his back by making a donation before midnight tonight? Every dollar powers our efforts to defend Jason’s work and support Colorado Democrats up and down the ballot: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025?]

[Then,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113395674/563625222/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250815_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE3MWRlOS0wMjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmAC-sS1dtCFpV9xhjWPCdDVWoFiTM3D6_17xA04Wc8=) Texas Democrats bravely fled the state to BLOCK the undemocratic bill – as the Republican governor threatened to ARREST them! [Now,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113395677/563625225/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250815_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE3MWRlOS0wMjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmAC-sS1dtCFpV9xhjWPCdDVWoFiTM3D6_17xA04Wc8=) President Obama is speaking up: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113395680/563625228/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250815_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE3MWRlOS0wMjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmAC-sS1dtCFpV9xhjWPCdDVWoFiTM3D6_17xA04Wc8=)

subject: Make Our Nation’s Capital Safe Again
body:
I took decisive action against the Left

---
| | | | | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08C/?__vbtrk=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | | | | The radical-left is going ballistic after I stood with President Trump YET AGAIN.

Our nation's capital used to be **[BEAUTIFUL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08C/?__vbtrk=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "BEAUTIFUL")** \- but thanks to radical-left leadership, everything has gone down the drain.

Just like every blue city, violent crime is skyrocketing in DC, and **dangerous CRIMINALS** run rampant in the streets thanks to soft-on-crime laws.

But today, _I’m taking decisive action to make our Capitol Safe Again_ , and the attacks against me from the Left have been horrendous.
---
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08C/?__vbtrk=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
They’re already labeling me and President Trump “ _fascists_ ” for demanding ORDER be restored.
_Calling Trump a “King” that needs to be “removed from the throne”._ _And labeling you, me, and every MAGA Patriot a “threat to Democracy”_
But you want to hear the scariest part about all of this?
**Democrats have never been in a better position to RETAKE the GOP Majority in Congress. **
They’re fundraising millions of dollars from the radical-left mob, promising to reverse ALL of the work I’m doing for our country and the MAGA Movement, and IMPEACH Trump.

I need to hear from you ASAP - are you still supporting the FANTASTIC work of _**[President Trump and the GOP Majority?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08C/?__vbtrk=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "President Trump and the GOP Majority?")**_
---
| | [STAND WITH MAGA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08C/?__vbtrk=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
I’ve only made it this far because of _**you and MAGA**_.

But the momentum I’m seeing from the Democrats can’t be ignored.

So please - will you stand with MAGA today and consider chipping in a few dollars to support my efforts?
---
| | [STAND WITH MAGA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08C/?__vbtrk=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Thank you, and God Bless America,

body:
Trump is deploying National Guard troops in our nation’s capital and temporarily taking control of the city’s police force. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWMufySxKDu34-hbQnCujFUD3rFv7a35lbKgI9FPZ3kMdidO8N-J_5l7QTmh7AZ1F57zv3L_eztcLIiltvIeiwY7vhLuJth8ckGO1lov_aDvqPXgdmy93snX8GWqYhZ8rEZCIZL9F-cd0SuysXxk9_ZzA5MVmfNsTVCCp0IBBzYYPIBjvn-JYBwYzuOhBTqvi083AcgZ2Mes_DLdLigdRSIQ/4j2/EfvVMvpAS22dEb15cB6Cvg/h0/h001.uD4HVTIsqAMf5_J3DNjfKAtOXaUH5vfBmP0Hm8lRVxg)
---
Friend, Trump is deploying National Guard troops in our nation’s capital and temporarily taking control of the city’s police force, abusing presidential powers meant only for emergencies. He’s warned about expanding this to other cities, but he can move quickly now in D.C. because D.C. residents lack statehood and local self-governance. Local activists, who don’t have voting representation in Congress, are asking people in U.S. states to push their members of Congress to end this fascist takeover and finally enfranchise D.C. residents by making D.C. a state. [**Please sign on to demand Congress stop Trump’s D.C. takeover and demand Congress give D.C. residents full voting rights by passing the**** _Washington, D.C. Admissions Act_****to grant D.C. statehood.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcXvxRk_n6xNMWwz5Jdr9ju48Ss7ROG79yPlfzU6hcDhg7p6mRYeMR4l-naZHarzCV-3BJIQlvnJeSA8vuwvrHzMRs-W2qzTlblRYjRNUM2bre1rnwNrTNj8NqnTdJOvs0GK0NLdL06Yj6CNCNkmFhHefwhY9Yn4XMTrCiLrd3MjkwF_m9iKGTIP8hpU8qp-cNnZ6fWQMFhYeWqj_yzcMbGrLAeKfjw3RVwJWwbrKftcr_1Ky8CVFMvpeUjYZSTb2ckEzjmuWzAFmUpoS5uRJPZv1n_j_CaPy4r67p4eRmG4onfs06FSErjiRT1JPVv2Jdo6cSG1djKiHiOtEFOF1C-w/4j2/EfvVMvpAS22dEb15cB6Cvg/h1/h001.2z6vYogbvaIvfQthqQqprT2o9RcUBQrfKOxcscyLKZw) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcXvxRk_n6xNMWwz5Jdr9ju48Ss7ROG79yPlfzU6hcDhgTR7GIpF7SA6ny6-sRcbkKCZUEKXeSemCTEnb66tfMDzYaeIb97yDjtkLgtrEH4a1BgL4xriy5Ydz-lutJlqVo3SBLAGJcFxzt2YFB1EA4G7IsFJatQnp19449BapWLxSpgocVTUYFwHEyWBDIDl-X9PbunsxKG05EureOq3YURHGc1tjCPx-M0FQc1_YxK3hq2_K-UWNpQMvbifVFf-YrCMSciTL2MrJ0sZg4q_eSaWbG4p5gwFtMuWiXjiRGdQJfDV6IojACZA80pS4ZZuqj9dS7ODO4k2ExRuFD7vj2Lg/4j2/EfvVMvpAS22dEb15cB6Cvg/h2/h001.espjdoL8drijPFr8FJ8P4ZUCeWQYdMUxez9FXuqg5g4)
---
Under the _D.C. Home Rule Act of 1973_ , presidents can temporarily take over D.C.’s city government during an emergency. Trump is lying about crime-related emergencies: In D.C.—as well as other Black-led and majority-Black cities he’s threatened to target—crime rates are at historic lows.
Trump mentioned Chicago as one of the cities he may target with a militarized takeover next. The mayor of Chicago said, “If President Trump wants to help make Chicago safer, he can start by releasing the funds for anti-violence programs” that Trump cut.
We also know that investing in communities’ needs like housing, food, and healthcare is a key part of building true public safety.
Instead of spending more of our tax dollars on state violence and militarized policing, I’ve advocated to save lives by funding lifesaving needs and unarmed emergency/crisis response teams.
I’ve also pushed to end police brutality and mass incarceration and to support unhoused people, who are Trump’s latest targets.
Trump is deploying National Guard troops in part to violently displace and lock up unhoused people. This will also disproportionately harm Black people, who make up 85% of D.C.’s unhoused population.
**He refused to send in the National Guard on January 6th as a white supremacist mob attacked the Capitol, but he has no problem sending them into D.C. neighborhoods with majority Black residents.**
We’ve got to stand up to these fascist attacks and defend vulnerable communities. That starts by speaking up and humanizing the people Trump wants to disappear. It also involves pushing governmental leaders to take action.
[**Please add your name to demand Congress end this false “emergency” now to get National Guard troops and federal agents off D.C. streets, and urgently pass the**** _Washington, D.C. Admission Act_****to finally grant D.C. statehood.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcXvxRk_n6xNMWwz5Jdr9ju48Ss7ROG79yPlfzU6hcDhiFnHmzIwxPyXEPbLFX2Cehmsfk1RG5HaQQBVf4QZxCbf3AZabkciYXU-e8QmKcoawJShdqkcpfyOaWkqQMNx6IMpal24O1ZydFts6ZTzirj4sHxgV2zI_IACxr2este_uWR7ndopCBqUWguTJPnYsuB9z0eP8odG8NA49eQWnZ_UwchoMe3l6zFOoYb3llpcpbUW-o4gJbOWzjLm1IPl0lpcQ854ihsNgMR0aKmZlbmMwspUcrP3iNDKQKvznnr9OEDg19eRgGZCzMGAAhys2_PiIewYkH8fpxRklLS9Hfig/4j2/EfvVMvpAS22dEb15cB6Cvg/h3/h001.pnuqNWnUQrNXBslYcnR2HWy8C3SwJ0zMFJJqQq860NY)
Thank you. Together we’ll keep building a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being, where everyone’s dignity and humanity is honored.
With you in this fight,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rashida Tlaib
Date: Thurs, Aug 14, 2025
Subject: Sign to remove U.S. military from our nation’s capital:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
The U.S. military has arrived in our nation’s capital, with National Guard troops on the ground along with a surge in federal law enforcement. We cannot be silent as Trump tries to silence dissent and militarize Black neighborhoods.
The racist-in-chief named potential cities he may target next, including Chicago, Baltimore, Oakland, and other cities with Black mayors and majority Black and brown populations. He’s encouraging violent repression, telling law enforcement to “do whatever they want” and “knock the hell out of” people.
Trump’s anti-Black and authoritarian takeover is a test run to target other major cities. His administration is planning to set up a rapid response group of National Guard troops for this very purpose.
**Trump didn’t want to send in the National Guard on January 6th as a white supremacist mob attacked the Capitol but has no problem sending them into D.C. neighborhoods with majority Black residents.**
Now is the time to speak up, before this fascism spreads further.
[**Sign the petition to demand your members of Congress stand up to Trump’s fascism and end this militarized takeover.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcXvxRk_n6xNMWwz5Jdr9ju48Ss7ROG79yPlfzU6hcDhihQaBZxe6ZyiO_vuwTARVdwTXi6HHKCzTrc3nwC4h8aNS0kFbfZyyQaJHZ-Ba0quE6kgOA2TbMHvAgFwacec8hY9c_eb_AvsalZAbHG4SKdoQz0rf-gdPpDLKhrabf2l3FO0XfHD3NNe32QVP05aVyFgdCBW-5l80C52UpS3SGQ5mUs9qvoBqdftaNXIawJhtlQ9BS7fw7xF_JO5FLNg14Stb029GHylwsGSB8qPqvlXNp4HSmjOfFrnQAMmVld6p0Leoc_lyuAjx--fatZyuP4Zz_VUiKC-hh8gw_pkz13g/4j2/EfvVMvpAS22dEb15cB6Cvg/h4/h001.-docNglnG7WUFAuVBCQe8goNk72-RxoTkLB_3xScThM)
[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcXvxRk_n6xNMWwz5Jdr9ju48Ss7ROG79yPlfzU6hcDhiN_zqWclP1OYiTzxMJmZ0WZOVqRZSKvOecruGcc1p-0mFoDg6EdC1nJQ6fxxqy2L7xcCOPLGR6AQ_URXb565J13YOVDUU52ZikLHbwsKa4BPtgrppziXe3NVlav_jIbN5FvvWg_xvegB07kEspHtGs7-3FTJrTprzfHJXOadpHLM-WSEYOJbRef6LQBvBbykwZJyOOVbi4H5il7sY7ZbUKFaqhX84Odsj8vEOfpjfNtxPhzYVC3a3Fjzmrx1t2BEsdxoGiAHFyEIyWWSzVdJKM73RBQyVYZib3lfJz6HmZgw/4j2/EfvVMvpAS22dEb15cB6Cvg/h5/h001._v43pgusYfpUuGAbaYntSUjpm76ONjwa7l_dugjNA1g)
---
Trump is targeting Democrat-majority cities, likely punishing people for their votes and punishing Democratic politicians for opposing him. For example, Washington, D.C. is a majority Black city where over 90% of voters choose Democrats for president.
Trump is starting with D.C. because the city’s residents have less power—they don’t have statehood and they don’t even have full self-governance of their city.
In an abuse of his presidential power, Trump is exploiting a loophole in the _D.C. Home Rule Act of 1973_ that enables presidents to temporarily take over D.C.’s city government if there’s an emergency. But Trump’s “emergency” claims are racist lies: In D.C. and the other cities he’s named, crime rates are at historic lows.
D.C. residents weren’t able to vote for president until the 1960s, and they still lack voting representation in Congress. They even have limited control over their own city government: Congress can rewrite or block D.C. city budgets, and Congress reviews and regularly blocks city policies that have been voted for by a majority of D.C. residents.
This is the un-democratic status quo, which began and has persisted due to anti-Blackness.
Many enslaved people fled to D.C. after the Civil War and started to elect Black political leaders. White people pushed back against growing Black political power, using racist tropes to claim that Black people couldn’t govern themselves. Congress and the president began controlling the city, appointing leaders and overriding local democracy.
It’s past time for D.C. residents to finally have full enfranchisement and voting rights. With 700,000 residents, D.C. is more populous than Vermont and Wyoming. Both of those states have two senators and a voting member of the House of Representatives. The people of D.C. have voted overwhelmingly in support of statehood, but Congress hasn’t yet passed a policy to make it happen.
**Right now, local activists are asking people across the country to push their members of Congress to do three key things:** end Trump’s emergency declaration and get troops off D.C. streets, stop freezing D.C.’s city funds and trying to overturn local laws, and finally pass legislation making D.C. a state.
[**Please sign on and urge your members of Congress to act now. You can give D.C. residents a voice, since they have no voting member of Congress.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcXvxRk_n6xNMWwz5Jdr9ju48Ss7ROG79yPlfzU6hcDhj3EVdnrgGUNyEtowMop5sLzP_hAmhXt1eJgmEGS5RVRl2GKk_aFlDk0ALIn3ZigtD00I87Uq-KdtgVK_yfuTS96HjgFEioSUyl-qh7jxpcaWx4e7FqY-VM3lcpLs2VttbztDG6pLAoXW0vKwnV2OB4zasIKWmVBSfWCkztcjdq9atKhQXhSz8Fpf7PRluJoPfB2S9xIR08hih5W3vBjpP-uqyCDfecb2rXiaVi4xgwN2PTFC7nsSULmb1qwoALVGtwpiElx_Uuoj0wVmpYZB1nfhqolkahgR8KwK5yoISbzA/4j2/EfvVMvpAS22dEb15cB6Cvg/h6/h001.5aOpapQ7QXfG6qNStZLTHSwDQarw46QKUnWza7IbFP0)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcXvxRk_n6xNMWwz5Jdr9ju48Ss7ROG79yPlfzU6hcDhjKJn0cDUZiSkNV9YgEPQ1Uso09GwPAO25TNgcx0CQZVwj_k7mtdENpedV94b1orFNFcLOvuLO_lLEC8rQB-P005wHczzw9moG-co36c216sixM_oX13FeVAYuNriFhAaFn3GORF3yxuZI1K6dIlmxyZ15iDks8akyPJoHi-Lm--lrijU1lwB0nvDaR13kP80z_MolDin4jaqWHlrPTW72n9OEB0DJSWswbncrtHrmCybsaauq20n-cACXdhEyNIfvHENhEzcaNm15R9iFYBAArNBRIng16RuA_EkiuLrQ4_w/4j2/EfvVMvpAS22dEb15cB6Cvg/h7/h001.lXPfjcg0ydpM7Rxs4lwkaYaizq9jmBC_T0n0tZSwW8w)
---
Last time Trump was in office, he called in the National Guard to D.C. during protests following George Floyd’s murder. Federal agents used rubber bullets, smoke bombs, flash grenades, and chemicals on peaceful protesters.
As part of the current attack on the city, Trump is deploying National Guard troops to forcibly displace unhoused people and lock them up. Because of the still-growing racial wealth gap, 85% of unhoused DC residents are Black—so this will have clear racial impacts.
This is happening during Black August, a month that honors Black political prisoners and other activists who’ve pushed for Black liberation. Pushing back against racist policing and making D.C. a state is part of the fight for Black liberation, power, and self-representation.
I’m a proud co-sponsor of the _Washington, D.C. Admission Act_ to grant D.C. statehood. I’ve also pushed for policies to keep our communities safe from police violence, reduce mass incarceration, empower and support unhoused people, keep people in their homes, and make housing more affordable.
**Our government should fund housing and care, not criminalization and prisons. I will keep pushing for this in Congress and I will keep fighting back against Trump’s fascism.**
Since D.C. residents don’t have a voting Congressperson, they’re asking you and others around the country to advocate on their behalf, urging your senators and representative to act now.
[**Add your name to demand an end to this fascist takeover and demand equal citizenship for D.C. residents.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcXvxRk_n6xNMWwz5Jdr9ju48Ss7ROG79yPlfzU6hcDhhrVBQtdBl4Yd6pt8FVu5hYwwpFi5Sj8FWNop6eAuuV315GGRfqVc5tEzndDYGI3Xwd9zMSftry7MJC7A-b2FR7Li7_H66BcKIDx7E2J228oV9dZ7AEZrtniuc7rL4aNc2erO7NbjVYRDzj6F2OJla0e2JvYc7k5W8cdZHlJkEY_rEq5n5Oxv8YUIB5x5kuIT0bsnIqM14c-q3wa4yjjomV_aSOtRAmNBlTPqbvEDA6YwMnR0bqwlXZmgQsefWOlNaRYp_VLHU_Tlkt8JyVnqMkMrrbUv1GXSOE40jhYdy9wg/4j2/EfvVMvpAS22dEb15cB6Cvg/h8/h001.PGfLAxxIBq7mZ3Hv1pM2s3_KjldPHHEUw9i3fcNarh4)
Thank you for taking action. Together, we’ll keep pushing for a democracy that lives up to the ideals of equal rights and representation for all. We must also keep defending the most vulnerable among us.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: Trump is deploying National Guard troops in our nation’s capital and temporarily taking control of the city’s police force. | | | Friend, Trump is deploying National Guard troops in our nation’s capital and temporarily taking control of the city’s police force, abusing presidential powers meant only for emergencies. He’s warned about expanding this to other cities, but he can move quickly now in D.C. because D.C. residents lack statehood and local self-governance. Local activists, who don’t have voting representation in Congress, are asking people in U.S. states to push their members of Congress to end this fascist takeover and finally enfranchise D.C. residents by making D.C. a state. | Under the D.C. Home Rule Act of 1973 , presidents can temporarily take over D.C.’s city government during an emergency. Trump is lying about crime-related emergencies: In D.C.—as well as other Black-led and majority-Black cities he’s threatened to target—crime rates are at historic lows. Trump mentioned Chicago as one of the cities he may target with a militarized takeover next. The mayor of Chicago said, “If President Trump wants to help make Chicago safer, he can start by releasing the funds for anti-violence programs” that Trump cut. We also know that investing in communities’ needs like housing, food, and healthcare is a key part of building true public safety. Instead of spending more of our tax dollars on state violence and militarized policing, I’ve advocated to save lives by funding lifesaving needs and unarmed emergency/crisis response teams. I’ve also pushed to end police brutality and mass incarceration and to support unhoused people, who are Trump’s latest targets. Trump is deploying National Guard troops in part to violently displace and lock up unhoused people. This will also disproportionately harm Black people, who make up 85% of D.C.’s unhoused population. He refused to send in the National Guard on January 6th as a white supremacist mob attacked the Capitol, but he has no problem sending them into D.C. neighborhoods with majority Black residents. We’ve got to stand up to these fascist attacks and defend vulnerable communities. That starts by speaking up and humanizing the people Trump wants to disappear. It also involves pushing governmental leaders to take action. Thank you. Together we’ll keep building a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being, where everyone’s dignity and humanity is honored. With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Thurs, Aug 14, 2025 Subject: Sign to remove U.S. military from our nation’s capital: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, The U.S. military has arrived in our nation’s capital, with National Guard troops on the ground along with a surge in federal law enforcement. We cannot be silent as Trump tries to silence dissent and militarize Black neighborhoods. The racist-in-chief named potential cities he may target next, including Chicago, Baltimore, Oakland, and other cities with Black mayors and majority Black and brown populations. He’s encouraging violent repression, telling law enforcement to “do whatever they want” and “knock the hell out of” people. Trump’s anti-Black and authoritarian takeover is a test run to target other major cities. His administration is planning to set up a rapid response group of National Guard troops for this very purpose. Trump didn’t want to send in the National Guard on January 6th as a white supremacist mob attacked the Capitol but has no problem sending them into D.C. neighborhoods with majority Black residents. Now is the time to speak up, before this fascism spreads further. Trump is targeting Democrat-majority cities, likely punishing people for their votes and punishing Democratic politicians for opposing him. For example, Washington, D.C. is a majority Black city where over 90% of voters choose Democrats for president. Trump is starting with D.C. because the city’s residents have less power—they don’t have statehood and they don’t even have full self-governance of their city. In an abuse of his presidential power, Trump is exploiting a loophole in the D.C. Home Rule Act of 1973 that enables presidents to temporarily take over D.C.’s city government if there’s an emergency. But Trump’s “emergency” claims are racist lies: In D.C. and the other cities he’s named, crime rates are at historic lows. D.C. residents weren’t able to vote for president until the 1960s, and they still lack voting representation in Congress. They even have limited control over their own city government: Congress can rewrite or block D.C. city budgets, and Congress reviews and regularly blocks city policies that have been voted for by a majority of D.C. residents. This is the un-democratic status quo, which began and has persisted due to anti-Blackness. Many enslaved people fled to D.C. after the Civil War and started to elect Black political leaders. White people pushed back against growing Black political power, using racist tropes to claim that Black people couldn’t govern themselves. Congress and the president began controlling the city, appointing leaders and overriding local democracy. It’s past time for D.C. residents to finally have full enfranchisement and voting rights. With 700,000 residents, D.C. is more populous than Vermont and Wyoming. Both of those states have two senators and a voting member of the House of Representatives. The people of D.C. have voted overwhelmingly in support of statehood, but Congress hasn’t yet passed a policy to make it happen. Right now, local activists are asking people across the country to push their members of Congress to do three key things: end Trump’s emergency declaration and get troops off D.C. streets, stop freezing D.C.’s city funds and trying to overturn local laws, and finally pass legislation making D.C. a state. Last time Trump was in office, he called in the National Guard to D.C. during protests following George Floyd’s murder. Federal agents used rubber bullets, smoke bombs, flash grenades, and chemicals on peaceful protesters. As part of the current attack on the city, Trump is deploying National Guard troops to forcibly displace unhoused people and lock them up. Because of the still-growing racial wealth gap, 85% of unhoused DC residents are Black—so this will have clear racial impacts. This is happening during Black August, a month that honors Black political prisoners and other activists who’ve pushed for Black liberation. Pushing back against racist policing and making D.C. a state is part of the fight for Black liberation, power, and self-representation. I’m a proud co-sponsor of the Washington, D.C. Admission Act to grant D.C. statehood. I’ve also pushed for policies to keep our communities safe from police violence, reduce mass incarceration, empower and support unhoused people, keep people in their homes, and make housing more affordable. Our government should fund housing and care, not criminalization and prisons. I will keep pushing for this in Congress and I will keep fighting back against Trump’s fascism. Since D.C. residents don’t have a voting Congressperson, they’re asking you and others around the country to advocate on their behalf, urging your senators and representative to act now. Thank you for taking action. Together, we’ll keep pushing for a democracy that lives up to the ideals of equal rights and representation for all. We must also keep defending the most vulnerable among us. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

We want to inform, inspire, and keep you in the loop on everything from Republicans’ redistricting power grab to tips on how to get involved in your own communities. Yes, our fundraising goals are important. Yes, we have to send fundraising emails to meet our goals. But this is about so much more than taking up space in your inbox. **When we’re up against billionaires and special interests, your support really means something. # **[Governor Declares State Of Emergency Due To Crime](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Just days after President Donald Trump took bold action in Washington, D.C., to confront rising crime, New Mexico Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham declared a state of emergency over a violent crime surge and drug crisis that has spiraled out of control in Rio Arriba County — a region long plagued by fentanyl, homelessness, and overdose [...]

---
This latest round between Melania Trump and Hunter Biden sounds like it’s headed for the courtroom unless one of them blinks. Hunter’s original claim — that Jeffrey Epstein introduced Melania to Donald Trump — is not only incendiary, it’s already been publicly retracted by others who made it before, including The Daily Beast and James [...]

# **[Schumer Comments On Response To Extending Trump's DC Police Takeover](http://trk.libertyledger.-KlJXmAsDATj97DpGbjQ)**
---
Here we are, in the middle of a literal violent crime crisis in the nation’s capital—people getting shot, robbed, and assaulted—and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer’s big public stand is... “No f—ing way.” Not “let’s negotiate terms,” not “let’s hear what the public wants,” not even “let’s look at the crime numbers.” Nope. Just a [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-KlJXmAsDATj97DpGbjQ)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Trump Gives Reporters A Suggestion After Question About DC Crime](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
In a press conference brimming with characteristic bluntness and policy clarity, President Donald Trump offered a bold suggestion to a skeptical media: if you don’t think D.C. has a crime problem, ride along with the police and see for yourself. The remarks came Wednesday from the Kennedy Center, where the President addressed ongoing questions about [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-8EnAZLWbuUV4JQ)
# **[California School Board Votes On Ban Amid States Lawsuit With Trump](http://trk.libertyledger.-8EnAZLWbuUV4JQ)**
---
In a bold and potentially precedent-setting move, the Kern County Board of Education in California voted Tuesday to defy state policy and bar biological males from competing in girls’ sports—directly aligning itself with federal Title IX interpretations championed by President Donald Trump’s administration.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-8EnAZLWbuUV4JQ)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/kwWBvIZavdIRgGc0ynQoYA)
# **[Patel Releases Documents Following Whistleblower Coming Forward](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/kwWBvIZavdIRgGc0ynQoYA)**
---
In a revelation that echoes some of the darkest chapters in the politicization of intelligence, newly declassified FBI documents now suggest that Senator Adam Schiff—long a key architect of the Trump-Russia collusion narrative—allegedly directed the leaking of classified information to undercut President Donald Trump in the critical early days following the 2016 election. name: Right Wing Report
subject: President Trump needs your support today
body:
Fight the puppet masters
* * *
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

* * *
|
Dear Fellow Taxpayer,

I am going to share with you Washington DC's dirtiest secret.

Federal union bosses have seized control of the federal workforce and declared President Trump and Elon Musk ENEMY #1 and #2 for fighting to "Drain the Swamp" and save hundreds of billions of tax dollars by downsizing and reforming the bloated DC bureaucracy!

You see, union control of government is a CANCER killing the U.S. taxpayer -- impoverishing America's workers and entrepreneurs with red tape, wasteful spending and soaring inflation.

Using tens of millions of dollars seized from workers' paychecks, Big Labor's federal union bosses are orchestrating virtually every howl of outrage, protest and lawsuit against Donald Trump's and Elon Musk's cutbacks and reforms. . .

. . .paying for the lawyers, the plaintiffs, the lawsuits and the activists you see on TV marching and screaming into bullhorns. That's why I hope you will _STAND UP TODAY FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP'S CRUSADE to slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon guarding "the Swamp" in Washington_.

Please agree to sign your PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT to President Trump, Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency and your U.S. Senators and Congressman. I'll give you a link to your petition in a moment, but I want to be sure you understand how serious this is.

_President Trump is fighting valiantly to tame the out-of-control federal bureaucracy. And he needs to know he has YOUR FULL SUPPORT to stand firm_ when the Swamp Rats in Washington lash out.

And perhaps even more importantly, please _sign your petitions DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman support President Trump's crusade_ with every vote they cast!

The fact is government union bosses are the real puppet-masters pulling the strings behind the curtain in the "DC Swamp."

That's why you and I must PROVE to President Trump (and my colleagues here in the Senate and House) that _the American people OVERWHELMINGLY support his reforms and will not tolerate any more obstructionism, excuses or gridlock_!

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (popularly known as DOGE) are exposing the scandals and corruption government union officials have been hiding for decades:
---
$$$ Did you know that _only 6% of federal bureaucrats show up_ in person for a full work week? (And that figure drops to 1% if you take out janitors, security guards, and maintenance personnel!)
$$$ Can you believe that _government union big shots are PAID with YOUR tax dollars to conduct so-called "official union business" -- COSTING TAXPAYERS NEARLY A QUARTER OF A BILLION TAX DOLLARS A YEAR_?
$$$ Were you aware that federal office buildings cost $15.7 BILLION annually just to keep the doors open? And that _only 12% of federal office space is even occupied_?
$$$ Are you outraged to learn federal law effectively bars open shop, non-union contractors from bidding on federal public works projects -- _soaking American taxpayers for an estimated $21.7 billion a year in inflated construction costs_?
$$$ Did you know that if a conscientious public servant does a good job and their supervisor awards them a merit-pay bonus (or tries to fire or discipline an incompetent bureaucrat) without "going through the union" that would be a VIOLATION OF FEDERAL LABOR RULES?!?
$$$ Are you angry that in 2021, JOE BIDEN BESTOWED $130 BILLION UPON TEACHER UNION RADICALS who are brainwashing our kids!
The fact is _government union czars are the single biggest obstacle President Trump must overcome_ to cut out-of-control government spending and flagrant waste, fraud and abuse.

**[That's why I hope you will CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT TODAY](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=8i1i1bshdejuzhylemgc2zuy44zapoid8cz7p4tdimfkk1vi6vahtfua7i2hkbc5t6xqkve0yf0sc2dmymsqafa9q4xi2dpffy244f85ef8huogczl7rym24m4hwv93k35671wcacc8wzptzafhmmc0u975z6tu14ice7keav4scrsdq0jhubinacznu8hntsc48djd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t11v7m&__onlt=h)**!

As soon as their handpicked political cronies lost the elections, GOVERNMENT UNION OFFICIALS IMMEDIATELY VOWED TO BLOCK TRUMP'S REFORMS.

You see, President Trump is not only standing up to the liberal media and the radical Democrats, he's taking on the _unelected czars who secretly rule our government from within_.

Union officials I bet you've never even heard of -- like Everett Kelly.

He's not a Member of Congress. Not a Governor nor a Senator. No voter has ever cast a ballot for him.

And yet he rules Washington DC with an iron fist from his throne atop the largest government union, the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE).

_The AFGE chieftain rules an empire of nearly a million government workers paid an average of $118,260 per year, costing taxpayers an estimated $97.4 BILLION ANNUALLY_.

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency are exposing outrage after outrage committed by federal union bosses like AFGE President Everett Kelly:
\--- AFGE Council 220 President Witold Skwierczynski _COLLECTED A PAYCHECK FROM THE SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION FOR 34 YEARS WITHOUT WORKING A SINGLE HOUR_!

He couldn't have gone to work if he'd tried because _he was banned from Social Security offices nationwide after sending A PHOTO OF HIS PENIS_ to a fellow employee at 2 o'clock in the morning! He only quit because Trump's executive order required him and other union officials to (in his words) go "back to our desks to process claims."

Now, he's collecting a full pension "close to equal to my salary."
\--- The Federal Mediation and Conciliation Service played "the heavy" to force workers and employers to knuckle under to union-boss demands. The agency reportedly was "_RIFE WITH CORRUPTION" whose staffers "LIVED LIKE KINGS_." Despite having only 60 employees (many of whose offices had ENSUITE BATHROOMS WITH PRIVATE SHOWERS!), the FMCS occupied a _nine-story office tower_ on DC's posh K Street.
According to the Daily Wire, for years the agency's Director _billed the taxpayer for his meals and living expenses, claiming to be on a "years-long business trip" to DC_.
\--- Corrupt union officials are notorious for treating worker pension funds like their own lavish piggybanks. MANY union pension plans are teetering on the verge of insolvency. So JOE BIDEN BILKED THE TAXPAYER FOR $32 BILLION TO BAIL-OUT A SINGLE TEAMSTER UNION PENSION FUND.

That's bad enough. But instead of placing the pension into receivership under government oversight, _he left the foxes in charge of the henhouse_!
**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=8i1i1bshdejuzhylemgc2zuy44zapoid8cz7p4tdimfkk1vi6vahtfua7i2hkbc5t6xqkve0yf0sc2dmymsqafa9q4xi2dpffy244f85ef8huogczl7rym24m4hwv93k35671wcacc8wzptzafhmmc0u975z6tu14ice7keav4scrsdq0jhubinacznu8hntsc48djd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t11v7m&__onlt=h)**.

How did Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats let it come to this? Well, they were well compensated. . .

Organized Labor poured an estimated $25 BILLION into the last elections to defeat Donald Trump and elect Kamala Harris -- and other radical Democrats like her!

You see, federal workers are REQUIRED BY LAW to submit to the so-called "representation" of well-heeled union bigwigs _whether they like it or not_. Federal law gives union officials power over workers WHO AREN'T EVEN UNION MEMBERS!

_Most government bureaucrats figured out long ago that THEY DON'T REALLY WORK FOR THE TAXPAYER, NOR EVEN THE PRESIDENT... THEY WORK FOR THE UNION BOSSES_. Plain and simple.

President Trump knows he can't "Drain the Swamp" until we support his efforts to "Slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon."

The Union-Boss Dragon should be stripped bare:
\--- NO Monopoly Bargaining power over any federal employee.
\--- NO money deducted from any federal worker's or contractor's paycheck.
\--- NO authority to negotiate salaries, wages, job rules, promotion, firing or hiring.
\--- NO privileged status in winning multiple-billion dollar federal contracts.
\--- NO payment for work except for the US taxpayer, not a union.
**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=8i1i1bshdejuzhylemgc2zuy44zapoid8cz7p4tdimfkk1vi6vahtfua7i2hkbc5t6xqkve0yf0sc2dmymsqafa9q4xi2dpffy244f85ef8huogczl7rym24m4hwv93k35671wcacc8wzptzafhmmc0u975z6tu14ice7keav4scrsdq0jhubinacznu8hntsc48djd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t11v7m&__onlt=h)**.

But government union chiefs are so powerful and so entrenched, _I will need more than your petitions to slay the union bigwigs' DC Dragon_.

That's why I've joined forces with the National Right to Work Committee. When it comes to fighting AND BEATING corrupt union officials, they are the experts.

And that's why I hope you'll not only sign your petition but also make a generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or even $1,000 today to help the National Right to Work Committee EXPAND their nationwide campaign to prove to my colleagues in Washington, DC that politicians should fear "We, The People" more than "inside the Beltway" union politicos.

I don't know what you can afford to give today. Maybe for you a contribution of $25 or $50 is a stretch. I know for others $500 or $1000 will not be too much.

After you sign your petition, I ask you to be as generous as you can.

_You see, this Petition Drive is just the first step of a nationwide grassroots lobbying program_ to focus public pressure like a laser-beam on key Senators and Congressmen to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT!

The National Right to Work Committee needs your financial support today to:
1\. GATHER THREE MILLION PETITIONS SUPPORTING DONALD TRUMP AND ELON MUSK'S DOGE and urging lawmakers to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT and end it NOW!
2\. Launch a publicity and media campaign with news conferences, editorial board meetings, and op-eds by respected commentators and opinion leaders.
3\. Mail, text, use social media and email millions of taxpayers to turn up the heat on wavering politicians to get off the fence and do their jobs to curb and corral the out-of-control government workforce.
4\. And funds permitting, air costly hard-hitting TV, radio and Internet ads (especially on Fox News and Fox Radio, and local conservative talk!) to generate MILLIONS of letters, phone calls and texts to Capitol Hill demanding Big Labor's monopoly bargaining powers over the federal workforce be repealed.
That's why I am asking you to **[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=8i1i1bshdejuzhylemgc2zuy44zapoid8cz7p4tdimfkk1vi6vahtfua7i2hkbc5t6xqkve0yf0sc2dmymsqafa9q4xi2dpffy244f85ef8huogczl7rym24m4hwv93k35671wcacc8wzptzafhmmc0u975z6tu14ice7keav4scrsdq0jhubinacznu8hntsc48djd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t11v7m&__onlt=h)** to let President Trump and Elon Musk's DOGE know they have your FULL SUPPORT AND GRATITUDE for taking on the out-of-control federal bureaucracy and the union-boss puppet masters, and DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman help the President bring our nation's unelected rulers in Washington to heel.

But the Swamp Creatures in DC and my colleagues on Capitol Hill will never allow President Trump to slay Big Labor's DC Dragon without your support NOW.

**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION AND MAKE A GENEROUS CONTRIBUTION OF $25, $50, $100 OR EVEN $1,000 TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=8i1i1bshdejuzhylemgc2zuy44zapoid8cz7p4tdimfkk1vi6vahtfua7i2hkbc5t6xqkve0yf0sc2dmymsqafa9q4xi2dpffy244f85ef8huogczl7rym24m4hwv93k35671wcacc8wzptzafhmmc0u975z6tu14ice7keav4scrsdq0jhubinacznu8hntsc48djd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t11v7m&__onlt=h)**.

Federal spending will continue to skyrocket. And so will the CRUSHING $36 TRILLION (and growing!) NATIONAL DEBT our grandchildren will wear like millstones around their necks.

_ALL SO PRIVILEGED UNION BULLIES CAN PAD THEIR WALLETS WITH OUR HARD-EARNED DOLLARS AND PAY OFF THEIR FAR-LEFT POLITICAL PALS_!

In order to "drain the swamp," you and I must unite together TODAY to help President Trump slay the DC Union-Boss Dragon.

FOR LIBERTY,

U.S. Senator Rand Paul

P.S. JOIN WITH ME TODAY IN SUPPORT OF PRESIDENT TRUMP and Elon Musk's crusade to slay Big Labor's DC Swamp Dragon. **[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=8i1i1bshdejuzhylemgc2zuy44zapoid8cz7p4tdimfkk1vi6vahtfua7i2hkbc5t6xqkve0yf0sc2dmymsqafa9q4xi2dpffy244f85ef8huogczl7rym24m4hwv93k35671wcacc8wzptzafhmmc0u975z6tu14ice7keav4scrsdq0jhubinacznu8hntsc48djd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t11v7m&__onlt=h)**.

Federal union bosses are funding virtually every lawsuit, protester and organized opposition to Donald Trump's efforts to Make America Great Again! And they are doing it with YOUR TAXDOLLARS!!!

AND PLEASE _make the most generous contribution you can afford to mobilize MORE TAXPAYERS_ to turn up the heat on my colleagues in the Senate and the House to support the President's spending reforms with each and every vote they cast.

* * *
**_The National Right to Work Committee is a nonprofit, nonpartisan, single-purpose citizens' organization dedicated to combating compulsory unionism through an aggressive program designed to mobilize public opposition to compulsory unionism and, at the same time, enlist public support for Right to Work legislation. The Committee's mailing address is 8001 Braddock Road, Springfield, Virginia 22160. The Committee can be contacted toll-free at 1-800-325-7892. Its web address is www.nrtwc.org

Not produced or e-mailed at taxpayer expense. To help the National Right to Work Committee grow, please **forward this** to a friend. _ **

clean_body: Fight the puppet masters Please read the message below from our sponsor. | Dear Fellow Taxpayer, I am going to share with you Washington DC's dirtiest secret. Federal union bosses have seized control of the federal workforce and declared President Trump and Elon Musk ENEMY #1 and #2 for fighting to "Drain the Swamp" and save hundreds of billions of tax dollars by downsizing and reforming the bloated DC bureaucracy! You see, union control of government is a CANCER killing the U.S. taxpayer -- impoverishing America's workers and entrepreneurs with red tape, wasteful spending and soaring inflation. Using tens of millions of dollars seized from workers' paychecks, Big Labor's federal union bosses are orchestrating virtually every howl of outrage, protest and lawsuit against Donald Trump's and Elon Musk's cutbacks and reforms. . . . . .paying for the lawyers, the plaintiffs, the lawsuits and the activists you see on TV marching and screaming into bullhorns. That's why I hope you will STAND UP TODAY FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP'S CRUSADE to slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon guarding "the Swamp" in Washington. Please agree to sign your PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT to President Trump, Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency and your U.S. Senators and Congressman. I'll give you a link to your petition in a moment, but I want to be sure you understand how serious this is. President Trump is fighting valiantly to tame the out-of-control federal bureaucracy. And he needs to know he has YOUR FULL SUPPORT to stand firm when the Swamp Rats in Washington lash out. And perhaps even more importantly, please sign your petitions DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman support President Trump's crusade with every vote they cast! The fact is government union bosses are the real puppet-masters pulling the strings behind the curtain in the "DC Swamp." That's why you and I must PROVE to President Trump (and my colleagues here in the Senate and House) that the American people OVERWHELMINGLY support his reforms and will not tolerate any more obstructionism, excuses or gridlock! Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (popularly known as DOGE) are exposing the scandals and corruption government union officials have been hiding for decades: $$$ Did you know that only 6% of federal bureaucrats show up in person for a full work week? (And that figure drops to 1% if you take out janitors, security guards, and maintenance personnel!) $$$ Can you believe that government union big shots are PAID with YOUR tax dollars to conduct so-called "official union business" -- COSTING TAXPAYERS NEARLY A QUARTER OF A BILLION TAX DOLLARS A YEAR? $$$ Were you aware that federal office buildings cost $15.7 BILLION annually just to keep the doors open? And that only 12% of federal office space is even occupied? $$$ Are you outraged to learn federal law effectively bars open shop, non-union contractors from bidding on federal public works projects -- soaking American taxpayers for an estimated $21.7 billion a year in inflated construction costs? $$$ Did you know that if a conscientious public servant does a good job and their supervisor awards them a merit-pay bonus (or tries to fire or discipline an incompetent bureaucrat) without "going through the union" that would be a VIOLATION OF FEDERAL LABOR RULES?!? $$$ Are you angry that in 2021, JOE BIDEN BESTOWED $130 BILLION UPON TEACHER UNION RADICALS who are brainwashing our kids! The fact is government union czars are the single biggest obstacle President Trump must overcome to cut out-of-control government spending and flagrant waste, fraud and abuse. ! As soon as their handpicked political cronies lost the elections, GOVERNMENT UNION OFFICIALS IMMEDIATELY VOWED TO BLOCK TRUMP'S REFORMS. You see, President Trump is not only standing up to the liberal media and the radical Democrats, he's taking on the unelected czars who secretly rule our government from within. Union officials I bet you've never even heard of -- like Everett Kelly. He's not a Member of Congress. Not a Governor nor a Senator. No voter has ever cast a ballot for him. And yet he rules Washington DC with an iron fist from his throne atop the largest government union, the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE). The AFGE chieftain rules an empire of nearly a million government workers paid an average of $118,260 per year, costing taxpayers an estimated $97.4 BILLION ANNUALLY. Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency are exposing outrage after outrage committed by federal union bosses like AFGE President Everett Kelly: \--- AFGE Council 220 President Witold Skwierczynski COLLECTED A PAYCHECK FROM THE SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION FOR 34 YEARS WITHOUT WORKING A SINGLE HOUR! He couldn't have gone to work if he'd tried because he was banned from Social Security offices nationwide after sending A PHOTO OF HIS PENIS to a fellow employee at 2 o'clock in the morning! He only quit because Trump's executive order required him and other union officials to (in his words) go "back to our desks to process claims." Now, he's collecting a full pension "close to equal to my salary." \--- The Federal Mediation and Conciliation Service played "the heavy" to force workers and employers to knuckle under to union-boss demands. The agency reportedly was "RIFE WITH CORRUPTION" whose staffers "LIVED LIKE KINGS." Despite having only 60 employees (many of whose offices had ENSUITE BATHROOMS WITH PRIVATE SHOWERS!), the FMCS occupied a nine-story office tower on DC's posh K Street. According to the Daily Wire, for years the agency's Director billed the taxpayer for his meals and living expenses, claiming to be on a "years-long business trip" to DC. \--- Corrupt union officials are notorious for treating worker pension funds like their own lavish piggybanks. MANY union pension plans are teetering on the verge of insolvency. So JOE BIDEN BILKED THE TAXPAYER FOR $32 BILLION TO BAIL-OUT A SINGLE TEAMSTER UNION PENSION FUND. That's bad enough. But instead of placing the pension into receivership under government oversight, he left the foxes in charge of the henhouse! . How did Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats let it come to this? Well, they were well compensated. . . Organized Labor poured an estimated $25 BILLION into the last elections to defeat Donald Trump and elect Kamala Harris -- and other radical Democrats like her! You see, federal workers are REQUIRED BY LAW to submit to the so-called "representation" of well-heeled union bigwigs whether they like it or not. Federal law gives union officials power over workers WHO AREN'T EVEN UNION MEMBERS! Most government bureaucrats figured out long ago that THEY DON'T REALLY WORK FOR THE TAXPAYER, NOR EVEN THE PRESIDENT... THEY WORK FOR THE UNION BOSSES. Plain and simple. President Trump knows he can't "Drain the Swamp" until we support his efforts to "Slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon." The Union-Boss Dragon should be stripped bare: \--- NO Monopoly Bargaining power over any federal employee. \--- NO money deducted from any federal worker's or contractor's paycheck. \--- NO authority to negotiate salaries, wages, job rules, promotion, firing or hiring. \--- NO privileged status in winning multiple-billion dollar federal contracts. \--- NO payment for work except for the US taxpayer, not a union. . But government union chiefs are so powerful and so entrenched, I will need more than your petitions to slay the union bigwigs' DC Dragon. That's why I've joined forces with the National Right to Work Committee. When it comes to fighting AND BEATING corrupt union officials, they are the experts. And that's why I hope you'll not only sign your petition but also make a generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or even $1,000 today to help the National Right to Work Committee EXPAND their nationwide campaign to prove to my colleagues in Washington, DC that politicians should fear "We, The People" more than "inside the Beltway" union politicos. I don't know what you can afford to give today. Maybe for you a contribution of $25 or $50 is a stretch. I know for others $500 or $1000 will not be too much. After you sign your petition, I ask you to be as generous as you can. You see, this Petition Drive is just the first step of a nationwide grassroots lobbying program to focus public pressure like a laser-beam on key Senators and Congressmen to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT! The National Right to Work Committee needs your financial support today to: 1\. GATHER THREE MILLION PETITIONS SUPPORTING DONALD TRUMP AND ELON MUSK'S DOGE and urging lawmakers to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT and end it NOW! 2\. Launch a publicity and media campaign with news conferences, editorial board meetings, and op-eds by respected commentators and opinion leaders. 3\. Mail, text, use social media and email millions of taxpayers to turn up the heat on wavering politicians to get off the fence and do their jobs to curb and corral the out-of-control government workforce. 4\. And funds permitting, air costly hard-hitting TV, radio and Internet ads (especially on Fox News and Fox Radio, and local conservative talk!) to generate MILLIONS of letters, phone calls and texts to Capitol Hill demanding Big Labor's monopoly bargaining powers over the federal workforce be repealed. That's why I am asking you to to let President Trump and Elon Musk's DOGE know they have your FULL SUPPORT AND GRATITUDE for taking on the out-of-control federal bureaucracy and the union-boss puppet masters, and DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman help the President bring our nation's unelected rulers in Washington to heel. But the Swamp Creatures in DC and my colleagues on Capitol Hill will never allow President Trump to slay Big Labor's DC Dragon without your support NOW. . Federal spending will continue to skyrocket. And so will the CRUSHING $36 TRILLION (and growing!) NATIONAL DEBT our grandchildren will wear like millstones around their necks. ALL SO PRIVILEGED UNION BULLIES CAN PAD THEIR WALLETS WITH OUR HARD-EARNED DOLLARS AND PAY OFF THEIR FAR-LEFT POLITICAL PALS! In order to "drain the swamp," you and I must unite together TODAY to help President Trump slay the DC Union-Boss Dragon. FOR LIBERTY, U.S. Senator Rand Paul P.S. JOIN WITH ME TODAY IN SUPPORT OF PRESIDENT TRUMP and Elon Musk's crusade to slay Big Labor's DC Swamp Dragon. . Federal union bosses are funding virtually every lawsuit, protester and organized opposition to Donald Trump's efforts to Make America Great Again! And they are doing it with YOUR TAXDOLLARS!!! AND PLEASE make the most generous contribution you can afford to mobilize MORE TAXPAYERS to turn up the heat on my colleagues in the Senate and the House to support the President's spending reforms with each and every vote they cast. The National Right to Work Committee is a nonprofit, nonpartisan, single-purpose citizens' organization dedicated to combating compulsory unionism through an aggressive program designed to mobilize public opposition to compulsory unionism and, at the same time, enlist public support for Right to Work legislation. The Committee's mailing address is 8001 Braddock Road, Springfield, Virginia 22160. The Committee can be contacted toll-free at 1-800-325-7892. Its web address is www.nrtwc.org Not produced or e-mailed at taxpayer expense. subject: They think we’re assholes

Fellow Conservative,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

_[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5a5a44dfe6a6470a93745961b59864f9&_e=yccPnarcgoBHQBlQNjjVyfmPijwPPs0KpflA2cO1ObTpNIRcBlfaOM8b5BauDWhdgw3THYyQmQRKWt-P6keU4-LhHXqVAjOpjCACVZFfHN67kxNr3BuMco2qL2tekEZmrrPkz_26kfnUYetBp31aePofUtjPyC7RFsizj_6KnZtYFuKnvVqH07vRlOkNFxqD0_VyfdOLENXdSvVDx66xR9YmW1f8lJc3XUS1-YsBWiiQf_xEwbH8L5HmZuNnjekk6K_wz-1Ahg02p3T12wA86-Z3xTSC3w3cz2hAGdNTBMqTofIdHR7JI_W_iflIHocRgoJaD_nYLuFvHKu5uOdJysD-kXWYSDHE3vffBM0qrtFhJCuvJ3C35FQRs_jFEnhk-5A54jDpNx78VOgqb-NRYrMa1ArgbA4_1w9RIPeV7QJAeUe_Zd7bylZTJl3iZabeJarwRyXyml_klE7dmEWdCFHNbyjtcbu1Yz7x81f_2JwspQSllFT65VYTlNqTIGP_3juK47KNUczVQE6Vrm-OfmIKQysM743zYDYU5IetkpDm0LY_OEoyiaaaqiCgGCk2CJ7qH-rnOowTQhH-m8oUJCTWV4MXtdeeHg9dPvNtZzTWPCqfFuP9xSkDGTODNvCPdBnb_gZFoHxIGcE5Bss9909WEl8AdUiHOcp1m8SFqkGp1Hhg3koQz5isGF52Hd9vxa7nT9xkfU9slj9q6qM7SAlcfEm-2GUvsN4bR08j77KZ9Wlxf1vM8ev9N97SX93p)_
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but to**fight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose.**

I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society.

While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating.

**You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. **

**[Will you chip in $1, $5, or even $50 to help me win this battle?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5a5a44dfe6a6470a93745961b59864f9&_e=yccPnarcgoBHQBlQNjjVyfmPijwPPs0KpflA2cO1ObTpNIRcBlfaOM8b5BauDWhdgw3THYyQmQRKWt-P6keU4-LhHXqVAjOpjCACVZFfHN67kxNr3BuMco2qL2tekEZmrrPkz_26kfnUYetBp31aePofUtjPyC7RFsizj_6KnZtYFuKnvVqH07vRlOkNFxqD0_VyfdOLENXdSvVDx66xR9YmW1f8lJc3XUS1-YsBWiiQf_xEwbH8L5HmZuNnjekk6K_wz-1Ahg02p3T12wA86xttjYrZJ--Gw9tQt3dkoBTub4QLMcxS2C6rSwtuuP9rfjvEQvUX0NzmaqviPTGLlkgiRzt8ohEGYZo5ky04ORIJA0twPdEJxhkOF0bQ3CQA2KBWSojtHYPOvtdIwxBugiNiT5pGzsKX4PRnG2_vqJFTnLjprOq2enkY6x8qP4g6Jb9TG_ZvIUvxD49dargssv3sA_IROmEGXp4h8cLuxNWh_Pq0xuLb12xbi5E0VW7-L-hvq8V6t9sb5k0LT3tlnSYno9yTYBbmoUkzpwfxFQj26qJO3oqq3B9RJwLAfqkRQRnhpcxnT39ipA59JNEIr8ivxFQH4j4YDdX-M6DlTr0TKR2n7ADyh8PjhAcO6G2QNDRIAzgxclHOGvQSabjJ9-06uXhxoManXPVlXtLw3M4qhN75AjN4eErB3FXl8Xwjouh03QOhcaXbpfBNzjYsd7xFS1qltBR2vaQAlRyC49ySRPEcoClifkwR7rTsVyuJ)**

I grew up playing hockey. **I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after 9/11.** I served because I love this country, wanted to make my mom proud, and knew I had something to give. Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield.

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. With your help, I know we can flip this Senate seat for the Republican Party - but that will require you getting involved TODAY. And you have a choice.

__ I’ve earned advanced degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins. I’ve trained in nuclear deterrence. I’ve worked across cultures, built teams under pressure, and led calmly when it mattered most. But none of that compares to the challenge ahead of me now — earning your trust and building a movement powerful enough to flip this seat.

**I’m not asking for a blank check. I’m asking for a chance.**

body:
Two options. One choice.
#
Let’s play a quick game of Would You Rather, Peter:
**Option 1:** Would you prefer to vote for a candidate who has received hundreds of thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from the massive corporations responsible for tearing up our country?
**Option 2:** Or would you rather support a candidate who is building a true grassroots movement, with support from tens of thousands of everyday people across the country, just $5 or $15 at a time?
**Heartland Patriots is committed to supporting candidates who align squarely with Option 2.** We want to support real working people who make the decision to run for office for all the right reasons — to stand up to the billionaires and oligarchs actively undermining our democracy, to defend the freedoms that make our country so great, and to actually make lives better for everyday people in their communities.

clean_body: To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! | Fellow American, I’ll be blunt. To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! If we start missing our fundraising deadlines, we’ll have to start slashing key components of our campaign infrastructure. Right now, we’re in serious danger of falling short of tonight’s mid-month fundraising objective by just a few dollars. In a race as contested as the one we’re facing, we need every part of our campaign running at full speed now through Election Day. I know it doesn’t seem like a lot, but donations from patriots like you across the country add up fast. I don’t have the luxury of leaning on coastal elites and Leftist megadonors to keep my campaign running. Your support is the lifeblood of my campaign’s fight to keep this Senate seat and our Senate Majority in Republican hands. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

I serve all of WA state – and thanks to you, I can show up when they need my help the most. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113397288/563630739/1121257924?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk540-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDg3NjczYi0wZTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YztYEPPDtnc38VMsdbGPKlpFUvTYUinmzWjj8spt0jg=)

Peter, I've been traveling across the Evergreen State to hear the concerns of working folks and health care providers since Trump's Big, Ugly Betrayal passed.
Trump and Republicans ran on a lot of promises, and lowering costs was at the forefront. But since they took power in January, they have done practically nothing to lower costs. In fact, they are making life more expensive for working people by passing into law the largest cuts to Medicaid and health care in our country's history – all to pass massive tax cuts for billionaires who don't need them, while prices skyrocket due to Trump's tariffs.

Premiums are already set to skyrocket for next year, and health care will become more expensive for everyone when millions of Americans lose coverage as a result of Republicans’ attacks on Medicaid and the Affordable Care Act.
And here’s the thing: it's rural parts of Washington state that will be hit the hardest by Republican health care cuts.
**_That's_ why I've been talking to people in rural and "red" communities to make sure everyone understands what's happening with health care in America and WHY. **If we want to start fixing this mess, we need to make plain WHO is at fault for the higher costs, longer wait times, and worse access to care.
I believe Democrats need to talk to everyone everywhere to win support and build trust.
**So ahead of my mid-month deadline at 11:59 p.m. tonight, I'm counting on your help to reach my $20,000 goal.**
**[If you agree that Democrats need to work to win support everywhere, will you please help me put a stop to Trump's momentum in 2026 by pitching in $5, $25, or anything you can spare today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113397290/563630742/-145648726?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk540-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDg3NjczYi0wZTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YztYEPPDtnc38VMsdbGPKlpFUvTYUinmzWjj8spt0jg=)**

name: Laura Gillen
subject: I’ll be honest—
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
This might seem like just another email. But the truth is, summer is one of the hardest times of the year for fundraising and right now we’re falling behind.

|
---
| Peter,

I know it’s summer. People are unplugged, traveling, enjoying some well-earned rest and political emails probably aren’t top of mind.

But I need to be honest: We’re aiming to get 300 grassroots contributions before midnight to catch up on our FEC goal and we’re still 56 donations short. _**[Can you chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113397296/563630779/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-08-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODY3NjA2YS0wZTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FOKKpr2l1dqv7FSm4IiZH0VY036jna95_TcCBfk-u4=)**_

This might seem like just another email. But the truth is, summer is one of the hardest times of the year for fundraising and right now we’re falling behind.

We’re almost halfway through the quarter and Republicans are building a serious cash advantage. We recently learned that the NRCC outraised Democrats for the first time in years. If we don’t keep pace we’ll fall even further behind before the FEC deadline next month.

This seat is one of the most competitive in the country. It’s the only toss-up district in New York and national Republicans are already spending big to flip it. If we don’t hold this seat, our path to taking back the House is nearly impossible.

[_**If you can be one of the 56 people we need to step up before midnight, it’ll go a long way. And if now’s not the time, thank you for reading and being part of this grassroots team.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113397297/563630780/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-08-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODY3NjA2YS0wZTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FOKKpr2l1dqv7FSm4IiZH0VY036jna95_TcCBfk-u4=)

Gratefully,

Laura
---

* * *

subject: My promise to you
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
For me, it's simple. I’ll never lie to you. I can’t be bought. I have your back. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/vol-with-jawroski-14188424?e=5d8d80652b)

| | , This campaign is built on a simple promise: **I’ll never lie to you.
I can’t be bought.
I have your back.** Texans deserve an Attorney General who tells the truth, serves with integrity, and puts the people above politics. That’s how I’ve lived my life, and that’s how I’ll serve in office. We’ve all seen what happens when the state’s top lawyer uses the office to protect political friends and punish enemies. It erodes trust, divides communities, and leaves everyday Texans without the advocate they deserve. **As your Attorney General, I’ll be guided by one principle: the law should protect _you_ —your rights, your freedoms, your future.** But to get there, I need your help. Every donation, no matter the size, fuels this grassroots movement to bring honesty and accountability back to Texas government. [**We can do this, but I need your help. Chip in today to join the fight >>>**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=e5f77f43e3&e=5d8d80652b)

Onward,

name: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding
subject: This moment can’t wait.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Peter,
When Cori first asked me to join Movement for Freedom, I didn’t hesitate for a second. I knew this was the moment; the moment to act before Trump and his allies completely dismantle our democracy.
Because what we do here and now matters .
We recruit and train activists to run for office. We teach communities how to hold elected officials accountable. We connect organizers across the country to build a real, structural response to authoritarian threats. We won’t let our freedoms be stolen from us.
But movements like this don’t just build themselves, and the work takes resources. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act]
$15 can help print materials for community trainings [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act&amount=15]
$35 can cover one hour of an organizer's time to recruit local leaders [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act&amount=35]
$50 can help us host a workshop on holding elected officials accountable [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act&amount=50]
$100 fuels the national network that connects organizers everywhere [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act&amount=100]
With Trump amplifying his attacks by the day, we’ve got a lot of work to do. Knowing we can count on your support every month means we can plan ahead, hire more organizers, and respond to Trump’s attacks the moment they happen. We can’t stand idly by. Donate today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act&recurring=1]
MAKE IT MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250815_midmonth_act&recurring=1]
This is our moment. Let’s meet it together.
Onwards,
— Stephany
Lead Spokesperson, Movement for Freedom

Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [https://www.movement4freedom.com] .

clean_body: [] Peter, When Cori first asked me to join Movement for Freedom, I didn’t hesitate for a second. I knew this was the moment; the moment to act before Trump and his allies completely dismantle our democracy. Because what we do here and now matters . We recruit and train activists to run for office. We teach communities how to hold elected officials accountable. We connect organizers across the country to build a real, structural response to authoritarian threats. We won’t let our freedoms be stolen from us. But movements like this don’t just build themselves, and the work takes resources. [] $15 can help print materials for community trainings [] $35 can cover one hour of an organizer's time to recruit local leaders [] $50 can help us host a workshop on holding elected officials accountable [] $100 fuels the national network that connects organizers everywhere [] With Trump amplifying his attacks by the day, we’ve got a lot of work to do. Knowing we can count on your support every month means we can plan ahead, hire more organizers, and respond to Trump’s attacks the moment they happen. We can’t stand idly by. Donate today. [] MAKE IT MONTHLY [] This is our moment. Let’s meet it together. Onwards, — Stephany Lead Spokesperson, Movement for Freedom [] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve. Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [] . body:
We need as many supporters as possible with us in this fight
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113397608/563631622/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyOWFhZWY3LTBlN2EtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LsWlnt6VTl_ql_qfu-yGVNbFBboUnmdU67E3MUuopro=&emci=180efaab-fa79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=229aaef7-0e7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Republicans are quickly moving America toward an autocracy, and it should frighten all of us. What’s happening in Texas is a big part of the blueprint. Let us explain why: Texas Governor Greg Abbott got the call from the Trump administration to pass a “ruthless” gerrymander. He didn't bat an eye. He used tragic flooding in the state to call a special session of the legislature, then made meeting Trump’s demand his top priority. Texas Republicans have now proposed an extremely gerrymandered map that strips Black and Latino voters of their right to be fairly represented. Let’s be clear: In a democracy, the government is supposed to be elected by and accountable to the people. This map takes power away from people, with lawmakers instead getting to choose their constituents instead of the other way around. And let’s be completely clear — this is an all-out effort to steal the midterm elections. **The NDRC is fighting for an America where elections are free, maps are fair, and our democracy is truly representative. But creating this reality requires defeating GOP gerrymandering and rising autocracy. It requires bold pro-democracy champions on the frontlines — including those willing to fight back against the biggest anti-democracy forces. Will you join us?** **[**Please add your name to join the NDRC in sounding the alarms and supporting emergency efforts to stop Republicans from breaking our democracy — in Texas and across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113397609/563631623/1776930759?refcode=sign_ndrc_tier1_email_AutocracyTexas_email_20250815-NDRC-Tier1-AutocracyTexas_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=sign&utm_content=20250815-NDRC-Tier1-AutocracyTexas_&utm_campaign=AutocracyTexas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyOWFhZWY3LTBlN2EtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LsWlnt6VTl_ql_qfu-yGVNbFBboUnmdU67E3MUuopro=&emci=180efaab-fa79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=229aaef7-0e7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113397610/563631624/1776930759?refcode=sign_ndrc_tier1_email_AutocracyTexas_email_20250815-NDRC-Tier1-AutocracyTexas_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=sign&utm_content=20250815-NDRC-Tier1-AutocracyTexas_&utm_campaign=AutocracyTexas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyOWFhZWY3LTBlN2EtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LsWlnt6VTl_ql_qfu-yGVNbFBboUnmdU67E3MUuopro=&emci=180efaab-fa79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=229aaef7-0e7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
