Make no mistake: If Texas’s proposed congressional map passes, it would unfairly sway electoral results for years to come. It takes a map that is already being challenged by voters for violating the Voting Rights Act, and takes it to the extreme — in order to secure Republicans’ unearned power.
And they won’t stop in Texas.
This administration is putting pressure on other states to follow suit. Like President Obama warned, the U.S. is getting dangerously close to a Hungarian-style autocracy. **From the gutting of public institutions to assaults on marginalized communities and attacks on the rule of law.**
**We need supporters like you raising your voice to ensure we have a fighting chance to protect our democracy.** **[**Add your name if you agree we must say NO to autocracy and fight back at moments like this.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113397611/563631625/1776930759?refcode=sign_ndrc_tier1_email_AutocracyTexas_email_20250815-NDRC-Tier1-AutocracyTexas_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=sign&utm_content=20250815-NDRC-Tier1-AutocracyTexas_&utm_campaign=AutocracyTexas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyOWFhZWY3LTBlN2EtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LsWlnt6VTl_ql_qfu-yGVNbFBboUnmdU67E3MUuopro=&emci=180efaab-fa79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=229aaef7-0e7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)**

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This is how we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250815-731&t=1001&akid=744%2E251025%2EquUtCa ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250815-731&t=1002&akid=744%2E251025%2EquUtCa ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter,

My team just updated our Path to Victory Memo, and they wanted me to share
it with you directly. It lays out where this race stands, what it’ll take
to win, and how we’re building the strongest people-powered campaign in
Michigan.

Before you read it, I’ll be blunt: We can’t execute this plan without you.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250815-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250815-731&refcode2=744_251025_quUtCa&akid=744%2E251025%2EquUtCa ]I don’t love asking for money, but if you’re able to chip in
$10, I’d be so grateful. The memo below explains more about
why we’re counting on individual contributions to win.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250815-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250815-731&refcode2=744_251025_quUtCa&akid=744%2E251025%2EquUtCa ]Donate $10 ››

Abdul for U.S. Senate — Path to Victory Memo

State of the race

Multiple election analysts already have Michigan rated as a toss-up. That
means we’re in one of the most competitive Senate races in the country.

Alongside that, AIPAC and corporate PACs are gearing up to spend whatever
it takes to flip this seat red. This could be the most expensive Senate
race in our state’s history.

Early grassroots fundraising is how we level the playing field and prepare
for next November.

Abdul’s electability

In a crowded primary such as ours, voters want to know who’s the most
electable candidate for the general election. Without a doubt, Abdul has
an edge over the competition.

He’s already run statewide and built relationships across Michigan. He can
unify coalitions Democrats have lost in recent elections — including young
men.

And in a moment where voters overwhelmingly want candidates who actually
deliver, Abdul is head and shoulders above the rest: He rebuilt Detroit’s
health department from bankruptcy, set about erasing $700 million in
medical debt for 300,000 Michiganders, and reduced lead contamination in
our schools.

On top of that, Abdul is the only candidate to have never accepted money
from AIPAC or corporate PACs— underscoring our campaign’s commitment to
working people.

That’s the kind of leadership Michiganders want in Washington.

Key endorsements

On day one, Senator Bernie Sanders endorsed this campaign, his first
Senate endorsement of the cycle. That’s because Bernie knows Abdul isn’t
your average candidate — he’s a movement-builder, a doctor, a dad, and a
fighter for working people.

We’ve also secured key endorsements from Congressman Ro Khanna, Attorney
General Keith Ellison, and dozens of local Michigan leaders.

Contrast between candidates

While Abdul fights for Medicare for All and speaks out against spending
taxpayer dollars on Netanyahu’s genocode, our opponents are standing with
corporate lobbyists and extremists who prioritize profits over people’s
lives.

Our likely Republican opponent, Mike Rogers, helped ship Michigan jobs
overseas and took more money from the insurance industry than any other
Michigander in Congress.

The choice is clear: We can have a people-powered movement that fights for
all of us, or more of the same-old politics that put working people last.

Peter, this
campaign has the plan to win. Now, we just need an unstoppable movement.

That’s why we’re focused on meeting as many voters as possible in the
coming months. Every contribution expands our reach.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250815-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250815-731&refcode2=744_251025_quUtCa&akid=744%2E251025%2EquUtCa ]Pitch in $10 (or whatever you can) today, and let’s keep
building momentum together.

Thanks,

Abdul

clean_body: [ ]Abdul for US Senate [ ]Abdul for US Senate Hey Peter, My team just updated our Path to Victory Memo, and they wanted me to share it with you directly. It lays out where this race stands, what it’ll take to win, and how we’re building the strongest people-powered campaign in Michigan. Before you read it, I’ll be blunt: We can’t execute this plan without you. [ ]I don’t love asking for money, but if you’re able to chip in $10, I’d be so grateful. The memo below explains more about why we’re counting on individual contributions to win. [ ]Donate $10 ›› Abdul for U.S. Senate — Path to Victory Memo State of the race Multiple election analysts already have Michigan rated as a toss-up. That means we’re in one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Alongside that, AIPAC and corporate PACs are gearing up to spend whatever it takes to flip this seat red. This could be the most expensive Senate race in our state’s history. Early grassroots fundraising is how we level the playing field and prepare for next November. Abdul’s electability In a crowded primary such as ours, voters want to know who’s the most electable candidate for the general election. Without a doubt, Abdul has an edge over the competition. He’s already run statewide and built relationships across Michigan. He can unify coalitions Democrats have lost in recent elections — including young men. And in a moment where voters overwhelmingly want candidates who actually deliver, Abdul is head and shoulders above the rest: He rebuilt Detroit’s health department from bankruptcy, set about erasing $700 million in medical debt for 300,000 Michiganders, and reduced lead contamination in our schools. On top of that, Abdul is the only candidate to have never accepted money from AIPAC or corporate PACs— underscoring our campaign’s commitment to working people. That’s the kind of leadership Michiganders want in Washington. Key endorsements On day one, Senator Bernie Sanders endorsed this campaign, his first Senate endorsement of the cycle. That’s because Bernie knows Abdul isn’t your average candidate — he’s a movement-builder, a doctor, a dad, and a fighter for working people. We’ve also secured key endorsements from Congressman Ro Khanna, Attorney General Keith Ellison, and dozens of local Michigan leaders. Contrast between candidates While Abdul fights for Medicare for All and speaks out against spending taxpayer dollars on Netanyahu’s genocode, our opponents are standing with corporate lobbyists and extremists who prioritize profits over people’s lives. Our likely Republican opponent, Mike Rogers, helped ship Michigan jobs overseas and took more money from the insurance industry than any other Michigander in Congress. The choice is clear: We can have a people-powered movement that fights for all of us, or more of the same-old politics that put working people last. Peter, this campaign has the plan to win. Now, we just need an unstoppable movement. That’s why we’re focused on meeting as many voters as possible in the coming months. Every contribution expands our reach. [ ]Pitch in $10 (or whatever you can) today, and let’s keep building momentum together. Thanks, Abdul

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We're in the homestretch now, and you deserve to know exactly what we're doing to flip Virginia blue.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250815_1_spanberger?refcode=em20250815-3819&refcode2=3819_400544_NvCESd&akid=3819%2E400544%2ENvCESd)
Team, we have less than 90 days to go until Election Day!
I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. [**Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Deb Haaland to power our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250815_1_spanberger?refcode=em20250815-3819&refcode2=3819_400544_NvCESd&akid=3819%2E400544%2ENvCESd)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250815_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250815-3819&refcode2=3819_400544_NvCESd&akid=3819%2E400544%2ENvCESd)**
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources.
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
[**Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $5 or more to my campaign and Deb Haaland to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250815_1_spanberger?refcode=em20250815-3819&amount=5&refcode2=3819_400544_NvCESd&akid=3819%2E400544%2ENvCESd)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250815_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250815-3819&refcode2=3819_400544_NvCESd&akid=3819%2E400544%2ENvCESd)**
I'm grateful to have you on my team,
Abigail Spanberger
* * *

name: Rob Bonta
subject: re: Our trial
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250815&t=1001&akid=1913%2E1088799%2EJakn87 ]Rob Bonta

Donald Trump broke the law — period.

This week we made our case in court that the Trump administration’s use of
federalized California National Guard troops and Marines for civilian law
enforcement in Los Angeles was a clear violation of federal law.

Our case was backed by facts and specifics — we mapped out precisely what
Trump did and why it was illegal.

I asked the court to block the President from using the military for
domestic law enforcement — and from maintaining a standing army in
Southern California.

I look forward to getting a decision in the near future, and I’ll keep you
posted every step of the way — but right now, I just want to take a second
to thank you for all your support.

None of this would be possible without this team’s commitment to justice
and freedom for all — I wouldn’t be Attorney General without you by my
side, and we wouldn’t be able to keep up these fights without your
support.

This trial may have concluded, but so many of our most important fights
are just beginning. So I have to ask: Will you help me keep this up by
chipping in to my re-election campaign?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250815?refcode=em20250815-1913&refcode2=1913_1088799_Jakn87&akid=1913%2E1088799%2EJakn87 ]I’m on the ballot for re-election next year, and I can’t win without
you — anything you give will make a difference, because every single
dollar adds up.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250815?refcode=em20250815-1913&amount=5&refcode2=1913_1088799_Jakn87&akid=1913%2E1088799%2EJakn87 ]Donate $5 »

Thank you so much for standing with me.

More to come,
Rob

name: Schrier HQ
subject: Every newborn deserves a healthy start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We can’t gamble with our kids’ health. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113397857/563632422/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDEzMDAyYy0xMDdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aN014aVFS7jaSTgkWAMW2x87Jt4cNUvz8H4hYNwVT-M=&emci=e11da91d-1b79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1413002c-107a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

As a pediatrician and a mom, Kim knows just how critical the earliest months of life are for a child.

In those first weeks, every little thing a newborn does—every sound, every movement, every cry—can make a parent wonder: Is this normal? _Is something wrong?_

Too often, those questions come with no clear answers. That’s why Kim just introduced the _Newborn Screening Saves Lives Reauthorization Act_ , legislation that will help improve and expand newborn screenings for rare but serious conditions. When a medical concern is detected early, we can act early—giving families the opportunity to address an illness before it’s critical. That’s the kind of care every newborn deserves, _no matter where they’re born or who their parents are_.

While Kim is busy working to make those first months safer and healthier for our children, RFK Jr. is pushing policies that are nothing short of **terrifying**. He's hell-bent on rolling back childhood vaccine schedules, undermining proven science, and chipping away at the same public health measures that protect our most vulnerable.

We can’t risk the health of an entire generation because RFK is pushing fringe ideas and conspiracy theories. That’s why Kim ran for Congress— _and won_ —in the first place, Peter. She'll always stand up for science, for families, and for the health of every child in our communities. Whether it’s protecting childhood vaccines, improving newborn screenings, or making sure parents have the resources they need during one of life’s most beautiful, yet challenging, times, Kim will never stop fighting for you and your family.

**[Our campaign is coming up on a crucial August mid-month fundraising deadline, and Kim needs your support. It’s essential we ensure a for-the-people candidate like Kim can keep up this work in Congress and continue serving WA-08. Can we count on you to chip in $5 to uplift Kim’s campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113397858/563632423/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250815_mm1_fndd_gq_act___shq_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250815_mm1_fndd_gq_act___shq_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=1413002c-107a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode2=1413002c-107a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDEzMDAyYy0xMDdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aN014aVFS7jaSTgkWAMW2x87Jt4cNUvz8H4hYNwVT-M=)** clean_body: We can’t gamble with our kids’ health. Peter, As a pediatrician and a mom, Kim knows just how critical the earliest months of life are for a child. In those first weeks, every little thing a newborn does—every sound, every movement, every cry—can make a parent wonder: Is this normal? Is something wrong? Too often, those questions come with no clear answers. That’s why Kim just introduced the Newborn Screening Saves Lives Reauthorization Act , legislation that will help improve and expand newborn screenings for rare but serious conditions. When a medical concern is detected early, we can act early—giving families the opportunity to address an illness before it’s critical. That’s the kind of care every newborn deserves, no matter where they’re born or who their parents are. While Kim is busy working to make those first months safer and healthier for our children, RFK Jr. is pushing policies that are nothing short of terrifying. He's hell-bent on rolling back childhood vaccine schedules, undermining proven science, and chipping away at the same public health measures that protect our most vulnerable. We can’t risk the health of an entire generation because RFK is pushing fringe ideas and conspiracy theories. That’s why Kim ran for Congress— and won —in the first place, Peter. She'll always stand up for science, for families, and for the health of every child in our communities. Whether it’s protecting childhood vaccines, improving newborn screenings, or making sure parents have the resources they need during one of life’s most beautiful, yet challenging, times, Kim will never stop fighting for you and your family. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for believing in this fight, Schrier HQ Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. subject: Obama is right. Our democracy is dying in the GOP’s hands
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Former President Barack Obama just praised the Texas House Democrats for putting themselves on the line to defend our democracy. He's right. This fight is real, and it's urgent.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/Screenshot%202025-08-14%20214120.png]
I cannot stress this enough. What we are seeing from Trump and his cronies is dangerous, abnormal, and cruel. They try to rig maps, bully communities, and rewrite the rules to hang on to power. That is not leadership. That is a threat to everything we believe about fair elections and equal voice.
I’ll stand with the Texas Democrats who chose courage. I’ll fight for fair maps, real voting rights, and a system where voters pick politicians, not the other way around. I won’t let anyone silence our neighbors or steal their voice at the ballot box.
If you are with me, chip in right now so we can organize, protect the vote, and win:

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Re: Trump-won seat
body:
|
#
Friend, At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you to contribute [**$3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113398645/563635340/1362877131?refcode=em-8.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWI3MjU2Yy0xMjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LcxC6GpWjEOhN6Pv-Ros3L6BWIDaZgnzV_2nhiTbeJ0=) – or whatever you can – to help me keep MI-08 blue. But first, let me tell you why your support matters so much right now. This is a Trump-won seat. I ran in 2024 to fight for working families – and it’s been my focus every single day since I was sworn in. That’s why I voted against Trump’s extreme budget last month. It’s why I stood up to cuts that will hurt working families. And it’s why I am sounding the alarm about tax breaks for billionaires that force everyday people to sacrifice more. Because I am fighting back, Republicans have already dumped over **$800,000** in dark money into this district to attack me – and we’re still a year out from Election Day. To add to that, our first GOP opponent jumped into the race. He’s already on the record saying he’d vote yes on that same budget I opposed. **Needless to say, the stakes in this race couldn’t be higher.** National Republicans are targeting MI-08 because they know it’s one of the most competitive districts in the nation – and they’re pouring resources into districts like mine to lock in their majority. [**That’s why today’s request is so important, friend. We’re halfway through our third fundraising quarter but falling short of where we need to be. body:
| |
---
Peter, Rob Bresnahan has made $7 million in the 7 months he’s been in office off stock trades alone! Banning congressional stock trading is the very thing he ran on.

But when he got to Washington? He sold Pennsylvanian families out to make quick millions.

Bresnahan betrayed Pennsylvania, and **it’s time we fire him and elect new leadership for PA-08.** [Peter, will you rush a donation today and support our fight for 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113399163/563637045/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250815_FR_Bresnahan_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU5ZDgxYi0xMzdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rje0Y06jZeZ8kLYlkUXAodVMm-YzMEaDGiPzFz0PyPg=) | | **[FIRE BRESNAHAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113399169/563637061/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250815_FR_Bresnahan_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU5ZDgxYi0xMzdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rje0Y06jZeZ8kLYlkUXAodVMm-YzMEaDGiPzFz0PyPg=)**
---
While Bresnahan is making millions, his votes are costing Pennsylvanians money! His vote for the Big Bullsh*t Bill means:
* Pennsylvanian families will **pay an average $130 MORE for their energy bills.**
* **310,000 Pennsylvanians** will lose Medicaid.
* Insurance premiums for those who still have health care could **increase by nearly $1,300 a year.**

Selfish politicians like Bresnahan who only look after their own wallets CANNOT be re-elected. [Peter, this is a fight for real leadership in Pennsylvania, and to do that, we have to fire Bresnahan. But when he got to Washington? He sold Pennsylvanian families out to make quick millions. Bresnahan betrayed Pennsylvania, and it’s time we fire him and elect new leadership for PA-08. = | | = While Bresnahan is making millions, his votes are costing Pennsylvanians money! name: The Feel Good Flyover
subject: Amsterdam Saves the Cat, Walk Across America, and a Dog Podcast
body:
Amsterdam is taking steps, literally, to [keep its feline residents safe](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdF7ZAwZTuEhDt2lTolk8BicGr-zRIv4-4hXvB14zxVzp6J775zk_MaZ4rL9xJxfWMHPI80FnTcRMZca9MhWPe8UPVd5oQT4x_cMZFBiprNRm9hjTNXeNd4EIqG3I6cEYsLbrx2ZzoQUTXvjqRz14qzH0gXSrPJkXKN2PTXQ3TVltQKmhsw_tzUjgrQmt75auFZ0iHzmXx98cD94opCt_qDyWvDfJbczvKtpfAiYB03G9c-U7EjDdYAGTsvfpBUwpBqp8JRIwfdvJpRAyVcnxuOSCByZZGWNZsN7fLG9_6Us-j7jKBbkKmJri_PuMKcXaD6JT644xfVXiH2_5cfA_AAD__6Jwirw). The city has approved a $116,000 plan to install wooden "cat ladders" along canal walls, which will help cats climb out safely if they fall in.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2u2yAQhZ8G72xhfgwsWFSKsku3XaKJGWxasC0gifL2ldPqvsDdznc05-j7dXM3iCluy0_IaMMSXAu72_BVE7aGxUGuDYuHXOGJta04Q3tB-gOOUSZ7qvtROg8xvZ3ovA2IDHmHdlRSMq3FZLrVGiPQUBb0PUyaKxhnNnEZvDAzD8rILtrzG9WjZJQqoYfRS4PMaxm4F7PgRFD0se1l-L3Hra0Y0nt_YhnmPXfJrq0dlfAfhF0Ju8btnDqs72OFBPd6hk7Cr4-WXd0fZUbCL5ghJsKm85jRx0cm_HJA9P0BpW1Y6hqP_3yGfEBctk_iC46a9mLk7p8FxoSclBGKqq5Yf7xiSrFOigi6nFWfre3bkp-W_Q0AAP__W3iSAA) | |
# Friday, August 15, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** This week's _Feel Good Flyover_ highlights 16-year-old Sam Heintz, who needed [a kidney transplant](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0bHOnDAQBOCnMZ1PxthgCoo0dH_alGix14fzLxjZm0N3Tx-RV0g9mpE-za-v5QsSpeP5E3ac4jMuHPNy4FUJmbEssFfGEmCv8MLKG3rgC-gbFq20lcrJ1i4BEr0X04QpImrsGpzawVrtnOnHZpuGIQSv-q7Xq1LO2DiublVjMNFiGEfXpOleU661WqnBuEcb7Ig6OBu7YLzphFEYEufy-J3TwRtGeucXlofPe0PTxnxW0f0QehZ6vq7rcX0-e9vdsdAzFE6eUOj5lgk9bwjEm9Bz_VOemA95Enis8juFA9-SCxz1JDhY5kPm88w1McqaAsqYiySMnFCuUHEForv9xiL03I8Sw-rjGgeJXY_SqAhyHR3K4Hzv0CvovWnKFM4rEaXaD8Ko5w6J_lH4vz94TfpvAAAA__-7PJ5d) when he was just 8 years old. His family had one unusual ask to protect his future. That careful choice helped him return to a full, active life--and today, he's thriving. To get even more out of this story, watch or listen to _The Feel Good Flyover Podcast_ , where Amy Hess interviews Sam and his mom. As usual, the episode is available on [Spotify](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFOhTAUgOGnKdsl5dBCO3RwkMF4MRqN0aVp6ClUCyW0geDTm-sruP_5hv_9qq_GB7-MvZlRudHp7KJe8EgBc8ZNmzll3KyZk9kx5QkHkw8Tvo0GCvxCxaXi2hofTs0KqxwiYF2gqlrOQQjWyGJSzNmhYrbmkkonZONk62BwAwgjqGmw8OqmUVFxoLRloqwslwhWcFdbNrCaMIrW57iVX9EveUIXzrjjVg5xLoKacl4Tqe8IdAS6uOJSpjVm785bQKBLUzwIdKzfXx6efsJzH8a3_vH1Y7mX1WexKbsePgSfmpYwOs7Ghz85_3vJruA3AAD__6GndxQ), [YouTube](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7FugzAQgOGngQ1kH2cwg4cs2WiGDh2tA5-DGxMiuCTi7av2FfoA_y99X4MfKOV0v37Qwi5eo5e4-ju_98wivHladuEt0LLTi3eZeSJ5U76RBwWmUrbSxgdK-fBYBheZgZuSne6MAWux7cvZNRQ1au6wn4B0MAEDtNiPraXR0ohlcr83ZbUBpTq0tQ6mZwjWxCbghE2BikOSdau_13SXmWM-1hdv9bQuZXazyGMvmlMB5wLOx_qUZz1yAedLZU-f3eU2VEO5ufB4p5zT3nYFqutCKf_18m_4y8FPAAAA__-ib20q), or [Apple Podcasts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFu7CAURL8Gd7bgAjYuKF7jbl-bEhG4rEnwYpmbtfbvo40i7QeknRmdkc7bxV18Lvl2_e83tOmaHKXqbni2gkR4OL81wiP6rfk7NloxeDp9-fQOOOiem15oF30uD6e6aBMioOzQiklrMEaNc7fawKfZzJKDmUAmlSZt4mwgcAF8DO-yy_ZJ40Zo4HxSZhBRzwjR6CSjCkoyxTFmqsfwUfONVkzlUe94DKFuXbEr0d6Y_MdgYbDsNQbfqA1-3ws-JwyWr_ZqGCy0Yv_L6F9pjsIIDhLmUXSHjfuZS8ltnJji183n8vNHfxZ1t_AdAAD__8KFfPg). Today's edition is brought to you by [Hypha Labs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2u2yAQhZ8G72xhfgwsWFSKsku3XaKJGWxasC0gifL2ldPqvsDdznc05-j7dXM3iCluy0_IaMMSXAu72_BVE7aGxUGuDYuHXOGJta04Q3tB-gOOUSZ7qvtROg8xvZ3ovA2IDHmHdlRSMq3FZLrVGiPQUBb0PUyaKxhnNnEZvDAzD8rILtrzG9WjZJQqoYfRS4PMaxm4F7PgRFD0se1l-L3Hra0Y0nt_YhnmPXfJrq0dlfAfhF0Ju8btnDqs72OFBPd6hk7Cr4-WXd0fZUbCL5ghJsKm85jRx0cm_HJA9P0BpW1Y6hqP_3yGfEBctk_iC46a9mLk7p8FxoSclBGKqq5Yf7xiSrFOigi6nFWfre3bkp-W_Q0AAP__W3iSAA), which offers a unique investment opportunity in nutrient-rich home mushroom farming kits.

## Plumbers Save Grandmother from Bee Swarm
Two plumbers in Santee, California, are credited with [saving a grandmother's life](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO3SAYhE-DOyzA4IcLijTuNm1K9Bt-bLJgnoC1tbePHOUG6WY00mjm-_VhPyCmeO4_IaMJe7A9FHvi3RL2jtVCbh2rh9zgwtYPdNBvSJ9gBROKMk25sh5i-rZy8CYgCpwGNPyllNBazstwmE1vzvHAmVwWpdBrPkuuFzXz4LlkbojmaWOaK8HYS-qRe7Wg8FqFyUsnJyIZ-thLHX-XePYDQ_ouF9bRlTwkc_T-bmT6QcRKxHrf98jZc-KJiVgfScSaioNE_5l3-sob1kYrNveFdK9w-lz6gZWGWjLdEGm7oWYKvYP7pPGkDc6OSMS0l7IntFfcz4fTUI1_3zGl2OYXkWzPENPfbf2_oV5G_AkAAP__pZCQDA) after she was attacked by a swarm of bees. Diosdado San Roque and his partner had just wrapped up a job when they saw a woman [collapsing in a driveway](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAQRL_GzhhhoA0OHFzibC-90GpDM-YW7BH0jbV_f_L-wkYlVUlPVfXnY_3AlNPx_I2F5viMK8dzPehqmZiprlgaUw1YGr6p8U4e-cL8iauSCoR0YoA1YMpfq-nDHIkU6Z7mwQIo58w49fscXbQwjJsMEqxX0m6A1sIUNQwaxrFP802TbgAlpTXuMQSYSAUHUQfjje6MpJD4rI-_Zzp4p5i_zjfVhz9Ln-ed-dU6_atTS6eW67oefmvuDju1YOXkM3VqySnegkcqmFunloYHE4mNSCAz-k_xyv_KRlV8zxXPikcoJ--3c2G9cSAnoaWaAlgvPKERBkEKp70RVuug7GhosqGvc3hdKefURtsZ-SyY8ndf_vHR71n9DwAA__8SPJFS), covered in bees. San Roque caught her before she hit the ground, shielding her as his partner was using a fire extinguisher to drive the bees back. The pair then [lured the swarm into their van](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb_G3ogwBtsMDF2ypWtH9AIPmwaMBa-x8vdV-gsdr650jnS-bvYGMcV9_YSMJqzBUih2x7MlJMJqITfC6iE3eGKjDR3QCekBVnChGF_YoKyHmF5W9t4ERIFjj2aYlRLLIifdbwadkqPwGhYp_YTcQeCaoxPjPIrpzvto3jS-DEpwPsvlMnilUfhFhdFLJ8dOcvSRSr18l7jThiG9yhPrxZXcJ7MRHa0bPzpx7cT1wHIkfF_vkX7yHStrhEdjcWdUWKNysHZCzawEdkdsDIjAPeK-srXC7nOhDSsbhnnWSuu-Gn-cMaXYprmTfM0Q05-b_h3tacRvAAAA__9604Oz), enduring dozens of stings in the process, until emergency crews arrived. The woman had a severe reaction but is recovering. First responders say the plumbers' quick actions likely saved her life.
## Teen's Transplant Keeps Baseball Dream Alive
Sam Heintz was just 5 when a rare kidney disease landed him in intensive care for a month. By age 8, he [needed a transplant](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0bHOnDAQBOCnMZ1PxthgCoo0dH_alGix14fzLxjZm0N3Tx-RV0g9mpE-za-v5QsSpeP5E3ac4jMuHPNy4FUJmbEssFfGEmCv8MLKG3rgC-gbFq20lcrJ1i4BEr0X04QpImrsGpzawVrtnOnHZpuGIQSv-q7Xq1LO2DiublVjMNFiGEfXpOleU661WqnBuEcb7Ig6OBu7YLzphFEYEufy-J3TwRtGeucXlofPe0PTxnxW0f0QehZ6vq7rcX0-e9vdsdAzFE6eUOj5lgk9bwjEm9Bz_VOemA95Enis8juFA9-SCxz1JDhY5kPm88w1McqaAsqYiySMnFCuUHEForv9xiL03I8Sw-rjGgeJXY_SqAhyHR3K4Hzv0CvovWnKFM4rEaXaD8Ko5w6J_lH4vz94TfpvAAAA__-7PJ5d) and was lucky to find a donor match--but his family had one big ask: place the new kidney on his left side so he could keep swinging a bat. Sam plays baseball left-handed, and the usual placement would've put the organ right in the line of fire. That decision [turned out to be a game-changer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb8GukG2MSyvoEiz3UubEg14DM4aD7Ina_H30eYXUt3u6pzz63v5xhBD2n_iSbPf_SKel0S1RBKhvOBZhLLDs-Cbihy0oVSML1yMMgOoCfSwOAzxXmzrZk9kqG9p1o9hMNNkx6_2mAc9rv00jZv1mzKGlDeGSKPWzo96s22YP29q0oNR6mGnTrvhi4ybBt87u9m-sYpcEM7dbw5JDvLx5jflbuOzjfMhcpWm_9GYZ2OetdZuZ3YfjURSOb86zntjngeXKwhGEAyRc4FXcIlukIypXBGTgDBcmYU2ASFKsGKhFWOEK-JNuUCpIe1w_RH5bBDgBCwHZSjBEbCHIxRY2d2NebZ5dlcNMYYyPhqr9hND_Act_137PZu_AQAA__8qr5s0). Now 16, Sam is healthy, back at first base, and playing like nothing ever happened.
## Amsterdam Builds Ladders to Save Cats
Amsterdam is taking steps, literally, to [keep its feline residents safe](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdF7ZAwZTuEhDt2lTolk8BicGr-zRIv4-4hXvB14zxVzp6J775zk_MaZ4rL9xJxfWMHPI80FnTcRMZca9MhWPe8UPVd5oQT4x_cMZFBiprNRm9hjTNXeNd4EIqG3I6cEYsLbrx2ZzoQUTXvjqRz14qzH0gXSrPJkXKN2PTXQ3TVltQKmhsw_tzUjgrQmt75auFZ0iHzmXx98cD94opCt_qDyWvDfJbczvKtpfAiYB03G9c-U7EjDdYAGTsvfpBUwpBqp8JRIwfdvJpRAyVcnxuOSCByZZGWNZsN7fLG9_6Us-j7jKBbkKmJri_PuMKcXaD6JT644xfVXiH2_5cfA_AAD__6Jwirw). The city has approved a $116,000 plan to install wooden "cat ladders" along canal walls, which will help cats climb out safely if they fall in. [An animal welfare group](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb8Gd6xsbAwuKNK4e2lTWiMY7MnDsILZtfbvI6fID6SbYnTvPefX1_YFlCjvP-FEF_e4cSxbxqslZMa6wdkYa4CzwRsbH-iBL0jfsKleadlbOegtAKXPNnXBRUSFY4duMFora6d56Q7nBxhhMYMZrR9xXvxoIkRrBrR6NtZ35O603g5a9b2Z7GMIekEVrI5jmPw0iqnHQFzq43ehzAfG9ClvrA9fzi65g_nZxPhDqFWo9bquB75quTHuB6HWvSJmoda7Rqi1N_c9C7X-45PUJOXGkG4d8njlUDE0WaJkyh_ZGKh6aNgkpJJ3SdykhwypSS7yG_EpL0ohUUTZIGJXXXhelBK12Yip30-g9Hcv_7fot1N_AgAA__8oNJXM) came up with the idea after local rescue teams flagged several high-risk areas. Nineteen cats have drowned in a canal so far this year. Steep canal walls and narrow streets make it hard for cats to escape on their own. The project will roll out later this year, giving neighborhood cats a safer way to explore and a better chance of landing on their feet.

The pair then , enduring dozens of stings in the process, until emergency crews arrived. The woman had a severe reaction but is recovering. name: IN <-> AK Dems
subject: Embarrassing? Are you serious? This is historic…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Trump has arranged a high-profile meeting with Vladimir Putin in Alaska — and instead of showing respect for Alaska, he insulted our friends and fellow Americans on the national stage. In a press conference, Trump called it _**"embarrassing"**_ to be there and described Alaska's Capitol as _**“unsafe...dirty and disgusting.”**_ **That’s not leadership**. That’s contempt. **[Join Indiana Dems in helping the AK Dems combat Trump’s policies as he comes to Alaska. Can you spare $10 to help us fight back today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113399662/563638799/2039274221?refcode=250815akinsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDIxMjZlYi0xNTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQBQZBlW15mX8jilfMugN_it-TriI2BC-CRzoR9ldT4=)** At points, Trump also seemed to think that he was "going to Russia to meet Putin." We’re not sure if we missed something, but Alaska is proudly this nation's 49th state. Now, we did not realize we aren’t American, but Trump believing that might explain why he’s been gutting our rural radio and emergency services, not to mention the public services working families across America rely on. Trump’s visit isn’t about even pretending to address the challenges our communities are facing. It’s about **cozying up to a dictator while trying to distract from his own failures.** He promised to end the war in Ukraine on his first day in office. Instead, we’re more than 200 days in, and the suffering of innocent civilians continues. This is a reminder of what’s at stake — not just for us, **but for the security of our allies and the future of democracy around the globe.** While Trump offers photo ops with Putin, Americans are dealing with rising grocery costs, cuts to healthcare, and a growing anger against our leaders cozying up with violent world leaders. **We need more voices in DC who will stand with our communities, stand with Ukraine, and stand up for what’s right.** **[If you’re ready to send a clear message that our democracy is not for sale, chip in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113399663/563638800/2039274221?refcode=250815akinsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDIxMjZlYi0xNTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQBQZBlW15mX8jilfMugN_it-TriI2BC-CRzoR9ldT4=)** Thanks, IN <-> AK Dems

clean_body: | Peter, Trump has arranged a high-profile meeting with Vladimir Putin in Alaska — and instead of showing respect for Alaska, he insulted our friends and fellow Americans on the national stage. In a press conference, Trump called it "embarrassing" to be there and described Alaska's Capitol as “unsafe...dirty and disgusting.” That’s not leadership. That’s contempt. = At points, Trump also seemed to think that he was "going to Russia to meet Putin." We’re not sure if we missed something, but Alaska is proudly this nation's 49th state. Now, we did not realize we aren’t American, but Trump believing that might explain why he’s been gutting our rural radio and emergency services, not to mention the public services working families across America rely on. Trump’s visit isn’t about even pretending to address the challenges our communities are facing. It’s about cozying up to a dictator while trying to distract from his own failures. He promised to end the war in Ukraine on his first day in office. Instead, we’re more than 200 days in, and the suffering of innocent civilians continues. This is a reminder of what’s at stake — not just for us, but for the security of our allies and the future of democracy around the globe. While Trump offers photo ops with Putin, Americans are dealing with rising grocery costs, cuts to healthcare, and a growing anger against our leaders cozying up with violent world leaders. We need more voices in DC who will stand with our communities, stand with Ukraine, and stand up for what’s right. = Thanks, IN <-> AK Dems [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Fellow Conservative,

I'll level with you - we will have difficulty keeping our hold on the Senate majority next November if you don't start involving yourself with the day-to-day business of the politics of it all.

For starters, were you aware that there are now THREE OPEN SENATE seats up for grabs where Republicans can go on offense?

> Michigan -> retirement of liberal Sen. Gary Peters. Pickup opportunity no. 1.
>
> MICHIGAN is a state President Trump WON in 2024, and withn Senator Gary Peters out of the way - Republicans should be primed to sweep to victory in the Great Lakes State.
>
> New Hampshire -> retirement of liberal Sen. Jean Shaheen. Pickup opportunity no. 2.
>
> New Hampshire is a state that just elected my former Senate colleague, Republican Kelly Ayotte, to the governorship last year, and with Senator Jeanne Shaheen stepping down - Republicans can WIN in the Granite State.
>
> Minnesota -> retirement of liberal Sen. Tina Smith. Pickup opportunity no. 3.
>
> Minnesota is a state ready to make a change following failed Democrat rule from the likes of lunatic liberals such as Governor Tim Walz, and with Senator Tina Smith opting to retire - this signals Republicans have the momentum to finally flip the Gopher State.
These three seats each present Republicans with a unique and exciting opportunity to compete in contests where we don't have to run our candidates against incumbent senators running for reelection.

There hasn't been an open seat in New Hampshire in 15 years! And in Minnesota, there hasn't been an open seat since 2006!

We have such opportunities this cycle, Fellow Conservative, but our good fortune won't mean anything if you don't get involved.

**[Do you have two minutes to answer some critically important questions for me right now?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=bce8e5926fd14a8781529ab2f1cefad3&_e=igWeTV6LjtdXa1puLIQjkH9yabaXnGUV5RrfwcUkzrX0K4a79yRc0oeTkE9dWGbI0399HIB0xxfkBLQmCudWm_a2xrluybnyCUQIjTG21o0BW63_YCwW_sfdgDOfb12cdO6jRExQED-jqfG0qjCkcAURcB3_LI3wBiUtWkVYBgXG4yxkZ3Fmlo09IaNvKNgkqgVdtQh0ILKpscdHJnNcknZ1sqMAODVOnP6eZVUsOucrN6DKbbdLT8Dq0PyGdgH8gNjjc9pYvLsss8uIPc0n4sEmcUAc-992d2CpVLtOiyPsPUE0RSQtZx6tdfZKpSiix1YxvFyQ8z6X93xwSDbLhr7VToHdDW77arbwD_-AHtIw0vVDiyXvLi1OAmPsEXVNuZALzMJt0c0wlsrat8sSjB7kVirXCRYKx2y3SqoksDnHGNCmfOJByQkOgrDIvlAHatneJJ5VDbnbRiTSv-KG4gUSCXQTgShkwB6QtAHeb-Znef5c-JrRli_WgJ6fjnrJPVsol3eJpbTQskkHN-U7yp_-NkBXQAKjtVDY9o2OsswXMJHtkk2ZgROaXuDd-H_EAM-ChU2Fb0UstK4iuBoTbZJEwPSRwFkVDVZ0zW8DBqJuE5Lf1w6UEOTXQywUZJoCm9hbcS5dBDfwrAe6Q45v9WQT7SvpVBlFNvqMbbU70kp34nHYGvJgjx_OCI3aqkzmRwiXfMAuU5YneEhM0GVYsywetpQjlNFFCG900vVxyq3vd-_ahisckfF2VtvjCmYx5HnMsW4E0jwqWoHRaVdQK6nSb47weRMdFgjAsclypHwDQwPHUHsON4n2WehprPLe)**

As you know, I'm no stranger to being outspent by the left. I've been outspent in every race I've run, and won every time.

_But I've never been outmaneuvered._

I know how imperative it is to invest early on in an election, pouring resources into defining not only an opponent before they can define themselves to voters but also oneself before an opponent can define you.

So that's why I'm asking YOU to take TWO important actions right now:

> **ONE:** Complete your CONSERVATIVE CENSUS to give our GOP Senators a game plan to follow between now and next November.
>
> **TWO:** Consider contributing all that you can to give U.S. Senate Republicans the critical resources needed to flip all three open Senate seats.
You may not think completing questionnaires like this one are important, but I can tell you they are critical to our success.

If you're willing to offer your valuable time to us by answering several of our questions via email outreach, then you're highly likely to vote in next year's midterm elections, and that means we need to know where you stand on the issues of the day.

That means the odds are stacked against us, but that should serve as extra motivation to all of us America First Republicans who worked so hard last year to get President Trump back into the White House.

clean_body: I’m going all in on helping Senate Republicans retain control of the chamber next November | Fellow Conservative, I'll level with you - we will have difficulty keeping our hold on the Senate majority next November if you don't start involving yourself with the day-to-day business of the politics of it all. For starters, were you aware that there are now THREE OPEN SENATE seats up for grabs where Republicans can go on offense? Michigan -> retirement of liberal Sen. Gary Peters. Pickup opportunity no. 1. MICHIGAN is a state President Trump WON in 2024, and withn Senator Gary Peters out of the way - Republicans should be primed to sweep to victory in the Great Lakes State. New Hampshire -> retirement of liberal Sen. Jean Shaheen. Pickup opportunity no. 2. New Hampshire is a state that just elected my former Senate colleague, Republican Kelly Ayotte, to the governorship last year, and with Senator Jeanne Shaheen stepping down - Republicans can WIN in the Granite State. Minnesota -> retirement of liberal Sen. Tina Smith. Pickup opportunity no. 3. Minnesota is a state ready to make a change following failed Democrat rule from the likes of lunatic liberals such as Governor Tim Walz, and with Senator Tina Smith opting to retire - this signals Republicans have the momentum to finally flip the Gopher State. These three seats each present Republicans with a unique and exciting opportunity to compete in contests where we don't have to run our candidates against incumbent senators running for reelection. There hasn't been an open seat in New Hampshire in 15 years! And in Minnesota, there hasn't been an open seat since 2006! We have such opportunities this cycle, Fellow Conservative, but our good fortune won't mean anything if you don't get involved. If you answered "yes" in your head, then please take my 2025 Conservative Census right now. As you know, I'm no stranger to being outspent by the left. I've been outspent in every race I've run, and won every time. But I've never been outmaneuvered. I know how imperative it is to invest early on in an election, pouring resources into defining not only an opponent before they can define themselves to voters but also oneself before an opponent can define you. So that's why I'm asking YOU to take TWO important actions right now: ONE: Complete your CONSERVATIVE CENSUS to give our GOP Senators a game plan to follow between now and next November. TWO: Consider contributing all that you can to give U.S. Senate Republicans the critical resources needed to flip all three open Senate seats. You may not think completing questionnaires like this one are important, but I can tell you they are critical to our success. If you're willing to offer your valuable time to us by answering several of our questions via email outreach, then you're highly likely to vote in next year's midterm elections, and that means we need to know where you stand on the issues of the day. As you know, midterm elections are historically less favorable for the party in the White House. That means the odds are stacked against us, but that should serve as extra motivation to all of us America First Republicans who worked so hard last year to get President Trump back into the White House. No matter your decision today, you can count on me to hit the campaign trail early and often to help defeat the Democrats and elect more Conservatives to the Senate. Thank you, Ted Cruz | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

name: Saikat for Congress
subject: We have PROOF that door knocking works
body:
Check this out!

| | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=c566517d66&e=bf17056ae8)
| | | | | Dear Friend,Please join us at **11:00 AM tomorrow** (Saturday, Aug. 16) to knock some doors with our campaign team! Meet us at Campaign HQ, [**800 Irving St**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=e5d1e8a179&e=bf17056ae8) — right on the N and many bus lines. [**Click here to let us know you’re coming**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=5b613b097d&e=bf17056ae8) , or just show up!_(BTW: If you’re returning, you’ll skip the training and go right out!)_ Last week, 51 volunteers got trained at our office to canvass and talked to hundreds of voters. This is how we’re going to win! And here’s some evidence:Winning this race is actually going to be easy — **but only on one condition:** That we talk with more than 100,000 voters on the doors and in the streets and let them know (1) who Saikat is, (2) what he stands for, and (3) that he’s running a serious challenge to Nancy Pelosi. We can do that if several thousand volunteers get trained and spend some time each month door knocking throughout the campaign. We believe this is a realistic goal. The fact that 51 volunteers showed up almost a year before the primary is proof. Two other things to know about: **1) We are hiring paid canvassers!** We’re going to achieve our goals by mobilizing both volunteers and full time paid canvassers. We can’t succeed with ONLY one. If you (or anyone you know!) would like to spend your days in the sun (and fog!) talking to San Franciscans about changing the world — and get paid up to $35 per hour once you’re fully up to speed — then please email us at team@saikat.us to apply. Please note: This is a physically demanding job (with all our hills and stairs!) that requires going door-to-door for a minimum of five hours per day. **2) We’re looking for volunteers who’d like to go with one of our field organizers to contact people in their apartment building or on their block.** Neighbors talking to neighbors is the best way to connect with voters about Saikat's campaign. If you’d like to participate in this pilot program, [**please sign up here**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=fe294d8176&e=bf17056ae8). **OK, back to Saturday:****🗓 Canvass Day Details
** **Date:** Saturday, August 16, 2025
**Time:** 11:00 AM – 2:00 PM
**Location:** Saikat for Congress HQ — 800 Irving St, San Francisco, CAWe’ll be walking nearby the office in the **Inner Sunset** , so everything is just a few blocks from HQ. Before heading out, we’ll do a quick training on how to knock doors, use the MiniVAN app, and connect with neighbors about why Saikat is the bold, progressive voice San Francisco needs in Congress.**Again, if you came out with us last week, then we’ll send you right out and you can skip the training.****What to Bring:**
* A **fully charged smartphone**
* The “**MiniVAN app”** downloaded from your phone’s app store (we’ll help if needed). If you have time, watch [**this video**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=db6e99d506&e=bf17056ae8) on how to use the app for canvassing.
* **Comfortable walking shoes**
* **Water**

**What to Expect:**
* Meeting other passionate progressives
* Learning to have impactful conversations with voters
* Sharing your ideas and reflections during our end-of-day **debrief**
* Helping to shape a campaign that listens and leads with heart
* Snacks and small bites

This campaign only works because of people like _you_. Let’s show San Francisco what grassroots power looks like!See you Saturday!In solidarity,
The Field Team
**Saikat for Congress**
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=2b122bb0f3&e=bf17056ae8)
| [saikat.us](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=36d9913b7f&e=bf17056ae8)
---

Saikat for Congress * 1388 Haight St PMB 1124 * San Francisco, CA 94117-2909 * USA

**It’s time for these crooks to face real consequences. And it starts with you stepping up right now.**

_Coach Tommy Tuberville_

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=817700ab620842399668b364d45ff6e6&_e=gsb-k4EjClKjibHftz-9aTaf4BkyqrptViexYSKjgmgW58nW9I29TltGtRO4f2dk2m4foGbTWubXs0nIEdWgyyxfIFY4C5kzB6Z2WkR6-Q1juDCiD7yzY1lBeKw1SNdwcdgGMjeFCIm-f3kYzLJgy2u91ubsED-m07bo0AtjM5ShiNlmUjUgV34SQF01LT0N-HWDm3mcq1z9ZdbB3FlfTV2786vF6KS9YxkMJSQJ3YV3j5egooC8AL2zDi5Ee3OknL-1Xq_sfZxiND2LYNG7mmbf87uBNtBZWIITYi0yRgOl2hOTqqDN5-hdY1eApdEjaQdKbFLTSYMP8GogpFDcCCHSBixxjAWmF3uh0hf6cdBLKb69ZG17OnJ_NezAUwo-xDBC_2489M2UYIdIjVT-wIGn8LPHBl90SmdNMdOf9W5QwMH15hascT8Mr3zhmqvrXjBuHHqxaKA0FBNkq43H93OFUAaQl4xcNhOUCaZC0vbVFS2bj-4HTaDQ7-NP12awVq6i2pfmcXfe3rykIiJD2o2J_SXOY9p4q_mn_dwxtpwrXN1qAbYELnvNXvIg8Kuh)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: The RussiaGate Witch Hunt wasn’t just a smear job. It was a coordinated hit on President Trump and the American people. | Peter, The RussiaGate Witch Hunt wasn’t just a smear job. It was a coordinated hit on President Trump and the American people. -They LIED -They FAKED EVIDENCE -They WEAPONIZED our government And for what? To try and CRUSH the America First Movement before it could even get started. Let me be crystal clear: Put their ass in jail. That’s where every single crook behind this scam belongs. We’re not talking about political disagreements... we’re talking about crimes. Real ones. And if we don’t hold them accountable, they’ll do it again and again until they destroy this country from the inside. We can’t give them that satisfaction: | It’s time for these crooks to face real consequences. And it starts with you stepping up right now. Coach Tommy Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Stand with Bernie and ban big money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Big money has corrupted our political system, plain and simple. Every
election cycle, billionaire super PACs and secretive dark money groups
pour millions into our elections, drowning out grassroots voices and
handing an unfair advantage to candidates beholden to corporate interests.

This is EXACTLY what Bernie founded Our Revolution to fight. And right
now, we have a REAL chance to change that – but we need to ratchet up
pressure with your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250815&t=1011&akid=9188%2E5885482%2EjaHw5m ]Bernie tweet congratulating the DNC for starting the process to ban Big
Money from presidential primaries

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250815&t=1012&akid=9188%2E5885482%2EjaHw5m ]Add your name if you agree: Big money has no place in our politics.
We’ll deliver our signatures directly to DNC members before their August
27 vote to end dark money in Democratic primaries.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250815&t=1013&akid=9188%2E5885482%2EjaHw5m ]ADD YOUR NAME

Ultra-wealthy donors and shadowy corporations are funneling billions into
our political system. Their goal? To water down the progressive agenda and
block bold candidates who challenge the status quo.

Getting dark money out of our party’s primaries is the first and most
crucial step toward reclaiming our democracy. Which is why Our Revolution
has long been fighting to push the DNC to do it. And here’s our chance:
the DNC introduced a resolution THIS WEEK with a vote on August 27.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250815&t=1014&akid=9188%2E5885482%2EjaHw5m ]Headline: DNC chair takes steps to restrict corporate and dark money in
2028 primaries

DNC members are currently hearing from powerful lobbyists opposed to this
resolution. Now they need to hear from ALL of us that there’s massive
public support to ban dark money. And we have just DAYS to gather enough
signatures, then deliver our voices straight to DNC members across the
country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250815&t=1015&akid=9188%2E5885482%2EjaHw5m ]If you believe our elections should be decided by voters – not
billionaires – sign now so we can deliver your support to DNC members
ahead of this crucial vote.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250815&t=1016&akid=9188%2E5885482%2EjaHw5m ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we let big donors and corporate interests decide who gets on the
ballot, we silence working people and progressive champions. But when we
speak up as a united movement, we can kick big money out – and elect
leaders who fight for us.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9188%2E5885482%2EjaHw5m ]Sign Up

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Trump is creating problems, then turning his back on them.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Is this who we're prepared to be as a nation? Peter, Donald Trump isn’t just a bad president. **He’s dangerous.**

Since his return to the White House, Trump has pushed through legislation that gives tax breaks to the wealthy, while leaving hardworking Americans out to dry.

He’s using ICE as he sees fit, ripping apart families and deporting immigrants – regardless of their immigration status.

And his latest move? Instead of addressing homelessness head-on and finding solutions to help those who need it most, he’s deploying the National Guard in D.C. to forcibly remove unhoused Americans.

Donald Trump’s agenda is hurting real people, and he doesn’t care. I’m not standing by while he unleashes attack after attack.

clean_body: Is this who we're prepared to be as a nation? Peter, Donald Trump isn’t just a bad president. He’s dangerous. Since his return to the White House, Trump has pushed through legislation that gives tax breaks to the wealthy, while leaving hardworking Americans out to dry. He’s using ICE as he sees fit, ripping apart families and deporting immigrants – regardless of their immigration status. And his latest move? Instead of addressing homelessness head-on and finding solutions to help those who need it most, he’s deploying the National Guard in D.C. to forcibly remove unhoused Americans. Donald Trump’s agenda is hurting real people, and he doesn’t care. I’m not standing by while he unleashes attack after attack. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Wesley Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

_Trump Set to Beg Indiana Republicans to Re-Draw Map in White House Visit This Month_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113400566/563641597/-151613472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhiNjM0MS0xOTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELqBl9za8oVHsneeR5nGYm703unEkC3QwAVGKlgQ9-4=&emci=c75bad14-177a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a48b6341-197a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113400567/563641599/-151613472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhiNjM0MS0xOTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELqBl9za8oVHsneeR5nGYm703unEkC3QwAVGKlgQ9-4=&emci=c75bad14-177a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a48b6341-197a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) News broke late this week that Donald Trump and the White House have invited all 110 Republican state legislators to come to Washington D.C. to meet about redistricting on August 26. **[We need all hands on deck to fight back against Trump’s attempt to shoplift two districts out of the hands of Hoosier voters. Will you chip in our efforts to stop this mid-decade cheating?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113400568/563641601/-1275564556?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhiNjM0MS0xOTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELqBl9za8oVHsneeR5nGYm703unEkC3QwAVGKlgQ9-4=)** Trump knows his policies have crashed the economy, killed the strong job market, and made millions of Americans feeling helpless about the future of healthcare in their communities. It’s no wonder he’s sending JD Vance to Texas and Indiana trying to redraw the maps to keep control of Congress. He’s scared to face the voters on a fair playing field, and instead wants to create an illegitimate Congress to make sure his agenda doesn’t get derailed by Americans who are fed up with his administration. ****_Bipartisan Opposition Growing to Braun’s Gerrymandering Cheating Plot_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113400569/563641603/1802813073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhiNjM0MS0xOTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELqBl9za8oVHsneeR5nGYm703unEkC3QwAVGKlgQ9-4=&emci=c75bad14-177a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a48b6341-197a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113400570/563641605/1802813073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhiNjM0MS0xOTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELqBl9za8oVHsneeR5nGYm703unEkC3QwAVGKlgQ9-4=&emci=c75bad14-177a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a48b6341-197a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) Just over a week since JD Vance met with Governor Mike Braun behind closed doors and closed curtains, and several prominent Indiana Republicans are coming out against re-drawing Indiana’s maps early. Officials such as former Indiana House Speaker Brian Bosma and former Indiana Governor Mitch Daniels have come out against the proposal, saying they didn’t see the point of making such a political power grab. They’ve been joined by several Statehouse Republican lawmakers, including members of both the House and Senate Republican supermajorities. It’s becoming increasingly clear that Hoosiers of all political beliefs want to keep mid-decade cheating out of Indiana. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113400571/563641620/-847682450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhiNjM0MS0xOTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELqBl9za8oVHsneeR5nGYm703unEkC3QwAVGKlgQ9-4=&emci=c75bad14-177a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a48b6341-197a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113400572/563641625/-847682450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhiNjM0MS0xOTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELqBl9za8oVHsneeR5nGYm703unEkC3QwAVGKlgQ9-4=&emci=c75bad14-177a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a48b6341-197a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) This week, we are highlighting the work of State Senator Rodney Pol Jr. (D-Chesterton) against the proposed toll road expansion throughout the State of Indiana. Sen. Pol and Democrats are opposed to such a move that will increase costs on every family trying to make it to work or take their children to school. If the Republican supermajorities in the Statehouse push forward with their toll road plan, Sen. Pol plans to propose a change that gives free I-PASSES and credits to Hoosiers living in toll counties. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Trump Set to Beg Indiana Republicans to Re-Draw Map in White House Visit This Month News broke late this week that Donald Trump and the White House have invited all 110 Republican state legislators to come to Washington D.C. to meet about redistricting on August 26. = Trump knows his policies have crashed the economy, killed the strong job market, and made millions of Americans feeling helpless about the future of healthcare in their communities. It’s no wonder he’s sending JD Vance to Texas and Indiana trying to redraw the maps to keep control of Congress. He’s scared to face the voters on a fair playing field, and instead wants to create an illegitimate Congress to make sure his agenda doesn’t get derailed by Americans who are fed up with his administration. Bipartisan Opposition Growing to Braun’s Gerrymandering Cheating Plot Just over a week since JD Vance met with Governor Mike Braun behind closed doors and closed curtains, and several prominent Indiana Republicans are coming out against re-drawing Indiana’s maps early. Officials such as former Indiana House Speaker Brian Bosma and former Indiana Governor Mitch Daniels have come out against the proposal, saying they didn’t see the point of making such a political power grab. They’ve been joined by several Statehouse Republican lawmakers, including members of both the House and Senate Republican supermajorities. It’s becoming increasingly clear that Hoosiers of all political beliefs want to keep mid-decade cheating out of Indiana. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week, we are highlighting the work of State Senator Rodney Pol Jr. (D-Chesterton) against the proposed toll road expansion throughout the State of Indiana. Sen. Pol and Democrats are opposed to such a move that will increase costs on every family trying to make it to work or take their children to school. If the Republican supermajorities in the Statehouse push forward with their toll road plan, Sen. Pol plans to propose a change that gives free I-PASSES and credits to Hoosiers living in toll counties. Hoosier families should not be punished for having to take the highway. Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects INDOT – INDOT is taking comments on its proposed upgrades and changes to the I-80/94 corridor in Northwest Indiana (FlexRoad), which is the busiest stretch of interstate in Indiana. IDOE – The Indiana Department of Education is taking its first round of feedback on a plan to reassign A-F ratings to all Indiana schools. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Tuesday, August 26th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Maximizing Volunteer Capacity During GOTV. INDems IN the News WFYI: IndyStar: WTHR: Indiana Capital Chronicle: * Indiana Capital Chronicle: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12929425?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
|
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

After ending the 105-day legislative session in June, I have been staying busy in the district, and my team and I have been working towards getting things back to normal.

Over the last month, I have been meeting with my constituents and attending events all over the district. July was filled with meaningful connections, important events, and opportunities to strengthen our community. I’m grateful for the opportunity to share some of these updates with you today!
---
| | **District Updates!**
---
|
---
| A legislative update was shared with members of the **On Top of the World Republican Club** and the **Stone Creek Republican Club**. The recent legislative session brought many exciting developments, and these gatherings offered a chance to discuss what was accomplished and answer questions from engaged community members.
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| At **Goldmark Farms** , **Charter Communications** hosted a celebration marking the expansion of broadband access in **Marion County**. The event featured remarks from **Congresswoman Kat Cammack** and other key leaders, highlighting how strong partnerships at every level of government can bring transformative change to local communities.
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **SMA Healthcare** recently opened a new women’s residential treatment center, where life-changing work is being done to support women navigating addiction and behavioral health challenges. **Access to quality treatment and recovery resources like this is not only transformative but can also save lives.**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| I was recognized by the **Florida Coalition of Children** with the **Legislator of the Year Award** , an honor that underscores the importance of advocating for Florida’s children and families. Their work continues to make a powerful impact across the state.
---
|
---
|
---
| **Americans for Prosperity** celebrated the grand opening of their new field office in **Ocala**. The strong turnout emphasized the value of having a dedicated space to help empower the voices of local constituents.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| A previous meeting during the legislative session with 30 nonprofit leaders sparked an idea to help community organizations better understand the legislative process. In partnership with the **Community Foundation of Ocala/Marion County** , an event was hosted that welcomed **over 70 nonprofit leaders**. **Jessica McClain** provided an overview of the recent legislative session and discussed how the state can assist in the appropriations process. The event was a resounding success, equipping nonprofits with valuable tools and knowledge.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **Marion Senior Services** hosted **Senator Darryl Rouson** , a steadfast champion for behavioral health in Florida, for a special event focused on advancing critical care initiatives. It was a pleasure to attend!
---
|
---
|
---
---
| The **Florida Freedom Forum** brought together an inspiring roster of speakers, including **Governor Ron DeSantis** , **CFO Blaise Ingoglia** , **Agricultural Commissioner Wilton Simpson** , **U.S. Senator Rick Scott** , **Attorney General Ashley Moody** , **Congressman Byron Donalds** ,**Benny Johnson** , **Senators Joe Gruters** and **Jay Collins** , **Cliff Maloney** , and **RNC Chairman Michael Whatley**.
---
|
---
| | From legislative discussions to community celebrations, these moments reflect the shared commitment to making Marion County—and all of Florida—a better place to live, work, and thrive.

Thank you for your continued support of my leadership in the Florida House! I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great weekend!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=3cbb349a6d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=3cbb349a6d).

---

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Keep politics out of our jobs data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Last week, news broke that Donald Trump fired the Commissioner of Labor Statistics after the agency released a jobs report he didn’t like and replaced them with a political loyalist.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113401008/563642353/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-08-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjBhYmMyMC0xYTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5SQ1PK-VVYjkZyE_8WwHxjHg9geltdQtjbzZl3K6hl0=)
---
| Last week, news broke that Donald Trump fired the Commissioner of Labor Statistics after the agency released a jobs report he didn’t like and replaced them with a political loyalist.

He’s also been spreading false claims that the jobs numbers were “rigged” against him.

When our leaders undermine the independence of agencies that track jobs, wages, and unemployment, they aren’t just hurting trust in government, they’re hurting working families. Businesses, workers, and communities rely on accurate economic data to make decisions that affect paychecks, hiring, and investments.

That’s why I’m introducing legislation to make sure no President can fire the Commissioner of Labor Statistics for political reasons.

Because when extremists start rewriting the facts to fit their agenda, our democracy and our economy are both at risk.

[_**If you agree that economic data should be honest, accurate, and free from political manipulation, I’m asking you to join me in this fight by adding your name.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113401009/563642354/244244230?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjBhYmMyMC0xYTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5SQ1PK-VVYjkZyE_8WwHxjHg9geltdQtjbzZl3K6hl0=&emci=8180bc1a-1a7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cb0abc20-1a7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=750857)

clean_body: Last week, news broke that Donald Trump fired the Commissioner of Labor Statistics after the agency released a jobs report he didn’t like and replaced them with a political loyalist. | = | Last week, news broke that Donald Trump fired the Commissioner of Labor Statistics after the agency released a jobs report he didn’t like and replaced them with a political loyalist. He’s also been spreading false claims that the jobs numbers were “rigged” against him. When our leaders undermine the independence of agencies that track jobs, wages, and unemployment, they aren’t just hurting trust in government, they’re hurting working families. Businesses, workers, and communities rely on accurate economic data to make decisions that affect paychecks, hiring, and investments. That’s why I’m introducing legislation to make sure no President can fire the Commissioner of Labor Statistics for political reasons. Because when extremists start rewriting the facts to fit their agenda, our democracy and our economy are both at risk. | Together, we can protect the truth, hold extremists accountable, and make sure our economy works for everyone. name: Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
subject: Why fundraising slows down during the summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Despite the warm weather, we still have goals to meet!
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250815-5338-footer&t=1&akid=5338%2E420207%2E33D2Zj)
Hi Peter, Lauren here, Campaign Manager for Pramila for Congress.
One of the things I’ve learned in my time working on campaigns is that **fundraising slows down during the summer** — and this year is no different!
There’s a lot of different reasons why that happens. Parents are busy with kids out of school, families take vacations, and people want to enjoy the warmth outside and away from their screens.
**But despite the warm weather, we still have goals to meet!**
Our campaign doesn’t stop during the summer, and funding everything from the Resistance Lab and our back-to-school backpack supplies drive to our year-round organizing program takes resources.
And since we’re currently tracking behind where we need to be at this point in August, I’m coming to you for help.
[**We’ve set a mid-month goal of raising $7,500 before tonight at midnight. Will you pitch in $3 to help us hit that goal and get through the summer fundraising slowdown?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250815-1?refcode=em20250815-5338&amount=3&refcode2=5338_420207_33D2Zj&akid=5338%2E420207%2E33D2Zj)

Thanks so much for everything you do,
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress
